examples.english: Most people want to see new federal gun laws introduced.
examples.chinese: 大多数人希望看到新的联邦枪支管理法案出台。

centers.english: happening in or involving a lot of countries
centers.chinese: 在许多国家发生的或涉及许多国家的

examples.english: This is CNN, bringing you all the latest international news.
examples.chinese: 这里是美国有线新闻网，随时向您报道所有最新的国际新闻。

examples.english: an international agreement on the disposal of toxic waste
examples.chinese: 一项关于有毒废弃物处置的国际协议

examples.english: The goal of the program is to increase international understanding and good will.
examples.chinese: 这一计划的目的在于增加国际间的理解和亲善。

examples.english: The government is attempting to stimulate the economy by attracting multinational corporations.
examples.chinese: 政府试图通过吸引跨国公司来刺激经济。

examples.english: Multinational companies have often been accused of employing cheap labour in developing countries.
examples.chinese: 经常有人指责跨国公司在发展中国家雇用廉价劳动力。

examples.english: Several multinationals were fined for environmental pollution.
examples.chinese: 数家跨国企业因污染环境被罚款。

examples.english: EU ministers proposed a multilateral agreement on arms control.
examples.chinese: 欧盟各国部长提出一项多边武器控制协议。

centers.english: the area away from towns and cities

examples.english: They've gone to the country for the weekend.
examples.chinese: 他们去乡村度周末了。

examples.english: Clarisa didn't care for New York, she wanted to live in the country.
examples.chinese: 克拉丽莎不喜欢纽约，她想住在乡村。

examples.english: We've found a lovely little cottage in the country.
examples.chinese: 我们在农村地区找到一间漂亮的小村舍。

examples.english: Living in the country, you feel much closer to nature.
examples.chinese: 居住在农村里，你会感受到与大自然是如此地接近。

examples.english: Somerset is famous for its rolling hills and beautiful countryside.
examples.chinese: 萨默塞特以平缓的山丘和美丽的乡村著名。

examples.english: She went to an expensive girls’ school situated deep in the heart of the countryside.
examples.chinese: 她上了一所位于乡村腹地的昂贵的女子学校。

examples.english: The countryside of Tuscany is a wonderful landscape of fields and valleys, with many historic monuments.
examples.chinese: 托斯卡纳的乡间全是漂亮的田地和山谷，有许多名胜古迹。

examples.english: The Provençal countryside provided the inspiration for many artists.
examples.chinese: 普罗旺斯的乡村为许多艺术家提供了灵感。

centers.english: in or from the area away from towns or cities
centers.chinese: 在或来自远离城镇的地区

examples.english: It took us an hour to reach the farm house, driving along winding country roads.
examples.chinese: 我们沿着蜿蜒曲折的乡间道路行驶了一小时才到达农庄住宅。

examples.english: Old country churches are a big tourist attraction.
examples.chinese: 古老的乡村教堂对游客具有很大的吸引力。

examples.english: Brattleboro offers all the pleasures of a small country town.
examples.chinese: 布拉特博罗能提供一个乡村小镇的所有乐趣。

examples.english: Umbria is a wonderful region where life is simple and the people are decent country folk.
examples.chinese: 翁布里亚是个好地方，那里生活朴素，乡民正派。

examples.english: a rural development program
examples.chinese: 一项乡村开发计划

examples.english: There continues to be a shortage of jobs for young people in many rural areas.
examples.chinese: 在许多乡村地区，适合年轻人的工作一直短缺。

examples.english: The committee will investigate ways of recruiting doctors and nurses for rural communities.
examples.chinese: 该委员会将研究为农村社区招募医生、护士的方法。

examples.english: At that time, much of rural Ireland was desperately poor.
examples.chinese: 那时，爱尔兰大部分农村地区极度贫困。

examples.english: American tourists are fascinated by the village's rustic charm.
examples.chinese: 来自美国的游客被村子里的这种乡村风情深深地吸引住了。

examples.english: The rustic beauty of the countryside attracted many prominent citizens to Marin County.
examples.chinese: 乡村地区质朴的美吸引了许多知名人士来到马林县。

examples.english: The picture showed a typical rustic scene.
examples.chinese: 这幅画描绘一种典型的乡村风光。

centers.english: a town

examples.english: More and more people were seeking work in the growing towns.
examples.chinese: 越来越多的人在日益发展的市镇里寻找工作。

examples.english: The town is situated some 23 miles north of London.
examples.chinese: 该镇位于伦敦北面大约23英里处。

examples.english: a small town in the Midwest
examples.chinese: 美国中西部的一座小镇

examples.english: La Coruna is a pretty seaside town on the north-western tip of Spain.
examples.chinese: 拉科鲁尼亚是西班牙西北部顶端的一座美丽的海边城镇。

examples.english: Steyne Street was a narrow street in a shabby but respectable part of town.
examples.chinese: 斯坦尼大街是一条狭窄的街道，位于镇上虽然破旧却还算体面的区域。

examples.english: A large sign announced that we were entering the town of Knock.
examples.chinese: 一块大型的标牌说明我们正进入诺克镇。

examples.english: deep divisions in wealth between town and country
examples.chinese: 城乡居民之间财富的巨大差距

examples.english: You should visit San Francisco. It's a beautiful city.
examples.chinese: 你应该去游览一下圣弗朗西斯科，那是座漂亮的城市。

examples.english: The major industrial cities were getting increasingly overcrowded.
examples.chinese: 大型工业城市变得越来越拥挤了。

examples.english: I was alone in a big city in a new country.
examples.chinese: 我独自一人在一个陌生国家的大城市里。

examples.english: Leeds is a thriving, vibrant, and prosperous city.
examples.chinese: 利兹是一座欣欣向荣、充满活力、繁荣昌盛的城市。

examples.english: The city of Barcelona is famous for its wonderful architecture.
examples.chinese: 巴塞罗那市以其优秀的建筑闻名。

examples.english: the ancient city of Damascus
examples.chinese: 大马士革古城

examples.english: There are some nice little pubs in the villages round here.
examples.chinese: 这附近的村子里有些不错的小酒吧。

examples.english: She left her village in the north of Thailand and went to live in Bangkok.
examples.chinese: 她离开了泰国北部自己原来的村庄到曼谷去生活。

examples.english: She lived in a small settlement on the edge of the desert.
examples.chinese: 她住在沙漠边缘的一个小村落里。

examples.english: Settlements started to appear all along the river.
examples.chinese: 沿这条河开始到处出现了小村落。

examples.english: The tools were found in an early Iron Age settlement.
examples.chinese: 这些工具是在一个铁器时代的小村落里发现的。

centers.english: the centre of a town or city

examples.english: a charming little town with an unspoiled medieval centre
examples.chinese: 中心区中世纪风格未遭破坏的一座迷人的小镇

examples.english: I work in the centre of London, so I can easily go shopping after work.
examples.chinese: 我在伦敦市中心上班，因此下班后可以方便地去购物。

examples.english: A bomb went off in the city center and 19 people were killed.
examples.chinese: 一枚炸弹在市中心爆炸，有19个人遇难。

examples.english: She's gone into the town centre to do some shopping.
examples.chinese: 她去市中心购物了。

examples.english: She lives in a really beautiful apartment downtown.
examples.chinese: 她住在位于闹市区的一套很漂亮的公寓里。

examples.english: I have to go downtown later.
examples.chinese: 稍后我得到市中心去。

examples.english: The downtown was deserted that night.
examples.chinese: 那天晚上闹市区内空无一人。

examples.english: I suggest we meet somewhere in town and have lunch together.
examples.chinese: 我建议在镇中心某个地方碰头，一起吃午饭。

examples.english: He bought us tickets to the best show in town.
examples.chinese: 他为我们买了门票去看市中心最精彩的表演。

examples.english: I'm going into town. Do you want anything?
examples.chinese: 我要去市中心，你想买点什么吗？

examples.english: Can you give me a lift into town?
examples.chinese: 你能让我搭便车去市中心吗？

examples.english: policies aimed at revitalizing America's inner cities
examples.chinese: 旨在使美国旧城区更繁荣的政策

examples.english: Suburban styles of life are very different from those in the inner city.
examples.chinese: 市郊的生活方式和旧城区的生活方式大不相同。

examples.english: Crime is a big problem in inner-city areas.
examples.chinese: 犯罪活动是贫民区一个严重的问题。

examples.english: children from inner-city schools
examples.chinese: 来自贫民区学校的儿童

centers.english: the areas at the edge of a town or city

examples.english: I was born and brought up in a suburb of New York City.
examples.chinese: 我在纽约市的一处郊区出生和长大。

examples.english: More and more people are moving to the suburbs every year.
examples.chinese: 每年都有越来越多的人搬到近郊居住。

examples.english: All the social workers come in from their comfortable homes in the suburbs.
examples.chinese: 所有的社会福利工作者都来自市郊的小康家庭。

examples.english: They have just bought a house in Pacific Palisades, a wealthy suburb of Los Angeles.
examples.chinese: 他们刚在洛杉矶富裕的郊区帕西菲克·帕利塞兹买了幢房子。

examples.english: a typical suburban house
examples.chinese: 一幢标准的城郊住宅

examples.english: The Cité De Science is a futuristic complex in the Parisian outskirts.
examples.chinese: 科学城是巴黎市郊一幢未来主义风格的综合性建筑。

examples.english: His body was discovered on the city's outskirts three days later.
examples.chinese: 他的尸体三天后在市郊被发现。

examples.english: By 9 o'clock we reached the outskirts of Berlin.
examples.chinese: 到9点钟我们到达了柏林的市郊。

examples.english: There are plans to build a new shopping mall on the outskirts of town.
examples.chinese: 有计划要在市郊建造一座新的购物中心。

examples.english: an out-of-town shopping centre
examples.chinese: 城外的购物中心

examples.english: Town centre shops face a threat from large out-of-town developments which offer hundreds of shops under one roof.
examples.chinese: 市中心的商店面临来自市郊的大型新开发区的威胁，那里一幢建筑物内就可容纳好几百家商店。

examples.english: At that time, little was done to control the urban sprawl.
examples.chinese: 那时没有采取什么措施来控制城市向乡村的扩展。

examples.english: The natural habitats of Britain's wildlife have been ravaged by urban sprawl and pollution.
examples.chinese: 英国的野生生物的自然栖息地已经被都市扩展和污染破坏了。

centers.english: the town where you are from

examples.english: Sarajevo is my home town and I did not want to leave.
examples.chinese: 萨拉热窝是我的故乡，我不想离开。

examples.english: Johnson lived in Seattle for ten years before returning to his home town of Cody, Wyoming.
examples.chinese: 约翰逊在西雅图住了十年后回到了故乡怀俄明州的科迪。

examples.english: Her home, she said, was in Hong Kong, but she hadn't been there since she was a child.
examples.chinese: 她说她的故乡是在香港，但她从小时候起就不在那里了。

examples.english: I've lived in Madrid for many years, and it feels like home to me now.
examples.chinese: 我在马德里住了很多年，现在它给我的感觉就像家乡一样了。

centers.english: the biggest or most important town in a country or area
centers.chinese: 一国或一地区中最大或最重要的城镇

examples.english: Rome is one of the world's most beautiful capitals.
examples.chinese: 罗马是世界上最美丽的首都之一。

examples.english: What's the capital of Canada?
examples.chinese: 加拿大的首都叫什么？

examples.english: The tour includes a trip to Budapest, Hungary's capital city.
examples.chinese: 这次旅游包括匈牙利首都布达佩斯之行。

examples.english: Sacramento is the state capital of California.
examples.chinese: 萨克拉门托是加利福尼亚州的首府。

examples.english: After 1850 Paris grew quickly into a busy metropolis.
examples.chinese: 1850年以后，巴黎迅速发展成为一个繁忙的大都会。

examples.english: They drove quickly, leaving the immense metropolis behind them.
examples.chinese: 他们把车开得飞快，把那个大城市抛在了后面。

examples.english: Our aim is to make Sydney the musical metropolis of the world.
examples.chinese: 我们的目标是使悉尼成为世界的音乐大都会。

centers.english: relating to or in a town
centers.chinese: 与市镇有关的或在市镇内的

examples.english: The town council has proposed a new road building project.
examples.chinese: 市议会已经提出了修建新公路的方案。

examples.english: With better town planning, traffic problems could be avoided.
examples.chinese: 随着城镇规划更完善，交通问题可得以避免。

examples.english: A market is held daily in the town square.
examples.chinese: 在镇广场上每天都有集市。

examples.english: The city library cost over $15 million to build.
examples.chinese: 市图书馆的建造费用超过了1，500万美元。

examples.english: Residents blame city officials for poor housing conditions.
examples.chinese: 居民把恶劣的居住环境归启于市政官员。

examples.english: the city authorities
examples.chinese: 市政当局

examples.english: Beneath the city streets is a network of sewers.
examples.chinese: 城市的街道下面是一个污水管网络。

examples.english: City life is becoming increasingly dangerous.
examples.chinese: 城市生活变得越来越危险了。

examples.english: There is a village festival every year at the beginning of May.
examples.chinese: 每年5月初都有一个乡村节日。

examples.english: Has village life changed significantly in the last few years?
examples.chinese: 过去几年中乡村生活有很大的改变吗？

examples.english: We have a church, one pub and a village shop.
examples.chinese: 我们有一座教堂、一个酒吧和一个乡村小店。

examples.english: The problem of air pollution is especially serious in urban areas.
examples.chinese: 空气污染问题在市区格外严重。

examples.english: China's growing urban population
examples.chinese: 中国越来越多的城市人口

examples.english: post-war urban planning
examples.chinese: 战后的城市规划

examples.english: urban growth
examples.chinese: 都市的扩大

examples.english: Civic leaders cannot agree on what is best for the city.
examples.chinese: 对于怎样做才对这个城市最有利的问题，市政领导人不能取得一致意见。

examples.english: An important civic function is taking place in the city hall this evening.
examples.chinese: 今晚将在市政厅里举行一个重要的市政活动。

examples.english: Harlow Council has always been generous with civic funding for music and the arts.
examples.chinese: 哈洛区政务委员会对资助市里的音乐和美术事业总是很慷慨。

examples.english: It is the civil duty of every citizen to vote.
examples.chinese: 参加投票是每个市民的公民义务。

examples.english: Municipal elections will be held on April 12th.
examples.chinese: 市级选举将在4月12日举行。

examples.english: Not far from the town centre is the municipal park.
examples.chinese: 离市中心不远处有一座市立公园。

examples.english: The museum and other municipal buildings are threatened.
examples.chinese: 博物馆以及其他的市政大厦受到了威胁。

examples.english: Taylor worked in a dingy little office in downtown Chicago.
examples.chinese: 泰勒在芝加哥市中心一间昏暗的小办公室里上班。

examples.english: Many downtown department stores are moving out into the wealthier suburbs.
examples.chinese: 闹市区的许多百货公司都要搬到更富裕的郊区去。

examples.english: a downtown hotel
examples.chinese: 一家位于闹市区的旅馆

examples.english: Some workers can only afford homes outside metropolitan areas.
examples.chinese: 有些工人只住得起大城市以外地区的房子。

examples.english: the metropolitan authorities
examples.chinese: 城市当局

centers.english: not from your own country

examples.english: Can you speak a foreign language?
examples.chinese: 你会讲外语吗?

examples.english: Some of the hotels accept foreign currency.
examples.chinese: 有些旅馆接受外币。

examples.english: efforts to increase foreign investment
examples.chinese: 增加外来投资的种种努力

examples.english: The university has a large number of overseas students.
examples.chinese: 这所大学有大量的留学生。

examples.english: There has been an increase in overseas trade during the last year.
examples.chinese: 去年海外贸易有所增加。

examples.english: There's a shortage of medical staff, so a lot of the doctors here are from abroad.
examples.chinese: 医务人员短缺，所以这里的许多医生都来自国外。

examples.english: She seemed to receive a lot of mail from abroad.
examples.chinese: 她似乎收到许多来自国外的邮件。

examples.english: Listening to radio broadcasts from abroad is still a criminal offense in this country.
examples.chinese: 收听海外广播在这个国家仍然是犯罪行为。

centers.english: from a different country

examples.english: A lot of foreigners work here illegally.
examples.chinese: 许多外国人在这里非法打工。

examples.english: Saleem felt that people were suspicious of him because he was a foreigner.
examples.chinese: 沙利姆感觉到大家因为他是外国人而对他存有戒心。

examples.english: About 40 million foreigners visited the US last year.
examples.chinese: 去年约有4,000万外国人游访了美国。

examples.english: Some aliens may qualify for citizenship under the new law.
examples.chinese: 根据这项新法律，有些外国人可能有资格获取国籍。

examples.english: The law makes it easier to find and deport illegal aliens.
examples.chinese: 这项法律使发现并驱逐非法逗留的外国人更为容易。

examples.english: I was in Spain for over a year, but most of my friends were expatriates.
examples.chinese: 我在西班牙一年多了，但我的朋友大多是侨民。

examples.english: Schmidt was a German expatriate who had been living in Portugal since 1989.
examples.chinese: 施密特是个德国侨民，他自1989年起就一直住在葡萄牙。

examples.english: Several expatriate families have left the country since war broke out.
examples.chinese: 战争爆发以后，一些侨民家庭离开了那个国家。

centers.english: in or to a different country

examples.english: Katya will make her first trip abroad next month.
examples.chinese: 下个月卡提雅第一次要去国外了。

examples.english: Our daughter wants to study abroad for a year.
examples.chinese: 我们的女儿想去国外学习一年。

examples.english: Mr Harris is abroad on business this week.
examples.chinese: 哈里斯先生本周在国外公干。

examples.english: Much of the wood harvested in the northwest is shipped overseas.
examples.chinese: 西北地区砍伐的木材大部分都被船运至海外。

examples.english: Douglas often travelled overseas when he was in the army.
examples.chinese: 道格拉斯当兵时经常出国。

examples.english: The couple emigrated in 1987 and are back here on holiday to see friends and relatives.
examples.chinese: 这对夫妇于1987年移民到国外去了，趁假期回来探望亲戚朋友。

examples.english: My grandparents emigrated from Italy.
examples.chinese: 我的祖父母是从意大利移民来的。

examples.english: Our son and his wife, Jenny, emigrated to Australia in 1988.
examples.chinese: 我们的儿子和媳妇珍妮在1988年移民到澳洲去了。

centers.english: for everyone to use

examples.english: Could you tell me where the public telephones are?
examples.chinese: 你能告诉我公用电话在哪里吗？

examples.english: Is this a public beach?
examples.chinese: 这是公共沙滩吗?

examples.english: proposals to ban smoking in public places
examples.chinese: 在公共场所禁烟的提议

examples.english: They're always telling people to use public transport because there are too many cars on the roads.
examples.chinese: 他们一直倡导民众使用公共交通，因为马路上汽车太多了。

examples.english: You now have to pay to use the public toilets at the station.
examples.chinese: 现在在车站用公共厕所必须付费。

centers.english: owned or paid for by the government

examples.english: You can get the information from your local public library
examples.chinese: 你可以在当地公共图书馆查询该信息。

examples.english: We need to raise taxes to pay for better public healthcare.
examples.chinese: 我们得提高税收来为更好的公共医疗体系提供资金。

examples.english: garbage collection and other public services
examples.chinese: 收垃圾等公共服务

examples.english: There's been a big increase in public spending over the past three years.
examples.chinese: 过去三年里公共开支猛增。！

examples.english: I've worked in the public sector all my life, mainly in local government.
examples.chinese: 我在公共部门工作了一辈子，主要是在地方政府。

examples.english: public sector employees
examples.chinese: 公共部门雇员

examples.english: Thatcher privatized publicly owned industries like electricity and telecommunications.
examples.chinese: 撒切尔将电力、通信等国有工业私有化。

examples.english: The government has promised increased spending on the the state education system.
examples.chinese: 政府应允向公立教育制度投入更多的资金。

examples.english: China's state radio station
examples.chinese: 中国的国有广播电台

examples.english: Britain's state aid for industry generally falls far short of the sums seen in other countries.
examples.chinese: 与其他国家比较，英国对工业的国家援助通常都远远不够。

examples.english: How much government money is to be poured into this program?
examples.chinese: 政府打算向该计划投入多少资金?

examples.english: The camps have been attacked several times by government forces.
examples.chinese: 该营地已遭到政府军队数次袭击。

examples.english: The industry secretary has just announced a government initiative to address the problem.
examples.chinese: 工业部长刚刚宣布了政府解决这个问题的计划。

examples.english: Federal funding for the project was cut last year
examples.chinese: 去年该项目的联邦资金投入削减了。

examples.english: federal agencies
examples.chinese: 联邦政府部门

examples.english: the Federal Bureau of Investigation
examples.chinese: 联邦调查局

examples.english: federally funded programs
examples.chinese: 联邦专款计划

examples.english: The mines were nationalized by the Labour Party.
examples.chinese: 这些煤矿被工党收归国有。

examples.english: Castro speeded up his land reforms and began to nationalize foreign holdings in Cuba.
examples.chinese: 卡斯特罗加速他的土地改革，并着手将古巴的外国拥有的财产收归国有。

examples.english: The government is trying to sell off as many nationalized industries as it can.
examples.chinese: 该政府在竭力出售国有工业。

centers.english: when a lot of people can see you or know about what is happening
centers.chinese: 许多人可以看见你或知道发生的事

examples.english: Most people feel nervous about speaking in public.
examples.chinese: 大多数人在公开场合发言时都感到紧张。

examples.english: Her husband was always nice to her in public, but treated her badly at home.
examples.chinese: 她的丈夫在公开场合总对她殷殷勤勤，但在家却是恶声恶气的。

examples.english: The Prince has not appeared in public since the announcement of his divorce.
examples.chinese: 王子宣布离婚后，就一直没在公开场合出现。

examples.english: He was put in prison after publicly criticizing the military government.
examples.chinese: 他公开批评军政府，之后便被投入大牢。

examples.english: They plan to announce their engagement publicly in the New Year.
examples.chinese: 他们打算在新年里公开宣布订婚。

examples.english: It is one of the few countries where they still hold public executions.
examples.chinese: 这是少数几个仍旧公开处决犯人的国家之一。

examples.english: In a public statement, Jackson and his wife announced their intention to get divorced.
examples.chinese: 在一份公开声明中，杰克逊与妻子宣布他们打算离婚。

examples.english: Jeff was obviously calling from a public place.
examples.chinese: 显然杰夫是从公共场所打电话来的。

examples.english: Can we go somewhere quieter? This place is a bit public.
examples.chinese: 我们去安静点的地方好吗？这地方有点人多眼杂。

examples.english: He was the first person to talk openly on TV about having AIDS.
examples.chinese: 他是第一个上电视公开说自己患了艾滋病的人。

examples.english: Drugs are sold openly on the city streets.
examples.chinese: 毒品公然在城市的大街上售卖。

examples.english: The changes to borders were officially announced in the European Parliament.
examples.chinese: 边界变化在欧洲议会上正式宣布。

examples.english: The details of the reforms are to be released officially next month.
examples.chinese: 改革的详细情况将在下个月正式公布。

examples.english: thirty square miles of woodland that has been officially designated an Area of Outstanding Natural Beauty
examples.chinese: 被正式划定为自然美景区的30平方英里林地

centers.english: the place where crimes or legal problems are judged
centers.chinese: 罪案或法律问题审理之场所

examples.english: A group of photographers and reporters gathered outside the court.
examples.chinese: 一群摄影师和记者聚集在法院门外。

examples.english: the United States Supreme Court
examples.chinese: 美国最高法院

expressions.text: appear in court/appear before a court

examples.english: Benton appeared in court yesterday on three charges of assault.
examples.chinese: 本顿面临三项袭击指控，昨日出庭受审。

examples.english: She says she will go to court to try to prove that she was unfairly dismissed from her job.
examples.chinese: 她声称自己会告到法院，以证明开除她是不公平的。

examples.english: A fight broke out in a London courtroom yesterday.
examples.chinese: 昨天，伦敦一个法庭上爆发斗殴。

examples.english: Roberts told a packed courtroom of the events that occurred on the night of the murder.
examples.chinese: 罗伯茨向挤满法庭的人讲述凶杀案那夜发生的事。

centers.english: the parts of the legal process

examples.english: The trial is due to take place next month at Wood Green Crown Court.
examples.chinese: 该审判安排在下个月于伍德格林刑事法庭进行。

examples.english: A man from Seattle is on trial for the murder.
examples.chinese: 一名来自西雅图的男子因谋杀而受审。

examples.english: A man was due to go on trial at Liverpool Crown Court later today accused of murdering his wife.
examples.chinese: 一名男子被控杀妻，今天晚些时候审判将在利物浦刑事法庭展开。

examples.english: Drake is in a federal prison in Houston, awaiting trial on charges of cocaine trafficking.
examples.chinese: 德雷克被关押在休斯顿联邦监狱，因贩卖可卡因而候审。

examples.english: Perelli faces trial later in the year on corruption and perjury charges.
examples.chinese: 今年晚些时候，佩雷利因受贿和作伪证面临审判。

examples.english: On Tuesday, a judge rejected requests to televise the murder trial of Robert Caine.
examples.chinese: 星期二，一位法官驳回了对罗伯特·凯恩杀人案审判电视直播的请求。

examples.english: They lost their case in the High Court and had to pay damages.
examples.chinese: 他们在高等法院败诉，必须支付赔偿金。

examples.english: Mathers called it the worst multiple murder case in the city's history.
examples.chinese: 马瑟斯称这是该市历史上最严重的连环杀人案。

examples.english: Criminal charges were filed in October against Sorvino by the District Attorney's office.
examples.chinese: 10月，地区检察官办公室对索尔维诺提出刑事指控。

examples.english: On Tuesday, the police officially filed charges against Jeffers.
examples.chinese: 星期二，警方正式对杰弗斯提出指控。

examples.english: San Francisco police have arrested a 39-year-old man on murder charges.
examples.chinese: 旧金山警方已逮捕了一名39岁男子，并控以谋杀罪。

examples.english: Prosecutors believe they have enough evidence to convict Smith.
examples.chinese: 检察官认为他们有足够证据将史密斯定罪。

examples.english: The government's case was based on evidence gathered over a two-year investigation.
examples.chinese: 该政府依据两年调查收集的证据提出起诉。

examples.english: The evidence proves clearly and beyond a reasonable doubt that the defendant is guilty.
examples.chinese: 证据明显地证明，被告毫无疑问是有罪的。

examples.english: The most important piece of evidence, the murder weapon, has not been found.
examples.chinese: 最重要的证据—凶器尚未找到。

examples.english: His former girlfriend was called to give evidence.
examples.chinese: 他的前女友被传来作证。

examples.english: Husbands and wives cannot be forced to give evidence against each other.
examples.chinese: 配偶不能被迫作出于对方不利的证词。

examples.english: The jury's not guilty verdict was criticized all over the country.
examples.chinese: 陪审团无罪的裁定受到全国民众的批评。

examples.english: Jurors were unable to reach a verdict after deliberating two hours Friday afternoon.
examples.chinese: 星期五下午，陪审员讨论了两个小时后，仍无法作出裁决。

examples.english: The judge will hand down a verdict in January, the newspaper reported.
examples.chinese: 该报报道说，1月份法官将会公布裁决。

examples.english: Neale is finishing a three-month sentence for petty theft.
examples.chinese: 尼尔因轻微偷窃被判三个月徒刑，正在服刑。

examples.english: If convicted of the charges against him, Blackburn could receive a maximum sentence of 30 years.
examples.chinese: 如果被裁定有罪，布莱克本将被判最高30年的徒刑。

examples.english: Judge Evans will pass sentence on the three men tomorrow.
examples.chinese: 埃文斯法官明天将对那三名男子作出宣判。

examples.english: Croy is currently serving a life sentence for the 1992 rape and murder of an Iowa woman.
examples.chinese: 克罗伊因1992年奸杀一名艾奥瓦州妇女，眼下正在服无期徒刑。

examples.english: Richardson was convicted of murder and given a death sentence.
examples.chinese: 理查森被裁定谋杀罪成立，判处死刑。

centers.english: the people in the legal process

examples.english: Everyone stood up as the judge entered the courtroom.
examples.chinese: 法官进入法庭时，全体起立。

examples.english: Judge Butler gave the defendant a six-month jail sentence.
examples.chinese: 巴特勒法官判被告监禁六个月。

examples.english: The judge advised the governor that the law violated the First Amendment rights of teachers.
examples.chinese: 法官告知州长该法律违背了宪法第一修正案赋予教师的权利。

examples.english: The jury was made up of seven women and five men.
examples.chinese: 陪审团由七女五男组成。

examples.english: Have you ever been on a jury?
examples.chinese: 你担任过陪审员吗?

examples.english: The jury awarded Hayes $3.5 million in damages.
examples.chinese: 陪审团判给海斯350万美元赔偿金。

examples.english: I have been called for jury duty twice.
examples.chinese: 我已两次被传召担任陪审员。

examples.english: Broderick's first trial last year ended in a hung jury.
examples.chinese: 去年，布罗德里克的第一次审判因陪审团意见分歧作不出决定而告终。

examples.english: Are people with criminal records allowed to sit on a jury?
examples.chinese: 有犯罪记录的人能担任陪审员吗？

examples.english: You have to study for a long time to become a lawyer.
examples.chinese: 当律师必须学习很长时间。

examples.english: He refused to answer any questions until his lawyer came.
examples.chinese: 在律师到达之前，他拒绝回答任何问题。

examples.english: Defense lawyer Charles Grieshammer said he was not surprised by the verdict.
examples.chinese: 辩护律师查尔斯·格里沙默尔称他对该判决不感到惊奇。

examples.english: The defendant pleaded not guilty.
examples.chinese: 被告不认罪。

examples.english: According to the defendant, the heroin was destined for the New York City area.
examples.chinese: 根据被告所述，那批海洛因运往纽约市地区。

examples.english: The accused is being held in the Pelham County Jail on charges of assault and battery.
examples.chinese: 被告因被控袭击和殴打正被拘禁在佩勒姆县监狱。

examples.english: According to the sixth amendment, the accused has the right to a fair and public trial.
examples.chinese: 根据第六条修正案，被告有权得到公正、公开的审判。

examples.english: The defence plans to call only one witness to testify.
examples.chinese: 辩护律师计划只传一名证人作证。

examples.english: Today, the defence makes its final presentation to the jury.
examples.chinese: 今天，辩护律师向陪审团作结案陈词。

examples.english: Peres said the defense team would appeal the sentencing by Judge Bernardo Tirado.
examples.chinese: 佩雷斯称辩护律师团将对贝尔纳多·蒂拉多法官作出的判决提出上诉。

examples.english: The prosecution's first witness is expected to be one of the defendant's co-workers.
examples.chinese: 控方律师的第一位证人应该是被告的一位同事。

examples.english: Speaking for the prosecution, Lipscomb said that both men should go to prison for the rest of their lives.
examples.chinese: 利普斯科姆代表控方称，那两名男子该在监狱里度过余生。

examples.english: Police have appealed for witnesses to come forward.
examples.chinese: 警方已呼吁证人站出来。

examples.english: The witness was asked to identify the defendant in the courtroom.
examples.chinese: 证人被要求在法庭上指认被告。

examples.english: The congressman was called as a witness for the prosecution today.
examples.chinese: 今天，这位国会议员被传来为控方作证。

centers.english: to bring someone to court to be judged

examples.english: Shoplifters will be prosecuted.
examples.chinese: 在商店偷东西的人将被起诉。

examples.english: The Prime Minister pledged to do everything possible to prosecute those who carried out the bombing.
examples.chinese: 总理保证要尽一切可能把爆炸案的罪犯绳之以法。

examples.english: Baldwin was prosecuted in 1998 for distributing child pornography online.
examples.chinese: 1998年鲍德温因在网上散布儿童色情作品而受到起诉。

examples.english: Last year, Napolitano's office prosecuted 115 child abuse cases, the highest number in the nation.
examples.chinese: 去年，纳波利塔诺的办公室起诉了115宗虐待儿童的案件，数量达到全国之冠。

examples.english: Failure to pay the tax may result in prosecution and imprisonment.
examples.chinese: 不缴税可能会遭起诉、被判入狱。

examples.english: A month after the murder, a man was arrested by police and put on trial.
examples.chinese: 凶案发生一个月后，一名男子遭警方逮捕并被送上法庭受审。

examples.english: The couple were put on trial for fraud and found guilty.
examples.chinese: 夫妇俩因诈骗被送上法庭，被判有罪。

centers.english: to be judged in a court of law

examples.english: The suspect will be tried within the next few weeks.
examples.chinese: 嫌犯将在未来几周内受审。

examples.english: Patterson is being tried for the murder of a 30-year-old Oakland hairdresser.
examples.chinese: 帕滕森因谋杀一名30岁的奥克兰发型师而正在受审。

examples.english: The two women are being tried for drug smuggling.
examples.chinese: 那两名女子因走私毒品正在受审。

examples.english: Three men are now on trial after a series of terrorist attacks.
examples.chinese: 一系列恐怖袭击后，三名男子眼下正在受审。

examples.english: The accused was extradited to Miami earlier this year, and is currently on trial there.
examples.chinese: 今年早些时候，被告被引渡回迈阿密，目前正在受审。

examples.english: Three men are on trial for illegally smuggling tropical birds into the country.
examples.chinese: 三名男子因将热带鸟类走私进该国而受审。

examples.english: The judge ruled that Pinochet was too ill to stand trial in Spain.
examples.chinese: 法官裁定皮诺切特病得很重，无法在西班牙接受审判。

examples.english: Brady stood trial for the killings late last year.
examples.chinese: 去年晚些时候，布雷迪因这几宗谋杀案而受审。

examples.english: An employee of the bank is due to stand trial on embezzlement charges in February.
examples.chinese: 2月份，该银行一名雇员因被控侵吞公款而将接受审判。

centers.english: when a legal case is judged in court

examples.english: The case won't come to trial until next summer.
examples.chinese: 这个案子要到明年夏天才提交法庭审理。

examples.english: The British press is not permitted to comment on a case until it comes to trial.
examples.chinese: 案件审理之前，英国媒体不得加以评论。

examples.english: He thinks his case will come before the court within the next few months.
examples.chinese: 他认为，接下来的几个月中，他的案件将得到审理。

examples.english: The case was brought before the court by farmer Brad Morgan.
examples.chinese: 该案件由农夫布拉德·摩根向法院提出。

examples.english: Last year 2,047 cases were heard in the Hillbrow small claims court.
examples.chinese: 去年，希尔布劳的小额索赔法庭审理了2,047宗案件。

examples.english: Yesterday counsel for both parties agreed the case should be heard on March 12.
examples.chinese: 昨天，双方的律师同意于3月12日审理该案。

centers.english: a rule

examples.english: No one's allowed to ride with the driver. That's a company rule.
examples.chinese: 任何人都不许搭司机的便车，那是公司的规定。

examples.english: It says in the rules that every child has to wear school uniform.
examples.chinese: 校规中规定每个孩子都必须穿校服。

examples.english: It is strictly against the rules for athletes to take drugs.
examples.chinese: 运动员服用违禁药物是严重违反规定的行为。

examples.english: I have no sympathy for Jonson. He broke the rules and got caught, that's all.
examples.chinese: 我一点都不同情琼森，他违反规定被抓住了，就这样。

examples.english: There have been some changes in the rules governing the use of safety equipment.
examples.chinese: 如何使用安全设备的规定已有所变动。

examples.english: These are just guidelines, not hard and fast rules.
examples.chinese: 这些还只是准则，不是铁定的规章。

examples.english: Under the new regulations, coach drivers must take a break every four hours.
examples.chinese: 按新规定，长途汽车驾驶员必须每四小时休息一下。

examples.english: The building regulations are very strict about the materials you can use.
examples.chinese: 建筑条例对材料的使用规定非常严格。

examples.english: Safety regulations affecting dangerous fluids must be scrupulously observed.
examples.chinese: 有关危险液体的安全条例必须严格遵守。

examples.english: All cars sold in Germany must conform to the regulations laid down by the Federal Road Safety Board.
examples.chinese: 所有在德国销售的汽车必须符合联邦道路安全委员会制定的条例。

examples.english: Anyone who takes milk from an unhealthy cow will be contravening public health regulations.
examples.chinese: 任何人从病牛身上取奶均违反公共卫生条例。

examples.english: There are restrictions on what you can bring into the country. Alcohol, for example, is totally forbidden.
examples.chinese: 该国对可携带入境的东西是有限制的，比如说酒是绝对禁止的。

examples.english: The restrictions imposed by the censors make objective reporting of news impossible.
examples.chinese: 审查人员制定的限制使新闻报道变得不可能客观。

examples.english: Congress voted to lift trade restrictions against Iran.
examples.chinese: 国会投票通过取消对伊朗的贸易限制。

examples.english: For a while they tried using price restrictions as a way of controlling inflation.
examples.chinese: 有一阵子他们试着限制价格以控制通货膨胀。

examples.english: FIFA is the organization that runs world football and decides whether any of the laws should be changed.
examples.chinese: 国际足球联合会是个安排全世界的足球比赛并决定比赛规则是否应该修改的组织。

examples.english: the laws of cricket
examples.chinese: 板球的规则

examples.english: He will be dealt with under our code of discipline.
examples.chinese: 我们将按纪律规则处罚他。

examples.english: A new code of practice governing the advertising of tobacco products is being introduced.
examples.chinese: 一条新的有关烟草广告的行业规则已经实施。

examples.english: Hobbs had blatantly ignored the legal profession's code of conduct.
examples.chinese: 霍布斯公然无视法律行业的行为守则。

examples.english: people who follow some strict religious code
examples.chinese: 严格遵守宗教准则的人

examples.english: There were so many petty rules and regulations that some companies stopped trying to export their products.
examples.chinese: 琐碎的规章制度那么多，有些公司干脆就不去出口自己的产品了。

centers.english: rules of acceptable behaviour

examples.english: He is a flamboyant millionaire who ignores social conventions.
examples.chinese: 他是个派头十足、无视社会惯例的百万富翁。

examples.english: She shocked her neighbours by ignoring every convention of respectable society.
examples.chinese: 她无视上流社会的任何习俗，令邻居们惊愕不已。

examples.english: It is a matter of convention that male business people usually wear suits.
examples.chinese: 男性商人一般穿成套西装，这是个习惯问题。

examples.english: For the next four years they defied convention by living as man and wife when they were not.
examples.chinese: 接下来的四年，他们无视社会规范，虽不是夫妻却以夫妻身份共同生活。

examples.english: According to protocol, he was to arrive at the meeting exactly five minutes early.
examples.chinese: 按礼节他应该提早正好五分钟到会。

examples.english: Touching the Queen was a breach of royal protocol.
examples.chinese: 触碰女王是违反皇家礼仪的。

examples.english: Etiquette is especially important on occasions such as weddings and funerals.
examples.chinese: 在婚礼、葬礼等场合中，礼仪尤其重要。

examples.english: It was considered a breach of etiquette to refuse an invitation.
examples.chinese: 拒绝邀请被视为一种违反礼节的行为。

examples.english: Professional etiquette dictates that judges should not express their opinions about a case in public.
examples.chinese: 行规规定法官不应该公开发表自己对某一案件的看法。

examples.english: It was an unwritten law of the Mafia that nobody should talk to the police.
examples.chinese: 黑手党有不成文的规定，就是任何人都不许跟警察交谈。

examples.english: Jobs like this never go to women -- it just seems to be one of those unwritten laws of business.
examples.chinese: 这种工作永远也不会给妇女做—这就好像是商界的一条不成文的规定。

examples.english: Sending an angry e-mail in capital letters breaks the rules of netiquette.
examples.chinese: 用全大写字母发出语调气愤的电子邮件违反了网上礼节。

centers.english: the people who govern a country

expressions.gram: countable noun with singular or plural verb in British English

examples.english: The government has promised to cut taxes.
examples.chinese: 政府已承诺减税。

examples.english: Unemployment is a problem that many Western governments continue to face.
examples.chinese: 失业是许多西方政府继续要面对的一个问题。

examples.english: the city government of Los Angeles
examples.chinese: 洛杉矶市政府

examples.english: The newspaper, La Prensa, was shut down for nearly two years because of its criticism of government policies.
examples.chinese: 《新闻报》这份报纸因为批评政府的政策被关闭了将近两年。

examples.english: The French government strongly condemned the killings.
examples.chinese: 法国政府强烈谴责这些杀害行为。

examples.english: The local government has been unable to meet the demand for affordable housing.
examples.chinese: 当地政府无法满足民众对于负担得起的住房的需求。

examples.english: It has been difficult for the central government to conduct elections in remote areas.
examples.chinese: 中央政府在偏远地区难以实行选举。

examples.english: The new administration has been strongly criticized for its handling of the affair.
examples.chinese: 新政府在这件事情的处理上受到了强烈的批评。

examples.english: The administration also proposed $600 million in tax breaks for small businesses.
examples.chinese: 政府还提议给小企业减税六亿美元。

examples.english: The Eisenhower administration refused to take military action in Vietnam.
examples.chinese: 艾森豪威尔政府拒绝对越南采取军事行动。

examples.english: The country is facing famine, and the authorities are doing little to prevent it.
examples.chinese: 国家面临着饥荒，而当局却几乎不采取任何预防措施。

examples.english: The South African authorities arrested Mandela in August 1962.
examples.chinese: 1962年8月，南非当局逮捕了曼德拉。

examples.english: On January 12, the local authorities decided that the strike had gone on long enough.
examples.chinese: 1月12日，地方当局作出决定，认为这次罢工时间已经够长了。

examples.english: Federal authorities said that no one has claimed responsibility for the bombing as of yet.
examples.chinese: 联邦当局说至今还无人声称对这次爆炸事件负责。

examples.english: At that time, the state controlled nearly every aspect of people's lives.
examples.chinese: 那个时候，国家几乎控制了人民生活的各个方面。

examples.english: The programs are funded by the state.
examples.chinese: 这些计划由政府出资。

examples.english: CBC, the state-run broadcasting company
examples.chinese: 加拿大广播公司，国营的广播公司

examples.english: The powers that be do not seem interested in solving the city's transportation problems.
examples.chinese: 那些掌权的好像无意去解决城市的交通问题。

examples.english: The military regime refused to recognize the elections.
examples.chinese: 军政府拒绝承认这些选举。

examples.english: The US supported several right-wing regimes in central America.
examples.chinese: 美国支持中美洲的几个右翼政权。

centers.english: the most powerful people in a government
centers.chinese: 在政府中权力最大的人

examples.english: He will challenge Sinclair for the leadership of the Liberal Party.
examples.chinese: 他将挑战辛克莱在自由党中的领导地位。

examples.english: The collapse of European communism in the late 1980s shocked the Chinese leadership.
examples.chinese: 经济崩溃震惊了领导层。

examples.english: Under the leadership of the Conservative Party, the gap between the rich and the poor widened considerably.
examples.chinese: 在保守党的领导之下，贫富差距显著加大。

expressions.gram: countable noun with singular or plural verb in British English

examples.english: The Prime Minister has offered Stroud a position in the cabinet.
examples.chinese: 首相请斯特劳德加入内阁。

examples.english: The spy scandal involved two cabinet ministers and several civil servants.
examples.chinese: 间谍丑闻牵涉到两位内阁成员和几名公务员。

examples.english: The cabinet meeting broke up after four-and-a-half hours.
examples.chinese: 内阁会议开了四个半小时之后不欢而散。

examples.english: In theory, the civil service is the non-political arm of the executive.
examples.chinese: 从理论上讲，文职部门是政府行政机关的非政治性职能部门。

examples.english: Power is shared between three main branches of government: the executive, the legislative, and the judiciary.
examples.chinese: 政府的三个主要部门共享权力，即行政机关、立法机关和司法机关。

centers.english: the people who make the country's laws

examples.english: During his 28 years in Parliament, the 59-year-old Chuan has been untainted by corruption.
examples.chinese: 在议会供职的28年里，59岁的川没有沾上一点腐败风气。

examples.english: New budget measures were approved Tuesday by the Russian parliament.
examples.chinese: 新的预算案于星期二得到了俄罗斯议会的批准。

examples.english: Elections for the European parliament are set for late next year.
examples.chinese: 欧洲议会的选举定于明年稍后时候进行。

examples.english: Bradley was elected to the Senate in 1978.
examples.chinese: 布拉德利于1978年当选，进了参议院。

examples.english: If approved by the Senate, the bill would make it harder to purchase handguns.
examples.chinese: 这个议案如果得到参议院通过，购买手枪就会更加困难。

examples.english: Hirsch doubts Congress will accept the president's proposal.
examples.chinese: 赫希怀疑国会是否会接受总统的提议。

examples.english: Congress rejected a measure that would make it easier for low-income workers to get health insurance.
examples.chinese: 国会拒绝了可方便低收入工人获得健康保险的一项议案。

centers.english: a government that controls people's lives too much
centers.chinese: 对人民的生活控制得太多的政府

examples.english: In 1971, the country's 10 year military dictatorship came to an end.
examples.chinese: 1971年，统治该国达十年之久的军事独裁政府垮台了。

examples.english: Ethiopia's dictatorship was toppled by Eritrean and Ethiopian rebels.
examples.chinese: 埃塞俄比亚的独裁政府被厄立特里亚和埃塞俄比亚的反叛分子颠覆了。

examples.english: How do we explain the rise in European dictatorship in the 1930s?
examples.chinese: 我们如何解释20世纪30年代欧洲独裁统治的兴起？

examples.english: The country is a police state and the media is controlled by the government.
examples.chinese: 这是一个警察国家，媒体由政府控制。

examples.english: ‘Do you want a free society or a police state?’ Stark asked the crowd of about 2,000 people.
examples.chinese: “你们要的是一个自由社会还是警察国家？”斯塔克问这个有2,000人左右的人群。

examples.english: The Home Secretary denied that the introduction of identity cards would lead to a police state.
examples.chinese: 内政大臣否认推行身份证会使国家变成一个警察国家。

examples.english: All the opponents of the junta have been murdered or imprisoned.
examples.chinese: 军政府的所有反对者不是遭到谋杀就是被监禁了起来。

examples.english: The country was ruled by a military junta from 1974 until 1982.
examples.chinese: 这个国家从1974年到1982年由一个军政府统治。

examples.english: Any political system that refuses to allow people to protest becomes a tyranny.
examples.chinese: 不允许人民提出抗议的任何政治制度都会变成暴政统治。

examples.english: the extraordinary struggle against tyranny in South Africa
examples.chinese: 反对南非暴政的不平凡的斗争

examples.english: A totalitarian state must maintain complete control of the press.
examples.chinese: 极权国家必须完全控制新闻。

examples.english: The country held its first elections after 40 years of totalitarian rule.
examples.chinese: 这个国家经过40年的极权统治后举行了第一次选举。

examples.english: The minister called the secret police ‘a product and a tool of the old totalitarian regime’.
examples.chinese: 部长称秘密警察是“旧的极权政府的产物和工具”。

examples.english: A poor, uneducated people does not have the willpower or knowledge to challenge an oppressive government.
examples.chinese: 一个贫穷、缺少教育的民族没有意志，也不知道如何去反抗一个暴虐的政府。

centers.english: different systems of government

examples.english: In 1974, democracy returned to Greece after seven years of military rule.
examples.chinese: 1974年，希腊在经历了七年的军事统治之后，又重新获得了民主。

examples.english: Adolfo Suarez supervised Spain's transition to democracy in the 1970s.
examples.chinese: 20世纪70年代，阿道夫·苏亚雷斯监督了西班牙向民主的过渡。

examples.english: Costa Rica is a democracy.
examples.chinese: 哥斯达黎加是一个民主国家。

examples.english: the democracies of Western Europe
examples.chinese: 西欧的民主国家

examples.english: Costa Rica is often mentioned as an example of what countries can accomplish under stable, democratic governments.
examples.chinese: 说到一个国家在稳定、民主的政府领导之下可以成就多少事业，经常都是拿哥斯达黎加作为例子。

examples.english: The Communist Party was voted out of power in the nation's first democratic elections in decades.
examples.chinese: 在这个国家数十年以来的第一次民主选举中，该党落选下了台。

examples.english: Open, free, and fair elections are the most basic element of the democratic process.
examples.chinese: 公开、自由和公平的选举是民主进程中最基本的要素。

examples.english: the French Republic
examples.chinese: 法兰西共和国

examples.english: Moldavia, a republic of more than 4 million people, borders Romania.
examples.chinese: 摩尔达维亚，一个有四百多万人口的共和国，与罗马尼亚接壤。

examples.english: the People's Republic of China
examples.chinese: 中华人民共和国

examples.english: Many people in Britain think the country no longer needs a monarchy.
examples.chinese: 英国有许多人认为英国不再需要君主制了。

examples.english: The US has close ties with the Saudi monarchy.
examples.chinese: 美国与沙特王族关系密切。

examples.english: At that time, Nepal was transformed from an absolute monarchy into a multi-party democracy.
examples.chinese: 当时，尼泊尔由一个专制的君主国转型为一个多党的民主国家。

centers.english: part of a government that deals with health, education etc
centers.chinese: 处理卫生、教育等事务的政府部门

examples.english: Ellison is now head of the Department of Education.
examples.chinese: 埃利森现在是教育部长。

examples.english: At that time, Robert Kennedy was head of the Justice Department.
examples.chinese: 当时，罗伯特·肯尼迪是司法部长。

centers.english: to govern a country

examples.english: The former Chancellor questioned the Prime Minister's ability to govern.
examples.chinese: 这位前财政大臣对首相的治国能力提出了质疑。

examples.english: The PRI party has governed the country for more than seventy years.
examples.chinese: 革命制度党统治这个国家有七十多年了。

examples.english: The governing party controls two-thirds of the parliament.
examples.chinese: 执政党控制了议会的三分之二。

examples.english: Who's running this country, the government or the trade unions?
examples.chinese: 这个国家由谁控制，政府还是工会？

examples.english: The revolutionary council ran the country until democratic elections were held.
examples.chinese: 举行民主选举之前革命委员会控制着这个国家。

examples.english: The country is being run by an interim prime minister, Jean-Claude Cousin.
examples.chinese: 该国正由临时首相琼一克劳德·卡曾管理。

examples.english: Marcos ruled the Philippines for 20 years.
examples.chinese: 马科斯统治了菲律宾20年。

examples.english: India was ruled by the British for a very long time.
examples.chinese: 印度被英国统治了很长时间。

examples.english: For many years Algeria was under French rule.
examples.chinese: 阿尔及利亚被法国统治了多年。

examples.english: Castro has been in power for more than 30 years.
examples.chinese: 卡斯特罗已经执政三十多年了。

examples.english: Taxes were higher when the Democrats were in power.
examples.chinese: 民主党执政的时候赋税高一些。

examples.english: The Liberal Democrats have been in government for five years now.
examples.chinese: 自由民主党现在已经执政五年了。

examples.english: He thought it unlikely that the Republican party would be in government for much longer.
examples.chinese: 他认为共和党不大可能还会执政很久。

examples.english: Jemison had previously held office as Minister of Education.
examples.chinese: 杰米森早前曾担任过教育部长。

examples.english: In Mexico, the president holds office for a fixed term of six years.
examples.chinese: 在墨西哥，总统任职是固定的六年一届。

examples.english: People convicted of certain criminal offenses are not allowed to hold office.
examples.chinese: 被判犯了某些刑事罪的人不可以担任官职。

centers.english: the way a country is governed

examples.english: Having a popular leader does not guarantee good government.
examples.chinese: 得民心的领导人并不能保证有好的治国之道。

examples.english: The current Liberal Party has no actual experience of government.
examples.chinese: 现任自由党没有实际的治国经验。

examples.english: After years of corrupt government, people are tired of politics.
examples.chinese: 政府长期腐败，人们对政治感到厌倦了。

examples.english: The Republicans were elected by campaigning against big government and high taxes.
examples.chinese: 共和党是通过发起反对大政府和高税收而当选的。

centers.english: official

examples.english: What's the government's official policy on drugs education in schools?
examples.chinese: 对于学校在毒品方面的教育，政府有什么正式的政策?

examples.english: You have to get official permission for building in a conservation area.
examples.chinese: 在自然保护区建屋必须取得官方许可。

examples.english: Most of the official records of the case were destroyed in a fire in 1965.
examples.chinese: 这宗案件的大部分正式记录都在1965年的一场火灾中烧毁了。

examples.english: The official procedure for obtaining a visa can turn into a bureaucratic nightmare.
examples.chinese: 申请签证的正式手续有时就像一场官僚噩梦。

examples.english: The newspaper claims she spent over £50,000 on an official trip to Australia.
examples.chinese: 报上称，在一次官方组织的澳大利亚之行中，她花掉了五万多英镑。

examples.english: The official explanation for the man's death was suicide.
examples.chinese: 官方的说法是那人死于自杀。

examples.english: In July 2001 it was officially announced that the factory was to close.
examples.chinese: 2001年7月，工厂正式宣布关闭。

examples.english: Plans for the new shopping mall are yet to be officially approved.
examples.chinese: 新购物中心的建造计划尚未取得正式批准。

examples.english: The need for greater protection for wildlife habitats is not always officially recognized.
examples.chinese: 野生生物的生活环境需要得到更大的保护，但是这并非总能得到官方的认可。

examples.english: A formal agreement between the two countries was signed in 1999.
examples.chinese: 1999年，两国签署了一份正式协议。

examples.english: Fifteen formal complaints have been made about the hospital in the past year.
examples.chinese: 过去一年里有十五起对这家医院的正式投诉。

examples.english: Her lawyers have made a formal request that she be allowed to stay in the country until her husband's trial.
examples.chinese: 她的律师已提出正式要求，允许她留在国内等到丈夫受审完毕。

examples.english: A man has been arrested, but has not yet been formally charged.
examples.chinese: 一名男子已经被拘捕，但是尚未被正式起诉。

examples.english: The policy was formally abandoned by the government last year.
examples.chinese: 这项政策去年已被政府正式废止。

examples.english: The regime is not formally recognized by the UN.
examples.chinese: 这个政权没有得到联合国的正式承认。

examples.english: Check that you have the authorized version of the software.
examples.chinese: 检查一下你的软件是否有正式授权。

examples.english: We will send round one of our authorized representatives to discuss the purchase with you.
examples.chinese: 我们会委派一名有我们授权的代表和你洽谈购货事宜。

examples.english: Access is only given to authorized personnel.
examples.chinese: 未经授权的人士不得进入。

examples.english: Mr Senator, will you now confirm on the record that none of these rumors are true?
examples.chinese: 参议员先生，你现在可以公开证实这些传闻都不是真的吗？

expressions.text: be on record as saying/stating etc

examples.english: She's on record as saying that she would resign if the vote went against her.
examples.chinese: 她公开说过，如果投票结果对她不利，她就会辞职。

examples.english: Privately, many MPs are critical of the policy, but none is willing to go on the record.
examples.chinese: 许多议员私下里都批评这项政策，但没有人愿意公开说出来。

centers.english: to make something official

examples.english: The new law is intended to further formalize the process of adopting children from overseas.
examples.chinese: 这条新的法规目的是为了进一步明确收养外国儿童的手续。

examples.english: a charter to formalize patients’ rights in public health services
examples.chinese: 正式确定公共卫生服务中病人权利的宪章

examples.english: Most measures to formalize wage negotiations have so far been very successful.
examples.chinese: 使工资谈判正式化的各种做法，到目前为止大都很有效。

centers.english: not official

examples.english: She seems to have become the unofficial spokesman for the group.
examples.chinese: 她好像已经成了这个组织的非正式发言人。

examples.english: The Prime Minister discussed the matter with his German counterpart on an unofficial visit to his home last month.
examples.chinese: 上个月，首相到德国总理的官邸作了一次私人访问，就此事进行了讨论。

examples.english: Unofficial sources say that over 100 people were shot dead in the rioting.
examples.chinese: 非官方消息称，这次暴动中有一百多人被开枪打死。

examples.english: The cost of the project is unofficially said to be around $2.5m.
examples.chinese: 这项工程的费用据非官方消息说是在250万美元左右。

examples.english: Though the organization is now banned, its members still meet unofficially in each others’ houses.
examples.chinese: 这个组织现在虽然已被取缔，但是其成员仍然轮流在各家秘密聚会。

examples.english: The two companies have an informal arrangement to share each other's sports and leisure facilities.
examples.chinese: 这两家公司有非正式的协定，共同享用各自的体育和休闲设施。

examples.english: The report was based on informal discussions with women MPs and their families.
examples.chinese: 这份报告是根据和女议员及其家属进行的非正式讨论写的。

examples.english: I was offered the job after an informal interview in the staff canteen.
examples.chinese: 我在员工餐厅接受了一次非正式的面试之后，他们就给了我这份工作。

examples.english: Until recently, holiday entitlement was informally agreed between individuals and their employer.
examples.chinese: 直到最近员工和雇主才就休假安排达成非正式协议。

examples.english: The group meets informally each month to discuss the progress of new students.
examples.chinese: 这个小组每个月都有非正式的聚会，讨论新生的学习进度。

examples.english: Strictly off the record, my feeling is that we are going to lose the election.
examples.chinese: 只是私下说说，我感觉我们这次要落选了。

examples.english: Off the record, police officers are saying they are more and more unwilling to arrest those found in possession of small amounts of cannabis.
examples.chinese: 私底下，警察说他们越来越不愿意去逮捕那些私藏少量大麻的人了。

examples.english: The party leader has appealed to her colleagues to end their damaging off-the-record remarks to the media.
examples.chinese: 该党领导人呼吁她的同僚不要再向媒体私下发表对党不利的言论。

centers.english: activities and ideas relating to the government of a country or area
centers.chinese: 与一国或一地区政府相关的活动和思想

examples.english: Maria is very interested in politics and current affairs.
examples.chinese: 玛丽亚对政治和时事很感兴趣。

expressions.text: be in politics/be involved in politics

examples.english: She's been in politics for over twenty years.
examples.chinese: 她已从政二十多年了。

examples.english: He made the decision to go into politics last year.
examples.chinese: 去年他决定从政。

examples.english: The University runs a course in American politics and government.
examples.chinese: 大学开设了一门有关美国政治和政府的课程。

examples.english: Most of the people questioned thought that unions should not get involved in party politics.
examples.chinese: 大部分被调查的人认为工会不应介入党派政治。

examples.english: Thomson has always been deeply involved in local politics.
examples.chinese: 汤姆森一直深深介入地方政治。

examples.english: an important figure in the world of politics
examples.chinese: 一位政界要人

examples.english: The people are demanding political change.
examples.chinese: 民众在要求政治改革。

examples.english: She began her political career as a city councillor.
examples.chinese: 她以市政委员的身份开始了自己的政治生涯。

examples.english: He asked me to explain the British political system.
examples.chinese: 他要我解释英国的政治体系。

examples.english: There are two main political parties in the US.
examples.chinese: 美国有两大政党。

examples.english: McEnroe loves the atmosphere at Westminster - he's a real political animal.
examples.chinese: 麦肯罗喜欢英国议会的氛围一他真是个政治动物。

centers.english: someone who works in politics

examples.english: Hargreaves is a clever and ambitious politician.
examples.chinese: 哈格里夫斯是个聪明、有抱负的政治家。

examples.english: the wife of a leading British politician
examples.chinese: 一位英国杰出政治家的妻子

examples.english: Many right-wing politicians opposed the treaty.
examples.chinese: 许多右翼政治家反对该条约。

examples.english: European statesmen are meeting in Paris today to discuss the crisis in the Middle East.
examples.chinese: 今天，欧洲的政治家在巴黎举行会议，讨论中东危机。

examples.english: She is now one of America's leading stateswomen.
examples.chinese: 她现在是美国最杰出的女政治家之一。

examples.english: There are still very few women members of parliament.
examples.chinese: 女性下议院议员的人数依然很少。

examples.english: The conference will open with a speech by Barbara Morland, MP.
examples.chinese: 会议将以下议院议员芭芭拉·莫兰的演讲揭开序幕。

examples.english: the Labour MP for Birmingham South
examples.chinese: 来自南伯明翰的工党议员

examples.english: Many congressmen are keen to promote research into renewable energy sources.
examples.chinese: 许多众议员热衷于发起对可再生能源的研究。

examples.english: The proposals were first put forward by Congresswoman Eleanor Baines.
examples.chinese: 这些议案最早是由女众议员埃莉诺·贝恩斯提出的。

examples.english: The Congressman from Iowa spoke for three hours.
examples.chinese: 来自艾奥瓦州的那位众议员讲了三小时。

examples.english: The President met with a group of senators and congressmen to discuss energy policy.
examples.chinese: 总统与一群参众两院议员会晤，商讨能源政策。

examples.english: The debate was opened by Senator Robinson.
examples.chinese: 辩论由参议员罗宾逊开场。

examples.english: The Democratic Senator from New York held a press conference yesterday.
examples.chinese: 昨天，来自纽约的民主党参议员举行记者招待会。

examples.english: The party spin doctors would like us to believe that the government is committed to improving the environment.
examples.chinese: 该党的舆论导向专家希望我们相信政府决心改善环境。

centers.english: different types of political opinions and parties

examples.english: He is known for his extreme right-wing views.
examples.chinese: 他以极右翼观点著称。

examples.english: a right-wing conservative MP
examples.chinese: 一位右翼保守党下议院议员

examples.english: The policy is supported by right-wingers within the party.
examples.chinese: 这项政策得到党内右翼成员的支持。

examples.english: A lot of colleagues were put off by her left-wing opinions.
examples.chinese: 许多同事讨厌她的左翼观点。

examples.english: a left-wing politician
examples.chinese: 一位左翼政治家

examples.english: He is popular with left-wingers in the party.
examples.chinese: 他受党内左翼成员的喜爱。

examples.english: The new law has been severely criticized by politicians on the left.
examples.chinese: 新的法律受到左派政党政治家的严厉抨击。

examples.english: Politicians on the right have welcomed these new proposals.
examples.chinese: 右派政党的政治家欢迎这些新提案。

examples.english: The party seems to be becoming less radical, and drifting more towards the centre.
examples.chinese: 该政党似乎在变得不太激进，逐渐偏向中间立场。

centers.english: to work hard

examples.english: Bruno had been working hard in the kitchen all morning.
examples.chinese: 整个早上，布鲁诺都在厨房里忙个不停。

examples.english: I wouldn't mind working so hard if they paid us more.
examples.chinese: 他们要是多给我们点钱，干得那么辛苦我也无所谓了。

expressions.text: put a lot of effort into something

examples.english: Stella had obviously put a lot of effort into her assignment, and got a good grade.
examples.chinese: 斯特拉显然在作业上花了很多工夫，获得了好成绩。

examples.english: The company puts a great deal of effort into training its staff.
examples.chinese: 该公司投入很多精力培训员工。

examples.english: The only way to be successful in athletics is to really work at it.
examples.chinese: 要在体育运动方面取得成功，唯一的途径就是下工夫练习。

examples.english: You should be able to take your music exam in the summer, if you work at it between now and then.
examples.chinese: 你要是在这期间认真准备，应该能够参加夏天的音乐考试。

expressions.text: be hard at work /be hard at it

examples.english: Mike's been hard at it all afternoon and he still hasn't finished mending the car.
examples.chinese: 迈克卖力地干了一个下午，还是没有修好汽车。

expressions.text: be hard at work on something

examples.english: Since January, Leane's been hard at work on a self-help book on how to launch a business.
examples.chinese: 1月份开始，利恩一直在努力写一本如何创业的自助书。

expressions.text: be hard at work doing something

examples.english: They've been hard at work getting the house decorated.
examples.chinese: 他们在忙着装修房屋。

examples.english: If you really push yourself, you should get all the work done on time.
examples.chinese: 如果你真的努力干，你应该会按时完成所有工作的。

examples.english: Warm up your body before you start exercising, and avoid pushing yourself too hard or too fast.
examples.chinese: 锻炼之前先热身，不要逼得自己太厉害或过于急进。

examples.english: American investment bankers are still plugging away, looking for business in developing countries like Thailand, Indonesia, or Malaysia.
examples.chinese: 美国的投资银行家仍在努力，在泰国、印度尼西亚、马来西亚等发展中国家寻求商机。

examples.english: Haven't you finished? You've been beavering away on that report all morning.
examples.chinese: 完成了吗？整个早上你都在拼命地写那篇报告。

examples.english: Sheffield is a city where steel-workers once laboured in their thousands.
examples.chinese: 设菲尔德这座城市曾有数以千计的炼钢工人一起辛勤劳动。

examples.english: Shipman was seated in his office, labouring over his paperwork, when I came in.
examples.chinese: 我进去的时候，希普曼坐在办公室里忙着文书工作。

examples.english: The goal was just what the team needed, at the end of a game in which they had laboured hard to overcome Chelsea.
examples.chinese: 在球队为战胜切尔西队而拼命的这场比赛快结束时，这个进球正是他们所需要的。

centers.english: to work extremely hard

examples.english: I've been slaving away all week and I've had enough of it!
examples.chinese: 我已经苦干了整整一星期，都受够了！

examples.english: Ed had been slaving away at his essay for hours, but it still wasn't finished.
examples.chinese: 艾德苦干了好几个小时写论文，但还没有写完。

examples.english: The poor man spent ten years of his life slaving away to pay back the money they had borrowed.
examples.chinese: 那个可怜的男人花了十年时间拼命赚钱还债。

expressions.text: work your fingers to the bone

examples.english: In those days we got up at 5 in the morning, and worked our fingers to the bone.
examples.chinese: 那时候，我们早上5点起床，拼命干活。

examples.english: His mother had had a hard life - had worked her fingers to the bone bringing up six children.
examples.chinese: 他妈妈日子过得很苦一拼命干活养活六个孩子。

examples.english: It hasn't been easy. The truth is I've worked my ass off for everything I've achieved.
examples.chinese: 这很不容易，事实是我完成的每件事都是拼命干出来的。

expressions.text: work your butt/ass off to do something

examples.english: Lea worked her butt off to graduate with honors and big scholarships.
examples.chinese: 莉读书非常卖力，毕业时成绩优异，并多次获得大笔的奖学金。

examples.english: Men. women and children spent long hours toiling in the fields, whatever the weather conditions.
examples.chinese: 不论天气好坏，男男女女、老老少少都长时间在田里辛勤劳动。

examples.english: Roger and his wife toiled round the clock for seven years to make a success of their business.
examples.chinese: 罗杰和妻子七年来不分昼夜地苦干，终于事业有成。

centers.english: to work too hard

examples.english: Teachers often complain that they are overworked and underpaid.
examples.chinese: 教师常抱怨工作量大、报酬低。

examples.english: I'd been six months without any holiday, and I was tired and overworked.
examples.chinese: 我已经六个月没休过一天假了，劳累过度。

examples.english: She had a heart condition caused by heavy smoking and overwork.
examples.chinese: 她因抽烟太多、劳累过度引发了心脏病。

examples.english: The doctor told me to relax and not overdo it.
examples.chinese: 医生嘱咐我要休息，不要过分劳累。

examples.english: The President's advisers are worried that he might have been overdoing it lately.
examples.chinese: 总统的顾问们担心他最近可能劳碌过度。

examples.english: You should slow down. You're pushing yourself too hard.
examples.chinese: 你应该放松一下，你把自己逼得太紧了。

examples.english: It's no wonder that she had a nervous breakdown -- she's been driving herself too hard for months.
examples.chinese: 怪不得她精神崩溃了一几个月来她让自己过分劳累了。

examples.english: It's good to work hard. But don't drive yourself into the ground.
examples.chinese: 努力工作是好的，但是不要让自己累垮。

examples.english: By the time the great day arrived, I'd worked myself into the ground making sure everything would be just right.
examples.chinese: 为了确保万无一失，我拼命地干，等大日子到来的时候已经累垮了。

centers.english: someone who works hard

examples.english: Colleagues described him as a quiet, hardworking young man.
examples.chinese: 同事们说他是个文静、勤勉的年轻人。

examples.english: She's not our best employee, but at least she's hardworking.
examples.chinese: 她不是我们最好的雇员，但至少她工作努力。

examples.english: Unfortunately, the school has just lost two of its best and most hardworking teachers.
examples.chinese: 不幸的是，这所学校刚失去两名最优秀、最勤勉的教师。

examples.english: Steve's doing a sixty-hour week at the moment - I never realized he could be such a workaholic.
examples.chinese: 史蒂夫现在一周工作60小时—我从不知道他是这么个工作狂。

examples.english: Selling is a career that seems to attract workaholics.
examples.chinese: 销售似乎是吸引工作狂的一份职业。

examples.english: Most of the students I knew at college were serious and industrious.
examples.chinese: 我在大学里认识的学生大都认真勤奋。

examples.english: The Omanis are industrious people, striving to make their country prosperous.
examples.chinese: 阿曼人是个勤劳的民族，努力使自己的国家繁荣昌盛。

examples.english: Janie's a wonderful nurse - completely dedicated.
examples.chinese: 珍妮是个了不起的护士—完全富有献身精神。

examples.english: The lifeboat service is run by a team of dedicated volunteers.
examples.chinese: 救生艇服务由一队敬业的志愿者营办。

examples.english: The group is dedicated to the conservation of the environment.
examples.chinese: 这个组织致力于环境保护。

examples.english: Worknet has a staff of 28 people, dedicated to assisting the community in their search for employment or training.
examples.chinese: “求职网”有28名员工，致力于帮助社区居民寻找就业或培训机会。

examples.english: As a dedicated sportsman, Steven trained every day of the week.
examples.chinese: 史蒂文是个敬业的运动员，一周七天都在训练。

examples.english: Edinburgh sees itself as a university of the new millennium, committed to research and teaching.
examples.chinese: 爱丁堡大学视自己为新千年的大学、一所致力于研究和教学的大学。

examples.english: Tanzania is a country committed to building socialism in the long term.
examples.chinese: 该国是个致力于长期建设社会主义的国家。

examples.english: The company looks for highly committed people, who are willing to study for further professional qualifications in their own time.
examples.chinese: 该公司物色非常尽责、愿意利用自己的时间学习，以提高专业资历的人。

examples.english: Francis didn't bother with clothes or make-up. She was an extremely serious and studious young girl.
examples.chinese: 弗朗西丝对衣服和化妆品不感兴趣，她是个极其认真、用功的少女。

examples.english: Angus's round glasses made him look studious.
examples.chinese: 安格斯戴的圆眼镜使他看上去很好学的样子。

examples.english: Everyone else in the class hated him because they thought he was a real swot.
examples.chinese: 班里每一个人都讨厌他，因为他们认为他只会一味读书。

centers.english: someone who does the hardest or most boring work
centers.chinese: 做最辛苦或最令人厌烦的工作的人

examples.english: The work I was given was the same, day after day; I felt like a drudge.
examples.chinese: 我分配到的是日复一日相同的工作，我感觉自己像个苦工。

examples.english: One of the women said that since having four children, she felt she'd been reduced to a household drudge.
examples.chinese: 其中一位妇女说，自从生了四个孩子后，她觉得自己已沦为家里的佣人了。

examples.english: You have to be prepared to be a peon when you start -- sweeping floors, delivering, that kind of thing.
examples.chinese: 开始的时候你得准备好做个杂务工一扫地、送信等一类的事情都要做。

examples.english: I got myself a job as a typist and general dogsbody on a small magazine.
examples.chinese: 我在一家小杂志社找到一份打字兼杂务的工作。

centers.english: to make people work hard

examples.english: Sometimes I think that they work us too hard in this office.
examples.chinese: 有时我认为这个公司让我们干得太辛苦了。

examples.english: The bank's managers admit that they work their employees hard, but on the other hand they pay good wages.
examples.chinese: 这家银行的经理承认他们让雇员工作得很累，但另一方面他们给的工资也很高。

examples.english: She's a real slave driver. One of her secretaries had a nervous breakdown last year.
examples.chinese: 她真苛刻，去年她有个秘书都精神崩溃了。

centers.english: what you say to tell someone to work harder
centers.chinese: 吩咐某人更努力地工作时所说的话

expressions.text: put some effort into it/ put your back into it /put some muscle into i

examples.english: You'll have to put your back into it -- I want to see all these boxes moved by tonight.
examples.chinese: 你们必须加把劲一今晚之前我要看见所有这些箱子都搬走。

examples.english: Come on you guys, let's see you put some muscle into it!
examples.chinese: 快点，你们这些家伙，让我们看看你们使点劲出来干活！

examples.english: You could easily finish your essay if you just sit down and pull your finger out!
examples.chinese: 要是你坐下来加把劲干的话，很快就会完成论文的！

centers.english: to not work hard enough

examples.english: If you think that Alan isn't pulling his weight, you must tell him either to improve or leave.
examples.chinese: 要是你觉得艾伦未尽本分，必须告诉他，要不改进，要不走人。

examples.english: Of all the people sharing the house with us, only Lizzie didn't pull her weight.
examples.chinese: 和我们一起租房子的人中，只有莉齐没有尽到自己的责任。

examples.english: She says she's been ill for the past week, but I think she's just skiving.
examples.chinese: 她说她上星期病了，可是我觉得她是在逃避工作。

examples.english: Harry's going to get into trouble if he keeps skiving off on Friday afternoons.
examples.chinese: 哈里如果星期五下午老是旷工，他就会惹麻烦了。

examples.english: Everyone knew that Ned was the biggest skiver in the class.
examples.chinese: 所有人都知道，内德是班上逃课最多的人。

examples.english: Hey you two! Quit goofing off and do some work!
examples.chinese: 嘿，你们两个！别偷懒了，快做点事吧！

examples.english: Anyone who does consistently good work doesn't need to worry about occasionally goofing off on the job.
examples.chinese: 工作一直出色的人偶尔偷偷懒也没有关系。

expressions.text: not do a stroke of work

examples.english: The telephone's been ringing and I haven't managed to do a stroke of work yet today.
examples.chinese: 电话响个不停，今天我还没做过什么工作呢。

examples.english: Duncan found a wealthy woman, married her, and he's never done a stroke of work since!
examples.chinese: 邓肯找了个富婆结婚，此后他什么也不干了！

examples.english: She called me into her office and accused me of slacking and taking too many holidays!
examples.chinese: 她把我叫进办公室，说我做事磨洋工，休假太多！

examples.english: ‘You start tomorrow at nine,’ he told them, ‘and no slacking, or there'll be trouble.’
examples.chinese: “你们明天9点开始工作，”他吩咐他们说，“别磨洋工，否则就会有麻烦。”

examples.english: I'm sure he's not malingering. He looked awful when I saw him last night.
examples.chinese: 我肯定他不是装病，我昨晚见到他的时候他气色很不好。

examples.english: The report claimed that women may be more likely to malinger than men.
examples.chinese: 那份报告称，女性可能比男性更会装病。

examples.english: There've been so many cases of malingering that now you need a doctor's note if you're absent.
examples.chinese: 装病的例子太多了，现在如果你缺席的话就需要有医生的证明。

centers.english: to vote

examples.english: In tomorrow's election, many young people will be voting for the first time.
examples.chinese: 在明天的选举中，许多年轻人将第一次投票。

examples.english: Hundreds of people lost their lives in the past fighting for the right to vote.
examples.chinese: 在过去争取投票权的斗争中，数百人失去了生命。

examples.english: I haven't decided who I'm going to vote for.
examples.chinese: 我还没有决定投谁的票。

examples.english: 70% of the population voted for independence.
examples.chinese: 70%的人口投票赞成独立。

examples.english: Only two people voted against the expansion of the business.
examples.chinese: 只有两个人投票反对扩展业务。

examples.english: The vast majority of people voted in favour of closer links with Europe.
examples.chinese: 大部分民众投票赞成与欧洲保持更密切的联系。

examples.english: Teachers will be voting on a proposal to accept the 5% pay offer.
examples.chinese: 教师将为接受5%加薪的提案投票。

examples.english: I've voted Democrat all my life.
examples.chinese: 我一辈子都投民主党的票。

examples.english: We couldn't agree on a way forward, so we decided to have a vote.
examples.chinese: 下一步该怎么走我们统一不了意见，所以决定投票表决。

examples.english: I think we should take a vote on whether or not to accept their offer.
examples.chinese: 我想我们应该就是否接受他们的提议进行表决。

expressions.text: cast a vote/ cast a ballot

examples.english: By the end of the day, less than 40% of the population had cast their votes.
examples.chinese: 这一天快结束时，已经投了票的人不到40%。

examples.english: Over three quarters of the votes cast were for the Liberal candidate.
examples.chinese: 超过四分之三的选票投给了自由党候选人。

examples.english: Not until all the ballots have been cast can they be counted.
examples.chinese: 直到所有人都投了票，才能清点票数。

examples.english: Let's put it to the vote. All those in favour raise your hands.
examples.chinese: 让我们来投票决定，同意的人请举手。

examples.english: When the matter was put to a vote, the staff voted overwhelmingly not to go on strike.
examples.chinese: 这件事付诸投票的时候，绝大多数员工不赞成罢工。

examples.english: The president has the right to veto any piece of legislation.
examples.chinese: 总统有权否决任何立法。

examples.english: The deal was agreed by the board but vetoed by the chairman.
examples.chinese: 这笔交易经董事会同意，但遭主席否决。

examples.english: The union will now ballot its members on whether to go ahead with strike action.
examples.chinese: 现在，工会将要求其会员对是否继续罢工进行投票。

examples.english: The people of Houston will go to the polls next week to elect a new mayor.
examples.chinese: 下周，休斯顿的居民将投票选举新市长。

examples.english: With only two days left before France goes to the polls, all parties are campaigning hard.
examples.chinese: 距离法国大选的日子只有两天了，所有的党派都在加紧进行竞选活动。

examples.english: They are determined to win power through the ballot box, not by violence.
examples.chinese: 他们决心通过投票选举来获得权力，而不是用暴力。

examples.english: The voters have expressed their views at the ballot box.
examples.chinese: 选民以投票的方式表达了他们的意见。

centers.english: to choose a government, leader, or representative by voting
centers.chinese: 通过投票选出政府、领袖或代表

examples.english: I think we should start by electing a new chairman.
examples.chinese: 我认为我们应该先选举一个新的主席。

examples.english: Ken Livingstone was elected mayor of London in May 2000.
examples.chinese: 2000年5月，肯·利文斯通当选伦敦市长。

examples.english: They always seem to vote in these corrupt, incompetent governments.
examples.chinese: 他们似乎老是选出腐败无能的政府。

examples.english: The conservatives have promised to cut taxes if they are voted into office.
examples.chinese: 保守党人承诺，如果当选就实行减税。

examples.english: The chairman and treasurer have both been re-elected for another year.
examples.chinese: 主席和财务主管再度当选连任一年。

examples.english: Simon Mungford has been re-elected as party leader.
examples.chinese: 西蒙·芒福德再度当选为党的领袖。

examples.english: Only 96 Conservative MPs were returned at the last election.
examples.chinese: 上次选举中只有96位保守党下议院议员当选。

examples.english: Whoever is nominated today will go forward to the leadership elections.
examples.chinese: 今天被提名的人都将参加领导人竞选。

examples.english: By now it was clear that Bush was going to be nominated for President.
examples.chinese: 这个时候已经清楚布什将被提名为总统候选人。

examples.english: I was nominated as chairman.
examples.chinese: 我被提名为主席。

examples.english: All nominations must be in by three o'clock on March 21st.
examples.chinese: 所有提名必须在3月21日3点前提交。

centers.english: an occasion when people vote

examples.english: It will be interesting to see what happens at the next election.
examples.chinese: 看看下次选举将发生什么会很有意思。

examples.english: South Africa held its first multi-racial elections in 1994.
examples.chinese: 1994年南非首次进行多种族选举。

examples.english: The government may decide to call an election early.
examples.chinese: 政府可能会提早举行选举。

examples.english: America is preparing for the presidential elections, which will take place in two weeks’ time.
examples.chinese: 美国正准备两周后举行的总统选举。

examples.english: Taxation will be one of the major issues at the next general election.
examples.chinese: 税收将会是下次大选的主要议题之一。

examples.english: Support for electoral reform is growing.
examples.chinese: 支持选举制度改革的人越来越多。

examples.english: This was the first of her many electoral successes.
examples.chinese: 她多次当选，这是第一次胜利。

examples.english: Electoral systems vary from country to country.
examples.chinese: 各个国家的选举制度不尽相同。

examples.english: How will you be voting in the referendum?
examples.chinese: 全民公决中你怎么投票？

examples.english: The government has promised to hold a referendum and let the people choose.
examples.chinese: 政府承诺举行全民投票，让民众来选择。

examples.english: The Irish people voted ‘no’ in a referendum on divorce in 1986.
examples.chinese: 1986年，爱尔兰人在离婚问题的全民公决中投了反对票。

examples.english: The result of the ballot showed that nurses were not in favour of a strike.
examples.chinese: 投票表决的结果表明护士不赞同罢工。

examples.english: He was elected by a ballot of all the teaching staff in the college.
examples.chinese: 他在学院全体教员进行的选举中当选。

examples.english: It was decided to hold a ballot of all party members.
examples.chinese: 决定由全体党员投票表决。

examples.english: Voting will be by secret ballot.
examples.chinese: 投票将以无记名的方式进行。

examples.english: The party is still trying to recover from the losses it suffered at last year's polls.
examples.chinese: 该党仍努力从去年的大选失利中恢复过来。

examples.english: Richards won a huge victory at the polls.
examples.chinese: 理查兹在选举中大获全胜。

examples.english: Voters have been flocking to the polls to elect a new president.
examples.chinese: 选民蜂拥而至，参加投票选出新总统。

examples.english: Polling has been going on since 9 am.
examples.chinese: 早上9点起投票就一直在进行。

examples.english: The announcement of her resignation came just two days before polling was to begin.
examples.chinese: 就在投票前两天宣布她辞职了。

examples.english: Polling day is 30 May.
examples.chinese: 选举日是5月30日。

examples.english: Security was tight at the polling stations.
examples.chinese: 投票站戒备森严。

examples.english: A show of hands suggested that Martins had little support.
examples.chinese: 举手表决的结果显示，马丁斯几乎没有人支持。

examples.english: She was elected by a show of hands.
examples.chinese: 她经举手表决当选。

centers.english: someone who votes

examples.english: Italian voters have shown that they are ready for a change of government.
examples.chinese: 意大利选民表明，他们已经准备好更换政府了。

examples.english: There is disappointment among Labour voters that the party has not done more to help traditional industries.
examples.chinese: 工党没有采取更多措施帮助传统工业，这使得该党的选民感到失望。

examples.english: Research has shown that thirty percent of the electorate have still not decided how they will vote.
examples.chinese: 研究显示30%的选民还没有决定如何投票。

examples.english: He has been accused of misleading the electorate.
examples.chinese: 他被指误导选民。

centers.english: the right to vote

examples.english: People are campaigning for civil rights and especially for the vote.
examples.chinese: 人们正在发起一场争取公民权，尤其是选举权的运动。

examples.english: The majority of immigrant workers do not have the vote.
examples.chinese: 侨民劳工大多没有选举权。

examples.english: In 1928 in Britain, women got the vote at 21 on equal terms with men.
examples.chinese: 1928年在英国，女性21岁开始以与男性同等的地位享有选举权。

examples.english: In Britain, everyone over 18 has a vote.
examples.chinese: 在英国，18岁以上的人都有投票权。

examples.english: The secretary is allowed to attend meetings, but does not have a vote.
examples.chinese: 秘书可以参加会议，但是没有投票权。

examples.english: There was a fierce struggle for women's suffrage in Britain early this century.
examples.chinese: 本世纪初期，英国的妇女为了得到选举权进行了激烈的斗争。

examples.english: Suffrage reforms took place in the 18th, 19th and 20th centuries.
examples.chinese: 选举权改革发生在18、19和20世纪。

examples.english: Even now, not every country in Europe has universal suffrage.
examples.chinese: 甚至现在也不是每个欧洲国家都有普选权。

examples.english: The franchise was later extended to any person over 18 years old.
examples.chinese: 选举权后来扩大到所有年满18岁的人。

examples.english: This legislation enfranchised many thousands of people.
examples.chinese: 这条法律让成千上万的人有政治选举权。

examples.english: The group works in developing countries to increase literacy and enfranchise women.
examples.chinese: 该组织在发展中国家开展工作，提高当地的文化水平，并为妇女争取选举权。

examples.english: If you don't get your name on the electoral register you may be disenfranchised.
examples.chinese: 你若没有在选民登记册上登记名字，有可能会失去选举权。

centers.english: ways of saying how many votes are made or received
centers.chinese: 投票数或获得票数多少的说法

examples.english: 63% of the vote went to the National Party.
examples.chinese: 民族党获得的票数达63%。

examples.english: Once again, the Democrats increased their share of the vote.
examples.chinese: 民主党的得票份额再一次增加。

examples.english: Standord received 50% of the male vote.
examples.chinese: 斯坦多德获得男性选民50%的选票。

examples.english: The Green Party candidate got only one more vote than the Socialists.
examples.chinese: 绿党候选人仅比社会党人多出一票。

examples.english: He polled 23,579 votes.
The Labour candidate polled 52% of the votes.
examples.chinese: 工党候选人获得52%的选票。

centers.english: to try to get elected

examples.english: Ellis has not yet announced whether or not he will run.
examples.chinese: 埃利斯还没有宣布是否参加竞选。

examples.english: I hope Ian will decide to stand because he'd make an excellent president.
examples.chinese: 我希望伊恩会决定参选，因为他会是一位出色的总统。

examples.english: Only eight percent of those standing for the National Party were women.
examples.chinese: 民族党的候选人当中只有8%是女性。

examples.english: We've got an excellent candidate to run against Harwood in the election.
examples.chinese: 我们有一个非常出色的候选人和哈伍德一起竞选。

examples.english: He first stood for Parliament in 1974 but failed to get in.
examples.chinese: 他1974年第一次竞选议会议员，但未能入选。

examples.english: If you want to change the way the committee does things, you should stand for election yourself.
examples.chinese: 如果你想改变委员会做事的方式，你应该亲自参加竞选。

examples.english: There are rumors going around that I'm running for President, but they're not true.
examples.chinese: 有种种谣言说我要竞选总统，但这不是真的。

examples.english: The Prime Minister has decided to stay on to fight another election.
examples.chinese: 首相已经决定继续留下，参加下一届竞选。

examples.english: Neil Phillips will now fight Adams for leadership of the party.
examples.chinese: 如今，尼尔·菲利普斯将与亚当斯争夺该党的领导权。

examples.english: I think Reid is definitely the best candidate.
examples.chinese: 我认为里德肯定是最佳的候选人。

examples.english: She stood as the candidate for Hackney East.
examples.chinese: 她是代表东哈克尼区的候选人。

examples.english: My name is Andrew Fraser. I'm your Labour candidate.
examples.chinese: 我名字叫安德鲁·弗雷泽，我是你们的工党候选人。

examples.english: the Democratic candidate
examples.chinese: 民主党候选人

centers.english: political activities before an election

examples.english: Richards and his team have already started planning his campaign for election as party leader.
