examples.chinese: 理查德和他的竞选班子已经开始计划竞选党领导人的活动。

examples.english: Throughout the campaign, Baldwin looked the most likely to win.
examples.chinese: 在整个竞选运动中，鲍德温看来最有可能获胜。

examples.english: The government does not want this kind of bad publicity in the middle of an election campaign.
examples.chinese: 政府不希望在选举活动中有这种不利的报道。

examples.english: The Prime Minister will be campaigning in Scotland next week.
examples.chinese: 首相将于下周在苏格兰参加竞选运动。

examples.english: Modern electioneering is sophisticated and highly organised.
examples.chinese: 现代的竞选活动很复杂，且非常有组织。

examples.english: Critics have dismissed his visit to a shelter for the homeless as an obvious piece of electioneering.
examples.chinese: 批评人士对他走访无家可归者收容所很是不屑，说这明显是在拉票。

examples.english: She was canvassing in the Greenside area of town yesterday.
examples.chinese: 昨天她在格林塞德城区拉选票。

examples.english: I spent the whole afternoon canvassing voters.
examples.chinese: 整个下午我都在游说选民。

examples.english: I canvass for the Democrats at election times.
examples.chinese: 竞选时，我为民主党拉选票。

centers.english: to show publicly that you disagree with something

examples.english: When the army took power, huge crowds gathered in the capital to protest.
examples.chinese: 军队夺取政权后，大批人群聚集在首都抗议。

examples.english: Prisoners had climbed onto the roof to protest about conditions in the jail.
examples.chinese: 囚犯们爬上屋顶抗议监狱里的恶劣条件。

examples.english: a huge crowd of students protesting the globalization of trade
examples.chinese: 反对贸易全球化的一大群学生

examples.english: Thousands of people demonstrated outside the parliament building last night.
examples.chinese: 昨晚数千民众在议会大楼外游行示威。

examples.english: Thousands of workers and students demonstrated against US involvement in the war.
examples.chinese: 几千名工人和学生举行示威游行抗议美国介入战争。

examples.english: Over ten thousand workers marched through the capital demanding higher wages.
examples.chinese: 一万多名工人横穿首都游行示威，要求增加工资。

examples.english: Several thousand people marched on the French embassy.
examples.chinese: 数千民众到法国使馆示威游行。

examples.english: Students have threatened to boycott certain banks as a protest at their investment policies.
examples.chinese: 学生们威胁要抵制某些银行，以抗议其投资政策。

examples.english: Several countries have said they may boycott next year's Olympic Games.
examples.chinese: 几个国家称可能抵制明年的奥运会。

examples.english: Prisoners in several jails have rioted in protest at their appalling conditions.
examples.chinese: 数所监狱的囚犯发生暴乱，抗议他们极其恶劣的条件。

examples.english: Gangs of youths rioted for two nights on the streets of the capital.
examples.chinese: 有两个晚上，年轻人团伙在首都街头闹事。

examples.english: Five days of rioting followed the police shooting of student leaders.
examples.chinese: 警察射杀学生领袖一事引起了持续五天的暴乱。

centers.english: ways of protesting about something

examples.english: The school has received over 3,000 letters of protest.
examples.chinese: 学校已收到3,000多封抗议信。

examples.english: The protest begun by Soweto children rapidly spread throughout the country.
examples.chinese: 抗议活动首先由索韦托的儿童发起，很快扩展到了全国各地。

examples.english: Over fifteen thousand people held a mass protest against racism in the country's capital.
examples.chinese: 一万五千多名民众在该国首都举行大规模抗议活动反对种族主义。

examples.english: The shooting provoked a storm of protest.
examples.chinese: 枪击事件激起了一片抗议风潮。

examples.english: Prisoners have been holding hunger strikes in protest against their living conditions.
examples.chinese: 囚犯在进行绝食，对他们的生活条件提出抗议。

examples.english: Public employees have threatened mass resignations in protest at the plans.
examples.chinese: 公务员以集体辞职相威胁，反对那些计划。

examples.english: The police had to break up yesterday's animal rights demonstration.
examples.chinese: 警方不得不驱散昨天的动物权利游行。

examples.english: Some of the marchers called to us to come and join the demo.
examples.chinese: 一些游行示威者要我们加入他们的队伍。

examples.english: Over 3,000 people took part in a demonstration against the dumping of nuclear waste at sea.
examples.chinese: 三千多名民众参加游行示威，抗议将核废料倾入海中。

examples.english: Thousands of students took part in the march.
examples.chinese: 数千名学生参加了示威游行。

examples.english: Local trade union leaders joined in the protest march against cuts in government spending.
examples.chinese: 当地工会领导人加入抗议游行，反对削减政府开支。

examples.english: Farmers are calling for a boycott of all imported meat.
examples.chinese: 农民要求抵制所有进口肉食。

examples.english: a boycott of the peace talks
examples.chinese: 抵制和平会谈

examples.english: Altogether the riots cost 130 lives and well over $700 million in property damage.
examples.chinese: 这些暴乱一共导致130人死亡，财产损失大大超过7亿美元。

examples.english: Racial tension boiled over in the inner city riots which spread across the nation last week.
examples.chinese: 市中心贫民区的暴乱致使种族间的紧张局势白热化，并于上周蔓延至全国。

examples.english: Workers at the factory organized a sit-in to draw attention to their grievances.
examples.chinese: 那家工厂的工人组织了静坐罢工，以让人关注到他们的不满。

centers.english: someone who takes part in a public protest

examples.english: Thousands of protesters took to the streets to show their anger at the government.
examples.chinese: 数千名抗议者走到街上表达他们对政府的愤怒之情。

examples.english: Thirteen demonstrators were killed when soldiers opened fire on the crowd.
examples.chinese: 士兵向人群开火，杀死了13名集会抗议者。

examples.english: The Rev. Jesse Jackson led 1000 marchers through downtown Detroit to protest state welfare cuts.
examples.chinese: 杰西·杰克逊牧师带领1,000名游行示威者穿过底特律市中心，反对州政府削减福利。

centers.english: an attempt to change the government or other authority, often using violence
centers.chinese: 企图用暴力改变政府或其他当局

examples.english: In 1968, a student rebellion in Paris sparked off a nationwide general strike.
examples.chinese: 1968年，巴黎学潮引发了一次全国性的总罢工。

examples.english: The rebellion started in Kilalla and spread quickly through the Western provinces.
examples.chinese: 叛乱从基拉拉开始，迅速蔓延到西部各省。

examples.english: The citizens of Kwangju rose in rebellion against the oppressive regime.
examples.chinese: 光州的市民起来暴动，反抗暴虐的政权。

examples.english: The Duke of Ormond led a military rebellion against the new king.
examples.chinese: 奥蒙德公爵领导了反对新国王的军事叛乱。

examples.english: Troops were used to put down a rebellion and arrest hundreds of protestors.
examples.chinese: 军队出动镇压叛乱，并逮捕了几百名抗议者。

examples.english: The rebellion was crushed by an army assault in which over 200 people died.
examples.chinese: 在军队的进攻下叛乱被镇压了下去，死了二百多人。

examples.english: an unsuccessful attempt to mount a rebellion against British rule
examples.chinese: 一次发动反抗英国统治的不成功的尝试

examples.english: A rebel army of political dissidents had staged a rebellion in December 1989.
examples.chinese: 1989年12月，一支持不同政见的军队发起了暴动。

examples.english: The 1789 revolution marked the end of the French monarchy.
examples.chinese: 1789年的革命标志着法国君主制度的结束。

examples.english: Trotsky was one of the leading figures in the Russian Revolution of 1917.
examples.chinese: 托洛茨基是1917年俄国革命的领袖之一。

examples.english: Just 12 days after the emperor's death, the country erupted into revolution.
examples.chinese: 皇帝死后仅仅12天，这个国家就爆发了革命。

examples.english: an era of rural unrest and peasant revolution
examples.chinese: 农村动乱和农民革命的时代

examples.english: In Africa, Asia, and Latin America, there were revolutionary movements eager for change.
examples.chinese: 非洲、亚洲和拉丁美洲都有急于变革的革命运动。

examples.english: We fervently embraced the new revolutionary ideals.
examples.chinese: 我们热切拥护这些新的革命理想。

examples.english: In 1880, a peasant revolt swept the country in protest at the tax on salt.
examples.chinese: 1880年一场抗议盐税的农民起义席卷了全国。

examples.english: Louverture headed the revolt of the slaves in the French colony of San Domingo.
examples.chinese: 卢维杜尔领导了法国殖民地圣多明各的奴隶起义。

examples.english: At a word from Gandhi, India would have risen in revolt.
examples.chinese: 只要甘地说句话，印度就会起来反抗。

examples.english: Mayhew's remarks represented the first American call for revolt against England.
examples.chinese: 梅休的话代表了美国人民对英国进行反抗的第一个呼声。

examples.english: Army forces crushed the revolt, forcing many to flee the country.
examples.chinese: 军队镇压了叛乱，迫使许多人逃离了该国。

examples.english: The Confederate government provided troops to suppress slave revolts.
examples.chinese: 邦联政府派军队镇压奴隶暴动。

examples.english: Herrera knew that if his government failed to put down the revolt, it would spread to outlying areas.
examples.chinese: 赫雷拉知道一旦他领导的政府不能镇压叛乱，叛乱就会扩散到边远地区。

examples.english: It was widely believed that the outlaws had been plotting an insurrection.
examples.chinese: 很多人都认为不法分子在策划叛乱。

examples.english: the ruthless suppression of slave insurrections
examples.chinese: 对奴隶起义的无情镇压

examples.english: an outbreak of insurrection
examples.chinese: 起义的爆发

examples.english: The reign of civil disorder and terrorism culminated in armed insurrection.
examples.chinese: 社会动乱和恐怖主义的盛行终于引发了一场武装起义。

examples.english: Peasant uprisings were the first signs of discontent among the people.
examples.chinese: 农民起义是人民中有不满情绪的第一征象。

examples.english: The new law prompted a pro-democracy uprising in the south.
examples.chinese: 这一新法律引发了南部亲民主政体人士的起义。

examples.english: The short-lived uprising fizzled out in the face of strong opposition from government forces.
examples.chinese: 这场持续时间很短的暴动面对强大的政府军的镇压，终于失败了。

examples.english: a failed uprising against French colonial rule
examples.chinese: 反对法国殖民统治的一场失败的起义

examples.english: The President took immediate steps to quell the uprising.
examples.chinese: 总统立即采取行动镇压起义。

examples.english: The new leader put down the uprising by dispatching government troops to the area.
examples.chinese: 新领袖向该地区派遣政府军镇压暴动。

examples.english: The film tells the story of a mutiny aboard a slave ship.
examples.chinese: 影片讲述的是发生在一艘贩奴船上的哗变。

examples.english: Thirteen soldiers were sentenced to life imprisonment for mutiny.
examples.chinese: 13名士兵因叛变被判处终生监禁。

centers.english: an attempt by the army to take control of the government
centers.chinese: 军队企图控制政府的行动

examples.english: Tomorrow is the anniversary of the coup that brought a military dictatorship to power here nine years ago.
examples.chinese: 明天是九年前促使军事独裁在这里上台的那次政变的纪念日。

examples.english: He led a successful coup against the government of Iraq.
examples.chinese: 他成功地领导了一次反对该国政府的政变。

examples.english: In April 1974, a military coup took place in Lisbon.
examples.chinese: 1974年4月，里斯本发生了一次军事政变。

examples.english: The coup attempt was followed by police brutality, executions, and torture.
examples.chinese: 政变后，随之就发生了警察的野蛮行为、处决和严刑拷打。

examples.english: They smashed an attempted coup by the communists, leaving hundreds dead.
examples.chinese: 他们粉碎了一次政变企图，有几百人死亡。

examples.english: Peru offered refuge to officers who had taken part in the abortive coup.
examples.chinese: 秘鲁为参与流产政变的官员提供避难。

examples.english: The government imposed a state of emergency after the failed coup d'état.
examples.chinese: 政府在发生流产政变后宣布进入紧急状态。

examples.english: The chief of the armed forces intended to take power by staging a coup d'état.
examples.chinese: 这位武装部队的首脑意欲发动政变夺取政权。

examples.english: The election was the first since the military takeover in 1980.
examples.chinese: 自从1980年军事接管以后，这是第一次选举。

examples.english: The economic crisis and the threat from separatist guerrillas led to a military takeover.
examples.chinese: 经济危机和分离主义游击队的威胁导致了军事接管。

centers.english: to take part in a rebellion

examples.english: The eastern provinces are likely to rebel if they are not given more freedom.
examples.chinese: 东部各省如果得不到更多的自由，就有可能造反。

examples.english: The slaves were punished for rebelling against their owners.
examples.chinese: 奴隶们因反叛奴隶主而受到了惩罚。

examples.english: When the federal government refused this request, the Southern States rebelled.
examples.chinese: 联邦政府拒绝了这个要求，南方诸州就起来造反了。

examples.english: When Napoleon won control of the region and attached it to Bavaria, the Tiroleans revolted.
examples.chinese: 当拿破仑控制了该地区并将其归属于巴伐利亚后，蒂罗尔人就造反了。

examples.english: Some of the Arab tribes were persuaded to revolt against Turkish rule.
examples.chinese: 有些阿拉伯部落受到劝诱，想反抗土耳其的统治。

examples.english: News reached the capital that two garrisons in the south had revolted against the government.
examples.chinese: 消息传到首都，说南方有两支卫戍部队发生反政府叛乱。

examples.english: First, the autoworkers rose up, followed by the steelworkers.
examples.chinese: 先是汽车工人起来反抗，接着就是钢铁工人。

examples.english: He forecast that the people of Egypt would rise up and overthrow the government.
examples.chinese: 他预测说埃及人民会起来反抗并推翻政府。

examples.english: The people of Damascus rose up against their governors.
examples.chinese: 该国人民起来反抗他们的统治者。

examples.english: a proclamation urging the people to rise up against their masters
examples.chinese: 鼓动人们起来反抗主子的宣言

expressions.text: rise up in revolt/in arms/in rebellion

examples.english: The Maya farmers rose up in arms to demand greater democracy and freedom.
examples.chinese: 马雅的农民进行武装反抗，要求得到更多的民主和自由。

examples.english: The troops would rise up in open rebellion if we tried to make them march any further.
examples.chinese: 如果我们要求这些部队再往前行进的话，他们就可能公开反抗起来了。

examples.english: At Odessa, the sailors of the Imperial navy mutinied.
examples.chinese: 在敖德萨，帝国海军的水兵们发生哗变。

examples.english: Army factions mutinied against orders from Beijing.
examples.chinese: 军队派系反抗政府的命令。

centers.english: someone who takes part in a rebellion

examples.english: The rebels attacked an airfield, exchanging fire with Russian troops.
examples.chinese: 叛乱分子袭击了机场，与俄罗斯军队交了火。

examples.english: A large number of rebels escaped to the east as the army closed in on Jaffra.
examples.chinese: 当军队逼近贾夫拉时，大批叛乱分子逃往东部。

examples.english: Rebel forces have attacked the town of Kandahar.
examples.chinese: 叛军攻击了坎大哈。

examples.english: The rebel leader has repeated his demands for the release of political prisoners.
examples.chinese: 反叛分子的首领一再要求释放政治犯。

examples.english: Having taken control of the capital city, the revolutionaries proceeded to form a new government.
examples.chinese: 革命者控制了首都以后，就着手组建一个新的政府。

examples.english: Garcia Gutierrez wrote two plays with revolutionaries as their heroes.
examples.chinese: 加西亚·古铁雷斯写了两个剧本，都以革命者为主人公。

examples.english: When revolutionary forces marched into Havana, Castro and Che Guevara took control of the army.
examples.chinese: 革命军进入哈瓦纳，卡斯特罗和切·格瓦拉掌握了军权。

examples.english: My father taught me several revolutionary songs.
examples.chinese: 父亲教了我几首革命歌曲。

examples.english: The guerrillas began their assault on March 8th.
examples.chinese: 游击队在3月8日发动进攻。

examples.english: Red Cross officials condemned the treatment that imprisoned guerrillas have received.
examples.chinese: 红十字会官员谴责了被关押的游击队员所遭受的待遇。

examples.english: Four Western tourists held by armed guerrillas in Kashmir began their seventh month in captivity today.
examples.chinese: 四名西方游客被克什米尔的武装游击队劫持，今天是第七个月了。

examples.english: Poor peasants were the first recruits to the guerrilla forces.
examples.chinese: 穷苦的农民是游击队的第一批新兵。

examples.english: In Greece, guerrilla warfare war between guerrillas and an army raged on.
examples.chinese: 在希腊，游击战正打得十分激烈。

examples.english: Ralph Fiennes plays an idealistic freedom fighter.
examples.chinese: 拉尔夫·法因斯扮演了一名理想主义的自由战士。

examples.english: Young enthusiasts drove across the border to join the freedom fighters who had appealed to the world for help.
examples.chinese: 热血青年驾车通过边境，加入向全世界吁请帮助的自由斗士队伍。

centers.english: someone who encourages rebellion

examples.english: The riots were the work of political agitators.
examples.chinese: 这些骚乱是政治煽动者造成的结果。

examples.english: The genuine protestors were joined by outside agitators, intent on encouraging violence.
examples.chinese: 旨在助长暴力的局外煽动者加入了真正的抗议者队伍。

examples.english: The Global Communications Group links ecological and other political activists via the Net.
examples.chinese: 全球通讯组织通过互联网把生态及其他政治活动积极分子联系在一起。

examples.english: Clinton's AIDS ‘czar’ resigned after being criticized by gay activists for being weak.
examples.chinese: 克林顿政府内负责艾滋病事务的“大人物”在受到同性恋积极分子批评其作风软弱后辞职。

examples.english: Pablo Picasso was for a long time regarded as a dangerous subversive.
examples.chinese: 帕勃罗·毕加索长期被认为是个危险的颠覆分子。

examples.english: the kidnap and torture of a suspected subversive
examples.chinese: 绑架并拷打一名有嫌疑的颠覆分子

examples.english: CIA agents infiltrated the group, looking for alleged subversives.
examples.chinese: 中央情报局特工渗透进该组织，寻找有嫌疑的颠覆分子。

examples.english: The loyalty oath was intended to protect students from so-called subversive teachers.
examples.chinese: 效忠宣誓的目的是保护学生免受所谓的颠覆教师的影响。

centers.english: actions, speeches etc that encourage rebellion
centers.chinese: 煽动叛乱的行为、言论等

examples.english: Hu was arrested on charges of sedition.
examples.chinese: 胡被指控犯有煽动罪而遭逮捕。

examples.english: The clubs were suspected of being centres of sedition.
examples.chinese: 俱乐部被怀疑是搞煽动活动的中心。

examples.english: He was sentenced to three years in prison for possession of seditious literature literature that encourages sedition.
examples.chinese: 他因藏有煽动性著作而被判处三年徒刑。

examples.english: Seventeen people were convicted of subversion following a coup attempt.
examples.chinese: 政变未遂后有17个人被判有颠覆罪。

examples.english: Many defectors provided the McCarthy committees with evidence of political subversion.
examples.chinese: 许多变节者向麦卡锡委员会提供了政治颠覆活动的证据。

examples.english: The magazine was banned by the government for being subversive encouraging subversion.
examples.chinese: 这本杂志因具颠覆性而被政府禁止了。

examples.english: subversive propaganda
examples.chinese: 颠覆性宣传

centers.english: to spy

examples.english: A former US diplomat has confessed to spying.
examples.chinese: 一名前美国外交官承认从事过间谍活动。

examples.english: For years the satellite spied on secret weapon bases.
examples.chinese: 这颗卫星对秘密武器基地暗中监视了多年。

examples.english: Philby had been spying for the Russians for several years.
examples.chinese: 菲尔比曾为俄国当了几年的间谍。

examples.english: The 11 men had allegedly been involved in spying.
examples.chinese: 这11名男子被指从事间谍活动。

examples.english: He had been accused of spying and held without trial for ten years.
examples.chinese: 他被指控从事间谍活动，未经审判就被拘禁了十年。

examples.english: Zakharov, a KGB agent, was charged with espionage.
examples.chinese: 克格勃特工扎哈罗夫被指控从事间谍活动。

examples.english: The banks take precautions to prevent any attempts at industrial espionage while confidential documents are on the premises.
examples.chinese: 银行里都有机密文件，所以他们采取预防措施以防任何商业间谍活动。

examples.english: Before becoming President, the general was in the pay of the CIA.
examples.chinese: 将军在当选总统前受雇于中央情报局。

examples.english: There were persistent rumours that the former head of British Intelligence was in the pay of the Soviet Union.
examples.chinese: 一直有传闻说英国情报局的前领导被苏联收买了。

examples.english: The Communists effectively infiltrated the government and the political parties.
examples.chinese: 间谍有效地潜入了政府以及各政治党派。

examples.english: Police attempts to infiltrate neo-Nazi groups have been largely unsuccessful.
examples.chinese: 警方潜入新纳粹组织的行动基本上没有成功。

examples.english: Everyone knew the organization had been infiltrated by government agents, but could not prove it.
examples.chinese: 每个人都知道组织内部混进了政府的特工人员，但无法证实。

examples.english: There has always been a danger of enemy infiltrators in the organization.
examples.chinese: 历来都有敌人混进组织内部的危险。

examples.english: Finally, weakened by infiltration and sabotage, Black Aid Action folded in 1967.
examples.chinese: 援助黑人行动由于敌人势力的渗透和蓄意破坏，力量受到了削弱，最终在1967年停止活动。

examples.english: His novels deal with the world of spies, espionage and counterespionage.
examples.chinese: 他的小说写的都是间谍世界里的间谍和反间谍活动。

examples.english: the murder of two counterespionage officers
examples.chinese: 两名反间谍官员的被害

centers.english: someone who spies

examples.english: He was suspected of having been a spy during the war.
examples.chinese: 他被怀疑在战时当过间谍。

examples.english: The job of the secret police was to hunt down spies and traitors.
examples.chinese: 秘密警察的工作是追捕间谍和叛徒。

examples.english: Wray was filmed passing money to an enemy agent.
examples.chinese: 雷被拍下来正在把钱交给一名敌方特工。

examples.english: a book of memoirs written by a retired MI5 agent, Peter Wright
examples.chinese: 军情五处一名退休特工彼得·赖特写的一本回忆录

examples.english: He had been a secret agent of the enemy all along.
examples.chinese: 他一直是敌人派来的特务。

examples.english: The government suspects there is a mole who is leaking information to the press.
examples.chinese: 政府怀疑有内奸向新闻界泄露情报。

examples.english: The mole was discovered to be the 25-year-old secretary of the minister.
examples.chinese: 内奸被查出是25岁的部长秘书。

centers.english: the opinion that people have about a person, organization etc
centers.chinese: 人们对某人、某组织等的看法

examples.english: Despite her reputation as a trouble-maker, she was promoted to department manager.
examples.chinese: 尽管她是个出了名的惹是生非的人，但还是被提升为部门经理。

examples.english: a brilliant director with a reputation for thoroughness
examples.chinese: 以一丝不苟闻名的杰出导演

examples.english: I am surprised that a company with your good reputation would produce such poor quality goods.
examples.chinese: 贵公司有着如此良好的声誉竟然生产出这么劣质的产品，真是让我吃惊。

examples.english: She found his terrible reputation one of his greatest attractions.
examples.chinese: 她觉得他那糟糕的名声恰恰是他最吸引她的地方。

examples.english: The school had an excellent academic reputation.
examples.chinese: 该校学术声望极高。

examples.english: The area has a really bad reputation but it isn't as bad as people think.
examples.chinese: 这个地区声名狼藉，但实际上并没有人们所想的那么糟。

examples.english: The town's Dolphin Centre had gained a reputation as one of the best leisure complexes in the country.
examples.chinese: 镇上的海豚中心赢得了全国最佳综合休闲场所的声誉。

examples.english: The mill has the reputation of being one of the most energy-efficient in the world.
examples.chinese: 这家工厂享有世界上能源效率最高的工厂的声誉。

examples.english: The restaurant certainly lived up to its reputation; the food was delicious.
examples.chinese: 这家餐馆当然不负盛名：食物美味可口。

examples.english: Perth is proud of its image as a breeding ground for ‘don't-take-no-for-an-answer’ entrepreneurs.
examples.chinese: 珀斯以铁腕企业家的摇篮这一形象而自豪。

examples.english: The President's advisers said it would be bad for his image to be photographed with union leaders.
examples.chinese: 总统的顾问说，让人拍到与工会领导人在一起的照片对总统的形象不利。

examples.english: The party is seeking to improve its image with female voters.
examples.chinese: 该党在力求改善它在女性选民心中的形象。

examples.english: The princess tried to project an image of herself as serious and hardworking.
examples.chinese: 公主想为自己树立起认真苦干的形象。

examples.english: He's a determined man and he values his good name.
examples.chinese: 他这人意志坚定，而且很看重自己的声誉。

expressions.text: have a name for doing something

examples.english: This man has a name for making tough business deals.
examples.chinese: 这个人以善于做成棘手的生意闻名。

examples.english: Teenagers tend to get a bad name for being moody.
examples.chinese: 青少年往往会被冠上情绪多变的坏名声。

examples.english: Marks and Spencer have made a name for themselves as a producer of high quality goods at reasonable prices.
examples.chinese: 玛莎因生产质量高、价格公道的产品而出名。

examples.english: The class system in Great Britain encourages people to be very aware of their social standing.
examples.chinese: 英国的等级制度促使人们对自己的社会地位非常在意。

examples.english: This legal case is very likely to damage the company's professional standing.
examples.chinese: 这起官司很有可能会破坏这家公司的行业名声。

examples.english: Jacques Tati was a man of international standing in the world of screen comedy.
examples.chinese: 雅克·塔蒂在喜剧电影界享有国际声望。

examples.english: The teaching profession has lost the prestige it had in former times.
examples.chinese: 教学专业已经失去了过去曾有过的威望。

examples.english: Hosting the Olympic Games would add to our country's international prestige.
examples.chinese: 主办奥运会可以提高我国在国际上的声望。

examples.english: Becoming a film star confers status, power, prestige and wealth.
examples.chinese: 成为影星会带来地位、权力、声誉和财富。

examples.english: At that time there were no other universities in England equal in stature to Oxford and Cambridge.
examples.chinese: 那时候，英国没有其他大学与牛津和剑桥齐名。

examples.english: As he got older, Picasso's stature as an artist increased.
examples.chinese: 毕加索老了以后，他作为艺术家的声望也就提高了。

examples.english: a British architect of international stature
examples.chinese: 一位享有国际名望的英国建筑师

examples.english: A person's character is very important to me when I decide who I want to work with.
examples.chinese: 当我选择和谁一起工作时，这个人的名声对我来说是很重要的。

examples.english: Her husband was a man of good character, well-liked and respected by his colleagues.
examples.chinese: 她丈夫声誉良好，受到同事的喜爱与尊敬。

centers.english: having a good reputation

examples.english: If you are going to be out late, book a taxi from a reputable firm.
examples.chinese: 如果你要深夜外出，就要从声誉良好的公司预订一辆出租车。

examples.english: We chose that company because we thought they were reputable.
examples.chinese: 我们选择了那家公司是因为我们认为他们声誉良好。

examples.english: Most reputable suppliers advertise in Birds magazine.
examples.chinese: 大多数有良好声誉的供应商都在《群鸟》杂志上做广告。

examples.english: Only buy floppy disks that have come from a reputable source.
examples.chinese: 只从声誉良好的供货商那里购买软盘。

examples.english: I am a partner in one of Cleveland's oldest and most prestigious law firms.
examples.chinese: 我是克利夫兰的一家历史最悠久、最有威望的法律事务所的合伙人。

examples.english: The anxiously awaited invitations to the prestigious end-of-year dance began to arrive.
examples.chinese: 人们开始收到热切期待的著名岁末舞会的请柬。

examples.english: Women are attaining powerful and prestigious managerial positions.
examples.chinese: 妇女开始获得有权势、有威望的管理职位。

examples.english: Richards is well thought of within his own firm.
examples.chinese: 理查兹在自己的公司里很受敬重。

examples.english: Millet's work is less well thought of today than it was during his lifetime.
examples.chinese: 如今人们对米利特的作品的评价不如他在世时的那么高了。

examples.english: There are always prestige neighbourhoods where only the wealthy or successful can afford to live.
examples.chinese: 总有一些有气派的住宅区，只有富人或成功人士才能住得起。

examples.english: champagne, caviar, truffles and other prestige goods
examples.chinese: 香槟酒、鱼子酱、松露菌及其他高级商品

centers.english: to damage the reputation of someone or something
centers.chinese: 损坏某人或某物的名声

examples.english: If a representative gets drunk at a convention, it may harm their firm's reputation.
examples.chinese: 如果代表在会上喝醉了，那可能会损坏公司的名声。

examples.english: Sabine was completely loyal to you. She would never do anything to damage your reputation.
examples.chinese: 萨拜因对你是百分之百忠诚的，她绝对不会做出损害你名誉的事来。

examples.english: Students who are rude and scruffy give the school a bad name.
examples.chinese: 粗鲁邋遢的学生会玷污学校的名声。

examples.english: The regular brawling and violence in the bar had given it a bad name.
examples.chinese: 这家酒吧里经常发生斗殴和暴力事件，这使它名声不好。

examples.english: He was the type of person that gives insurance salesmen a bad name.
examples.chinese: 他是那种玷污保险公司推销员名誉的人。

examples.english: This is exactly the kind of incident that brings international companies into disrepute.
examples.chinese: 这正是那种使跨国公司声名狼藉的事。

examples.english: The officers were charged with bringing the police force into disrepute.
examples.chinese: 这些警察被指控败坏了警察部门的名声。

examples.english: There was a plot by certain members of the opposition to discredit the government.
examples.chinese: 反对派的某些成员策划了一起要败坏政府名声的阴谋。

examples.english: The old leaders were discredited by the massive defeats at Verdun and Flanders.
examples.chinese: 这些老将领因在凡尔登和佛兰德的大败而名誉扫地。!

examples.english: Through your selfishness, you have brought discredit on yourself and your whole family.
examples.chinese: 你的自私给你自己和全家人都带来了不光彩。

examples.english: All too often politicians discredit themselves by engaging in character assassination.
examples.chinese: 政客们往往在诽谤他人之时破坏了自己的名声。

expressions.text: a slur/stain on somebody's character/reputation etc

examples.english: Baker accused the press of casting a slur on his reputation.
examples.chinese: 贝克指责新闻界中伤他的名誉。

examples.english: He was discharged from the army without a stain on his character.
examples.chinese: 他退伍时声誉完好。

examples.english: Kingsley denies all the rumours, saying he's the victim of a vicious smear campaign.
examples.chinese: 金斯利否认了所有的谣言，说他是恶毒的造谣活动的受害者。

examples.english: Allegations of instability, untrustworthiness and lack of political judgement - all these were part of the whispering campaign against her.
examples.chinese: 性格喜怒无常、不可靠以及缺乏政治判断力—所有这些指责都是针对她而来的造谣中伤。

centers.english: a person's name

examples.english: What's your name?
examples.chinese: 你叫什么名字？

examples.english: I'm not very good at remembering people's names.
examples.chinese: 我不是很擅长记人名。

examples.english: His name is Raymond Ford.
examples.chinese: 他的名字叫雷蒙德·福特。

examples.english: Ayrton Senna's full name was Ayrton Senna da Silva.
examples.chinese: 艾尔顿·森纳的全名是艾尔顿·森纳·达·席尔瓦。

examples.english: She must have written to Laura without signing her name.
examples.chinese: 她写信给劳拉肯定没有署名。

examples.english: The doctor will call your name when he is ready to see you.
examples.chinese: 医生可以见你的时候会喊你的名字。

examples.english: She didn't mention you by name, but I'm sure it was you she was talking about.
examples.chinese: 她没有指名道姓，但我肯定她是在说你。

examples.english: Her first name is Liz. I don't know her surname.
examples.chinese: 她的名字是莉兹，我不知道她姓什么。

examples.english: Fill out the form with your last name, followed by your given name.
examples.chinese: 在表格中填上你的姓，后面再写名字。

examples.english: My mother's Christian name was Mary.
examples.chinese: 我母亲的教名叫玛丽。

examples.english: John F. Kennedy's middle name was Fitzgerald.
examples.chinese: 约翰·F.肯尼迪的中间名是菲茨杰拉德。

examples.english: Vicki won't tell anyone her second name.
examples.chinese: 薇姬不肯告诉任何人她的中间名。

examples.english: I know his first name, but I can't remember his last name.
examples.chinese: 我记得他的名字，但不记得他的姓。

examples.english: Smith is the most common English surname.
examples.chinese: 史密斯是英语中最常见的姓氏。

examples.english: My mother kept her maiden name when she got married. did not change her name to her husband's name
examples.chinese: 我母亲结婚时保留了婚前的姓。

examples.english: Joseph Conrad's original family name was Korzeniowski.
examples.chinese: 约瑟夫·康拉德本姓科热日尼奥夫斯基。

examples.english: He died leaving no children to carry on the family name.
examples.chinese: 他死后没有留下孩子继承家族姓氏。

examples.english: There's no need to write out your full name. Just your initials will do.
examples.chinese: 不需要写全名，首字母就可以了。

examples.english: a suitcase marked with the initials JR
examples.chinese: 上面标有首字母JR的旅行箱

examples.english: The title ‘Ms’ became much more popular in the 1980s.
examples.chinese: 20世纪80年代，“女士”的称呼较以前大为普及。

centers.english: a name used by your friends and family that is not your real name
centers.chinese: 朋友和家人称呼你的名字，但不是你真正的名字

examples.english: At school, her nickname was Carrots because of her red hair.
examples.chinese: 学校里，她外号叫“胡萝卜”，因为她长着红头发。

examples.english: His black cloak earned him the nickname ‘Dracula’.
examples.chinese: 他的黑斗篷使他得了个“吸血鬼”的外号。

examples.english: Her pet name for him is Tiger.
examples.chinese: 她给他起了个爱称叫“阿虎”。

examples.english: She had pet names for all her grandchildren -- Curly, Longlegs, and Coco.
examples.chinese: 她给所有的孙子孙女都起了爱称——鬈毛、长脚、椰子。

centers.english: a name that someone uses that is not their real name

examples.english: None of them had ever heard of Giles Williams, which was clearly a false name.
examples.chinese: 没人听说过贾尔斯·威廉斯这个人，那显然是个假名。

examples.english: It is illegal to give a false name to your employer.
examples.chinese: 向雇主提供假名是非法的。

examples.english: The woman was a foreigner travelling under a false name.
examples.chinese: 那女人是个外国人，用假名四处旅行。

examples.english: Greta Garbo was the stage name of Greta Gustavson, born in Stockholm in 1905.
examples.chinese: 葛丽泰·嘉宝是葛丽泰·古斯塔夫森的艺名，她1905年她出生于斯德哥尔摩。

examples.english: ‘Saki’ was the pseudonym of the writer H.H.Monroe.
examples.chinese: “萨基”是作家HH.门罗的笔名。

examples.english: Morton wrote a weekly column in ‘The Daily Telegraph' under the pseudonym ’Beachcomber'.
examples.chinese: 莫顿用“海滨拾荒者”的笔名在《每日电讯报》上写每周专栏。

examples.english: The name Voltaire was in fact a pen name -- his real name was Francois Marie Arouet.
examples.chinese: 伏尔泰实际上是个笔名——他真名叫弗朗索瓦·马里·阿鲁埃。

examples.english: She wrote her novels under the pen name George Eliot, because the publishers would not accept a manuscript written by a woman.
examples.chinese: 她用笔名乔治·艾略特写小说，因为出版商不愿意接受女子的来稿。

examples.english: Carlos, alias "The Jackal', is wanted by police in several countries.
examples.chinese: 卡斯，别名“胡狼”，在好几个国家里被警方通缉。

examples.english: We were introduced to Mrs Taylor, alias Meg Dods, author of the Housewife's Manual.
examples.chinese: 我们经介绍认识了泰勒夫人，泰勒夫人又名梅格·多兹，是《家庭主妇指南》的作者。

examples.english: Roberts is known to use a number of aliases, including Bill Smith, Paul Williams, and even Count Von Blixenburg.
examples.chinese: 据知罗伯茨用过许多化名，包括比尔·史密斯、保罗·威廉斯，甚至冯·布利克森堡伯爵。

examples.english: Standing there in front of me was Peter Downs, a.k.a. ‘The Leithgate Strangler’.
examples.chinese: 站在我面前的是彼得·唐斯，又名“莱斯门的杀手”。

examples.english: He had rented a car under an assumed name.
examples.chinese: 他用化名租了一辆汽车。

examples.english: She entered the private clinic under an assumed name, but the press still managed to find out.
examples.chinese: 她用化名进了一家私人诊所，可媒体还是设法知道了。

examples.english: Herbert always hated his original name, so he went by the name of David.
examples.chinese: 赫伯特一直不喜欢自己的原名，所以就跟人家说他叫戴维。

examples.english: The photographs resembled a man who lived in New York and went by the name of Ivan Denisovich.
examples.chinese: 这些照片看起来像一名住在纽约、自称是伊凡·丹尼索维奇的男子。

examples.english: They registered at the hotel under the name of Smith.
examples.chinese: 他们用史密斯这个名字在旅馆里登记。

examples.english: Bollard set up a company under the name of Mr M. Roberts.
examples.chinese: 伯拉德以M.罗伯茨先生这个名字登记成立了一家公司。

centers.english: the name of a place, thing, product etc
centers.chinese: 地方、物品、产品等的名字

examples.english: I've forgotten the name of the street where she lives.
examples.chinese: 我忘了她所住那条街的街名了。

examples.english: The village of Furnace got its name from the local industries of silver and iron smelting.
examples.chinese: 火炉村因当地冶炼银和铁的工业而得名。

expressions.text: the Chinese/French etc name for something

examples.english: The Chinese name for this plant means ‘cat's ears’.
examples.chinese: 这种植物的中文名的意思是“猫耳朵”。

examples.english: I've read one of her books, but I can't remember the title.
examples.chinese: 我看过她的一本书，不过记不起书名了。

examples.english: What's the title of this week's assignment?
examples.chinese: 这个星期的作业题目是什么?

examples.english: The film was released in the UK under the title ‘Maybe Baby’.
examples.chinese: 这部电影用《宝贝喜临门》为片名在英国发行。

examples.english: In this part of the US many of the place names are of French origin.
examples.chinese: 美国这一地区的许多地名都源自法语。

examples.english: Operation Overlord was the code name of the Normandy landing which took place in June 1944.
examples.chinese: “霸王行动”是1944年6月诺曼底登陆的代号。

examples.english: Our customers prefer goods with brand names, such as Levis or Adidas.
examples.chinese: 我们的顾客喜欢名牌产品，如李维斯或阿迪达斯。

examples.english: Dictionaries don't usually list proper names.
examples.chinese: 字典一般不收录专有名词。

examples.english: Chicago, Stephen and Mount Everest are all proper nouns.
examples.chinese: 芝加哥、斯蒂芬和珠穆朗玛峰都是专有名词。

centers.english: to have a particular name

examples.english: Hi! My name's Ted. I'm from Florida.
examples.chinese: 嗨，我名叫特德，来自佛罗里达。

examples.english: ‘Who's that man over there?’ ‘His name is Lucio Mannonetti and he owns the company.’
examples.chinese: “那人是谁？”“他名字叫卢乔·玛诺内蒂，是公司的老板。

examples.english: There's someone called Russell on the phone for you.
examples.chinese: 有个叫拉塞尔的人打电话找你。

examples.english: What's the new teacher called?
examples.chinese: 新来的老师叫什么名字？

examples.english: They are in favour of what is called ‘sustainable development’.
examples.chinese: 他们支持大家所称的“可持续发展”。

examples.english: It was scarcely big enough to be called a school - it was more like a garage.
examples.chinese: 这样的规模简直不能称之为学校—那更像是一个车库。

examples.english: Their new baby is named Caroline.
examples.chinese: 他们的新生宝宝名叫卡罗琳。

examples.english: She went to the movies with some guy named Rudi.
examples.chinese: 她和一个叫鲁迪的人去看电影。

examples.english: This area is known as Little Odessa because there are a lot of Russians living there.
examples.chinese: 这个地方被称为“小敖德萨”，因为住着许多俄罗斯人。

expressions.text: be known to somebody as something

examples.english: He was known to his friends as Rambo.
examples.chinese: 他的朋友都叫他兰博。

examples.english: William Shatner is better known as Captain Kirk.
examples.chinese: 威廉·沙特纳更为人熟悉的名字是柯克船长。

examples.english: Her first published novel was entitled ‘Rivers of Passion’.
examples.chinese: 她发表的第一部小说叫《激情的河流》。

examples.english: Biko contributed a column to the student newspaper which was entitled ‘I Write What I Like’.
examples.chinese: 比科为学生报写专栏，题为《我写我爱》。

examples.english: This kind of chilli powder sometimes goes by the name of cayenne pepper.
examples.chinese: 这种辣椒粉有时被叫做卡宴红辣椒粉。

examples.english: The mixture of fish, rice and eggs goes by the name of kedgeree in most restaurants.
examples.chinese: 这种用鱼、大米和鸡蛋混合做成的东西在多数的餐厅里都叫做印度什锦烩饭。

examples.english: This process, in which liquid metal is poured into moulds, is usually termed die-casting.
examples.chinese: 把金属熔液倒入铸模的这个过程通常被称做压铸。

centers.english: to give a name to someone or something

examples.english: My mother wanted to call me Yuri.
examples.chinese: 我母亲想把我叫做尤里。

examples.english: Guidebooks call Chicago ‘The Windy City’.
examples.chinese: 旅游书上称芝加哥为“风城”。

examples.english: This is what psychologists call ‘body language’.
examples.chinese: 这就是心理学家所谓的“身体语言”。

examples.english: Have they named the baby yet?
examples.chinese: 他们给宝宝起名字了没有?

examples.english: We named our daughter Sarah.
examples.chinese: 我们给女儿起名叫萨拉。

expressions.text: name somebody/something after somebody/ name somebody/something for somebody

examples.english: Bill was named after his father.
examples.chinese: 比尔以他父亲的名字命名。

examples.english: The new building is going to be named for Ronald Reagan.
examples.chinese: 这幢新大楼将以罗纳德·里根的名字命名。

examples.english: They christened him Patrick John.
examples.chinese: 他们给他起了教名，叫帕特里克·约翰。

examples.english: She was christened Jessica, but everyone calls her Jess.
examples.chinese: 她的教名是杰茜卡，但大家都叫她杰丝。

examples.english: You can rename, delete, or copy files very easily.
examples.chinese: 把档案重新命名、删除或复制都非常容易。

examples.english: New Amsterdam was renamed New York in the 17th Century.
examples.chinese: 新阿姆斯特丹于17世纪改名为纽约。

centers.english: to publicly announce the name of someone

examples.english: She refused to name the father of her child.
examples.chinese: 她不肯公开孩子父亲的名字。

examples.english: Police have named the dead woman as Annabel Thomas.
examples.chinese: 警方公布了死者的名字，是安娜贝尔·托马斯。

examples.english: The victim identified her attacker in court.
examples.chinese: 受害者当庭指认了行凶者。

examples.english: Greg had to identify the body of his wife.
examples.chinese: 格雷格无奈地辨认妻子的尸体。

centers.english: when you cannot remember or do not use the exact name
centers.chinese: 记不起或不使用确切的名字

examples.english: She was with what's-his-name - you know, the one who wears orange jeans.
examples.chinese: 她和那个叫什么来着在一起—你知道，就是那个穿橙色牛仔裤的人。

examples.english: Send the report to what's-her-name in Accounting.
examples.chinese: 把这份报告发给会计部的那个叫什么来着。

examples.english: Whenever you ask her about anything it's always ‘so-and-so says this’, or ‘so-and-so says that’ -- she never gives her own honest opinion.
examples.chinese: 每次问她什么事情，她总说“某某人这样说”，或者“某某人那样说”—她从来不坦白说出自己的想法。

examples.english: They're always gossiping about so-and-so having an affair with so-and-so.
examples.chinese: 他们总是在说三道四，说哪个人和哪个人私通。

examples.english: What you need is a what's-its-name ... a torque wrench.
examples.chinese: 你需要的是那个叫什么来着·…一把转矩扳手。

examples.english: Did you see that boy with the whatsit round his head?
examples.chinese: 你看到那个头上戴着什么来着的男孩吗?

examples.english: ‘I'm going to have a whatchamacallit when I have a baby’ - ‘What, you mean an epidural?’
examples.chinese: “我生孩子的时候要用那种叫什么来着。”“什么，你是说无痛分娩吗？”

examples.english: They have to use a special thingamijig to undo the nuts.
examples.chinese: 他们不得不用一个专门的什么东西敲开这些坚果。

examples.english: What's that plastic thingy called?
examples.chinese: 那个塑料的玩意儿是什么？

examples.english: She kept pressing the buttons on the remote control doodad.
examples.chinese: 她不停按着那个遥控东西上的按钮。

examples.english: What's this little doohickey for?
examples.chinese: 这小玩意是干什么用的？

examples.english: Americans are very proud of their country -- they're always saying that such and such is the biggest in the whole world.
examples.chinese: 美国人很为自己的国家感到骄傲—他们总是在说这样那样的东西是全世界最大的。

expressions.text: such and such a person/place etc

examples.english: You can say to me, I want such and such a photographer, and I'll try to get them for you.
examples.chinese: 你可以告诉我，我需要这样那样的摄影师，我会想办法帮你去找的。

centers.english: someone whose name is not known

examples.english: The writer of the poem is anonymous.
examples.chinese: 这首诗的作者不详。

examples.english: $50,000 has been given to the charity by an anonymous donor from Utah.
examples.chinese: 一位犹他州人匿名捐献五万美元给该慈善机构。

examples.english: I received anonymous phone calls warning me not to go to the police about what I'd seen.
examples.chinese: 我接到一个匿名电话，警告我不要向警方报告我所看见的情况。

examples.english: One source, who wished to remain anonymous, said that he had seen the woman go into his room.
examples.chinese: 有个不愿透露姓名的人说，他看到那女人进了他的房间。

examples.english: He sent the documents anonymously to a local newspaper.
examples.chinese: 他匿名把文件寄给了当地一家报社。

examples.english: If you are needed as a witness, your anonymity will be guaranteed we will promise that your name will not be made known to other people.
examples.chinese: 如果我们需要你出庭作证，就保证不会公开你的姓名。

examples.english: An unnamed bidder paid $23 million for the painting.
examples.chinese: 一位没有公开姓名的出价人用2,300万美元买了这幅画。

examples.english: The newspaper received the information from an unnamed source.
examples.chinese: 报社是从一位匿名人士那儿得到的消息。

examples.english: Five men were wounded by an unidentified gunman in Belfast city centre yesterday.
examples.chinese: 昨天在贝尔法斯特市中心，五名男子被一个身份不明的持枪歹徒打伤。

examples.english: The three bodies found in the river remain unidentified.
examples.chinese: 河里发现的三具尸体仍然身份不明。

examples.english: An unidentified caller contacted the police and gave the names of the men involved in the robbery.
examples.chinese: 一位不明身份的人打电话跟警方联系，告诉他们参与抢劫者的名字。

examples.english: He tried to go incognito but his bizarre disguise made him stand out even more.
examples.chinese: 他试图隐匿身份，但是他那身奇怪的乔装打扮却使他更显眼了。

examples.english: She said the flowers were from an unknown admirer.
examples.chinese: 她说这些花是一个不知名的爱慕者送的。

examples.english: We met near the Tomb of the Unknown Soldier.
examples.chinese: 我们在无名战士墓地附近碰头。

examples.english: Most of the stars in the movie are unknown to US audiences.
examples.chinese: 这部电影里的大多数明星都不为美国观众所熟悉。

examples.english: No one gives much thought to the nameless millions who work in our factories.
examples.chinese: 没有人仔细想过我们工厂里数百万默默无闻的工人。

examples.english: the nameless victims of the nation's civil war
examples.chinese: 国家内战中无名的受害者

centers.english: when the name of someone or something is not suitable
centers.chinese: 某人或某物的名字不合适

examples.english: I went to see the playwright's so-called masterpiece and was very disappointed by it.
examples.chinese: 我去看了该剧作家那部所谓的代表作，感到非常失望。

examples.english: A lot has been written in recent years about the so-called ‘male menopause’.
examples.chinese: 近年来有许多有关所谓的“男性更年期”的著作。

examples.english: The Palace of Justice - a terrible misnomer - was set on fire by the workers.
examples.chinese: 正义殿—一个多么不恰当的名字—被工人放火烧了。

examples.english: The term ‘black-headed gull’ is something of a misnomer, since the bird's head is actually brown.
examples.chinese: 叫“黑头鸥”有点欠妥，因为这种鸟的头部实际上是棕色的。

examples.english: It's fairly clear that he is only the nominal head of the local party -- in fact he's got no authority at all.
examples.chinese: 很明显他只是这个地方政党名义上的领袖—实际上他一点权力也没有。

examples.english: The daughter had all the brains and did all the accounts -- the son was just the nominal boss of the business.
examples.chinese: 女儿非常聪明，所有账务都由她来处理—儿子只是公司名义上的老板。

examples.english: It's a revolutionary party in name only -- in fact it's quite conservative.
examples.chinese: 这只是个名义上的革命党一—实际上它很保守。

examples.english: He will be my husband in name only - he knows I'm really in love with you.
examples.chinese: 他将只是我名义上的丈夫—他知道我很爱你。

examples.english: The self-styled Leader of the New Republic refused all attempts at negotiation by the former government.
examples.chinese: 新共和国自封的领导人拒绝前政府的一切谈判要求。

examples.english: These self-styled complementary therapists make a fortune out of preying on the gullibility of often very sick people.
examples.chinese: 这些自命为辅助治疗专家的人，利用患重病之人容易轻信别人的弱点，大发横财。

centers.english: the leader of a group or country

examples.english: The report has raised strong opposition from radical black leaders.
examples.chinese: 这篇报道引起了一些激进黑人领袖的强烈反对。

examples.english: 12,000 party members will vote next week to elect a new leader.
examples.chinese: 12,000名党员将于下星期投票选举新的领导人。

examples.english: the leader of the Communist party
examples.chinese: 共产党的领导人

examples.english: The leaders of the rebel movement have been arrested.
examples.chinese: 这次叛乱的领导者已被逮捕。

examples.english: World leaders are meeting in Geneva today to consider the peace plan.
examples.chinese: 大国首脑今天在日内瓦会晤，讨论和平计划。

examples.english: To function effectively, a party leader has to be attentive to people's needs.
examples.chinese: 党的领导人必须关心人民的需要，才能有效地行使职能。

examples.english: So far, business leaders have been encouraged by the government's economic policy.
examples.chinese: 到目前为止，商业领导人受到了政府经济政策的鼓励。

examples.english: Three members of the ‘Hells Angels’ group were convicted of the murder of a rival gang leader.
examples.chinese: “地狱天使”组织的三个成员被判谋杀敌对帮派的一名首领。

examples.english: Peter was a born leader, and his chairmanship of the WWF could not have been more effective.
examples.chinese: 彼得是个天生的领袖，他领导世界自然保护基金会非常有成效。

examples.english: The leader of the opposition has demanded an early election.
examples.chinese: 反对党领袖要求提前选举。

examples.english: Party members had lost confidence in the leadership.
examples.chinese: 党员们对领导层已失去信心。

examples.english: Turkey has lacked any clear leadership since the collapse of the coalition government four months ago.
examples.chinese: 土耳其自四个月以前联合政府解体以后，就没有明确的领导人。

examples.english: The leadership of the Association was criticized for not making its plans more easily accessible.
examples.chinese: 协会的领导层被批评没有制定出切实可行的计划。

examples.english: President Chirac visited Japan this week.
examples.chinese: 希拉克总统本周访问了日本。

examples.english: It was Dever's job to advise the president on his public image.
examples.chinese: 德弗的工作是为总统的公众形象做顾问。

examples.english: the President of Egypt
examples.chinese: 埃及总统

examples.english: a presidential election
examples.chinese: 总统大选

examples.english: the 2004 presidential campaign
examples.chinese: 2004年的总统竞选活动

examples.english: President Clinton was the first head of state to sign the Comprehensive Test Ban Treaty.
examples.chinese: 克林顿总统是第一位签署《全面禁止核武器试验条约》的国家元首。

examples.english: Twenty-one heads of state will meet at the annual World Trade summit.
examples.chinese: 21位国家元首将在一年一度的世贸峰会上会晤。

examples.english: The British Prime Minister lives at 10 Downing Street.
examples.chinese: 英国首相住在唐宁街十号。

examples.english: Hashimoto was elected prime minister in 1998.
examples.chinese: 桥本于1998年当选首相。

examples.english: the Prime Minister of India
examples.chinese: 印度总理

examples.english: King Priam was a firm, but just ruler.
examples.chinese: 普里阿摩斯国王是一位强硬但公正的统治者。

examples.english: Ramses II, ruler of Egypt in 13,000 BC
examples.chinese: 公元前13,000年的埃及统治者拉美西斯二世

examples.english: Some regimes are governed by hereditary rulers.
examples.chinese: 一些政府由世袭统治者统治。

examples.english: a portrait of King George VI
examples.chinese: 国王乔治六世的肖像

examples.english: King Juan Carlos of Spain
examples.chinese: 西班牙国王胡安·卡洛斯

examples.english: the King of Morocco
examples.chinese: 摩洛哥国王

examples.english: a new biography of Queen Elizabeth
examples.chinese: 伊丽莎白女王的新传记

examples.english: the Queen of Sweden
examples.chinese: 瑞典女王

examples.english: the King and Queen of Belgium
examples.chinese: 比利时国王和王后

examples.english: The president is essentially a figurehead: the real power lies with the prime minister.
examples.chinese: 总统实质上有名无实：实权掌握在总理手里。

examples.english: He was never more than a mere figurehead in the negotiations.
examples.chinese: 他在谈判中从来都只是一个傀儡而已。

centers.english: to be the leader

examples.english: Margaret Haley was the leader of the Chicago Teachers’ Federation.
examples.chinese: 玛格丽特·黑利是芝加哥教师联盟的领导人。

examples.english: Dang was born, raised and schooled to be a future leader of his country.
examples.chinese: 丹格生来就是国家未来的领袖，他所受的培养和教育也都是为了这个目的。

examples.english: Ken, who was two years older than I, was our leader.
examples.chinese: 肯比我年长两岁，是我们的领袖。

examples.english: Karekin is the spiritual leader of more than 6 million Armenians worldwide.
examples.chinese: 卡雷金是全世界六百多万亚美尼亚人的精神领袖。

expressions.gram: transitive verb not usually in progressive

examples.english: For many years, India's Congress Party was led by Mrs Indira Gandhi.
examples.chinese: 印度大会党由英迪拉·甘地夫人领导了许多年。

examples.english: Jaruzelski led the country's Communist regime for nine years.
examples.chinese: 雅鲁泽尔斯基领导了该国的共产党政权达九年之久。

examples.english: 67% of voters said they would not trust him to lead the country.
examples.chinese: 67%的选民说他们不相信他可以领导国家。

examples.english: His forceful personality concealed his weak leadership and poor political acumen.
examples.chinese: 他个性坚强，掩盖了他在领导才能和政治敏感度方面的不足。

examples.english: We want to identify employees who have leadership potential.
examples.chinese: 我们想在员工中发掘有潜在领导才能的人。

expressions.text: under somebody's leadership/under the leadership of

examples.english: The marketing department was much more focused under his leadership.
examples.chinese: 市场部在他的领导之下干得更加用心了。

examples.english: Harvard has a formidable team of black academics, working under the leadership of Henry Louis Gates.
examples.chinese: 哈佛大学有一支卓越的黑人教师队伍，由亨利·路易斯·盖茨领导。

examples.english: He took office in January and quickly established his leadership style.
examples.chinese: 他于1月份上任，很快就确立了自己的领导风格。

examples.english: The organization is fronted by Keith Flynn, who has been associated with other political groups in the past.
examples.chinese: 这个组织由基思·弗林领导，他过去与其他政治组织有来往。

examples.english: Henry VIII ruled England from 1509 to 1547.
examples.chinese: 亨利八世于1509至1547年间统治英格兰。

examples.english: Mary, Queen of Scots, only ruled for six years.
examples.chinese: 苏格兰女王玛丽只统治了六年。

examples.english: At that time, Persia was divided into several provinces, ruled by local khans.
examples.chinese: 那个时候，波斯划分成几个省，分别由地方可汗统治。

centers.english: conventional

examples.english: Rosemary led a quiet, conventional life until she went to college.
examples.chinese: 罗丝玛丽在上大学前，过着一种平静、传统的生活。

examples.english: Her outrageous stage act is seen as a challenge to conventional morality.
examples.chinese: 她在舞台上的大胆表演被认为是向传统道德发出的挑战。

examples.english: Acupuncture may work, but I still believe in a more conventional approach to medicine.
examples.chinese: 针刺疗法可能有用，可我仍旧相信更加传统的疗法。

examples.english: She was dressed very conventionally in a dull grey suit.
examples.chinese: 她穿着非常传统的暗灰色套装。

examples.english: Dickinson was very spiritual but not conventionally religious.
examples.chinese: 迪金森富有灵性，但不是传统意义上的信教。

examples.english: Your problem is that you are too conformist in your thinking.
examples.chinese: 你的问题在于你的思维方式太墨守成规了。

examples.english: Our children's creativity is being beaten down by the conformist educational system.
examples.chinese: 我们孩子的创造性正受到守旧的教育体系的压制。

examples.english: He'd never dream of trying something like that - he's too much of a conformist.
examples.chinese: 他从没有想过尝试那样的事——他太墨守成规了。

examples.english: The system seems to value conformity over originality.
examples.chinese: 这种体系似乎重视循规蹈矩，而不是独创性。

examples.english: Paul's quite nice but he's awfully straight.
examples.chinese: 保罗为人挺好的，但太保守了。

examples.english: I can't stand it when your friends come to visit - they're so straight.
examples.chinese: 我不能忍受你朋友的来访—他们太一本正经了。

examples.english: June's parents were very conservative and wouldn't allow her to date till she was 18.
examples.chinese: 琼的父母很保守，要等到她18岁才允许她谈恋爱。

examples.english: middle-aged men in conservative business suits
examples.chinese: 穿着保守西服的中年男子

examples.english: She was in her mid-thirties, attractive, and conservatively dressed.
examples.chinese: 她35岁上下，长相漂亮，穿着保守。

examples.english: She hated her parents’ suburban attitudes.
examples.chinese: 她很讨厌她父母的古板态度。

examples.english: Despite her suburban clothes and appearance she was popular at college.
examples.chinese: 尽管她衣着古板、外表拘束，但她在大学里还是很有人缘。

examples.english: Many traditional teachers still think of computers as useless toys.
examples.chinese: 许多守旧的教师仍认为电脑是无用的玩具。

examples.english: His critics objected to the way he broke many of the traditional rules of art.
examples.chinese: 对他持批评态度的人不赞成他打破许多传统艺术常规。

centers.english: unconventional

examples.english: His business methods were unconventional but successful.
examples.chinese: 他的生意经不落俗套，但成效卓著。

examples.english: Her unconventional opinions finally cost her her job.
examples.chinese: 她的新奇观点最终使她失去了工作。

examples.english: The two never lived in the same house, but their unconventional marriage lasted over 30 years.
examples.chinese: 他们两人从来不住同一间屋，但他们不寻常的婚姻维持了三十多年。

examples.english: Alternative medicine can cure many problems but not diseases like cancer.
examples.chinese: 替代医药能够医治许多疾病，但无法医治像癌症那样的疾病。

examples.english: San Francisco has a long history of accepting the city's many alternative lifestyles.
examples.chinese: 旧金山市接纳城市中许多另类生活方式有着悠久的历史。

examples.english: There was no tolerance of unorthodox political views.
examples.chinese: 异端政见决不能容忍。

examples.english: Treating the disease with a diet rather than with medicine is an unorthodox approach that few doctors recommend.
examples.chinese: 针对这种疾病不用药疗而采用食疗，是一种非传统疗法，很少有医生会推荐这么做。

examples.english: As a writer he remained nonconformist all his life, always searching for new means of expression.
examples.chinese: 身为作家，他一生特立独行，总在探索新的表达方式。

examples.english: She prided herself on being a nonconformist, on getting results by breaking the rules.
examples.chinese: 她以特立独行、打破常规取得成绩而自豪。

examples.english: He advised young people to ‘turn on, tune in, and drop out’.
examples.chinese: 他劝导年轻人“觉醒，齐物我，解脱”。

examples.english: She decided to drop out of the rat race because she couldn't stand working 60 hours a week.
examples.chinese: 她受不了每周工作60小时，决定退出这无休止的激烈竞争。

examples.english: He was a dropout and a hippy back in the '60s.
examples.chinese: 20世纪60年代时他是一个遁世者和嬉皮士。

centers.english: words for describing someone who is polite
centers.chinese: 描述有礼貌的人的词语

examples.english: He seemed a very polite young man.
examples.chinese: 他看上去是个很有礼貌的年轻人。

examples.english: a polite request
examples.chinese: 礼貌的请求

expressions.text: it is polite to do something

examples.english: I didn't really care what she thought about the book, but I thought it would be polite to ask her.
examples.chinese: 我真的不在乎她对这本书的印象，但我觉得问她一声是礼貌的做法。

examples.english: It's not considered polite to ask someone how much they earn.
examples.chinese: 问别人挣多少钱被认为是不礼貌的。

examples.english: She's always extremely polite to me, but I never know what she's really thinking.
examples.chinese: 她对我一向极有礼貌，但我从不知道她其实在想些什么。

examples.english: The last thing I felt like doing was making polite conversation with my roommate's parents.
examples.chinese: 我最不想的就是与室友的父母亲说客套话。

examples.english: ‘I hope your mother is well?’ he asked politely.
examples.chinese: “我想你母亲身体还好吧？”他彬彬有礼地问道。

examples.english: They waited in respectful silence as the funeral procession went past.
examples.chinese: 送葬队伍经过时，他们一言不发毕恭毕敬地等待着。

examples.english: If children were taught to be more respectful towards their elders, maybe these crimes wouldn't happen so often.
examples.chinese: 如果教育孩子对长辈恭敬一些，也许这些罪案就不会那么常发生了。

examples.english: I expect a civil answer when I ask you a question.
examples.chinese: 我向你提问，希望得到一个礼貌的回答。

examples.english: I wish you'd be a little more civil towards our guests.
examples.chinese: 希望你对客人更彬彬有礼些。

examples.english: She tried to speak to him civilly, in spite of the bitterness that she still felt towards him.
examples.chinese: 尽管她仍在恨他，她还是努力客气地对他说话。

examples.english: Throughout my stay on the island I was treated with the utmost civility extremely civilly by everyone there.
examples.chinese: 我在该岛逗留期间，当地每一个人都以最为彬彬有礼的态度对待我。

examples.english: Airline staff must be courteous at all times, even when passengers are not.
examples.chinese: 航空公司的员工在任何时候都必须谦恭有礼，即使乘客不礼貌的时候也应如此。

examples.english: I received a courteous letter from Jane's mother thanking me for my help.
examples.chinese: 简的母亲给我寄来一封措辞客气的信，感谢我帮忙。

examples.english: He was always kind and courteous to me, but we never really became friends.
examples.chinese: 他对我一向和气、谦恭，但我们从未真正成为朋友。

examples.english: Customers are always treated courteously in our stores.
examples.chinese: 顾客在我们店里总会受到热情接待。

examples.english: Henry was a typical Oxford man - well-mannered, easy-going, and very sure of himself.
examples.chinese: 亨利是典型的牛津人——态度礼貌、脾气随和，而且非常自信。

examples.english: The children were good little things, well-mannered, and beautifully dressed.
examples.chinese: 这些孩子都是些可爱的小东西，态度礼貌，穿戴漂亮。

centers.english: careful not to upset or embarrass someone
centers.chinese: 小心不使某人气恼或尴尬

examples.english: Mandy thought her mother's outfit was a little too fancy, but was too tactful to say so.
examples.chinese: 曼迪觉得妈妈的衣服太花哨了一点，但她很乖巧，没有说出口。

expressions.text: it is tactful of somebody to do something

examples.english: It wasn't very tactful of you to ask whether he'd put on weight.
examples.chinese: 你问他体重是不是增加了不是很得体。

expressions.text: a tactful way of doing something

examples.english: ‘Besides...’ Melissa hesitated, trying to think of a tactful way of telling him the truth.
examples.chinese: “况且…”梅利莎犹豫着，尽量想个婉转的方式告诉他真相。

examples.english: Clare tactfully changed the subject when someone started talking about weddings.
examples.chinese: 有人开始谈起婚礼来，克莱尔便知趣地岔开了话题。

examples.english: A good secretary needs to be efficient, and above all diplomatic.
examples.chinese: 一个好秘书要工作效率高，最重要的是要能够说话办事得体。

examples.english: Robson was trying to be as diplomatic as possible - he didn't want to risk losing a promotion.
examples.chinese: 罗布森说话办事尽量圆滑—他不想冒险失去升职的机会。

examples.english: My father suggested diplomatically that becoming an astronaut might not be as easy as I thought.
examples.chinese: 父亲婉转地暗示要成为一名宇航员并不如我想象的那样简单。

examples.english: Andrew's very discreet -- he won't tell anyone you're leaving.
examples.chinese: 安德鲁非常谨慎一他不会把你要离开的消息告诉别人的。

examples.english: We offer a discreet and personal service to our clients.
examples.chinese: 我们向客户提供谨慎可靠的个人服务。

examples.english: The lawyer murmured discreetly that he would like to speak to her alone.
examples.chinese: 律师小心地低声说想单独和她谈谈。

examples.english: Did you mean what you said about my dress, or were you just being polite?
examples.chinese: 你谈论我的连衣裙时说的话是真心的，还是仅仅是客套?

examples.english: The guests were all very polite about the meal, but inside Joan just wanted to cry.
examples.chinese: 宾客们对这餐饭都满口客气话，但琼的内心里只想哭。

examples.english: When she asked what I thought of the meal I lied politely, and said it was great.
examples.chinese: 当她问我对饭菜有何想法时，我客气地撒谎说好极了。

centers.english: behaving in a very polite and formal way
centers.chinese: 举止非常有礼貌而且正式

examples.english: Our boss is very formal - he doesn't call anyone by their first name.
examples.chinese: 我们老板十分严肃，他从不直呼别人的名字。

examples.english: A lot of people found my father rather formal and aloof, particularly when they first met him.
examples.chinese: 许多人觉得我父亲相当严肃、冷漠，尤其是与他初次见面时。

examples.english: You shouldn't use ‘Yours faithfully’ - it's much too formal for this kind of letter.
examples.chinese: 你不应用“谨启”——写在这类信件上过于拘谨了。

examples.english: He stood by the door to welcome the guests, bowing formally to each one in turn.
examples.chinese: 他站在门口迎接客人，一板一眼地逐一向来宾鞠躬。

examples.english: Andrew's marriage proposal was very correct and proper.
examples.chinese: 安德鲁的求婚非常得体，中规中矩。

examples.english: One must be correct about these things, mustn't one?
examples.chinese: 在这些事上必须规规矩矩，不是吗？

examples.english: She gives the impression of being rather stiff and unfriendly, but I think that's because she's basically shy.
examples.chinese: 她给人的印象是相当拘谨且不友好，但我觉得这是因为她其实很害羞的缘故。

examples.english: Their goodbyes were stiff and formal.
examples.chinese: 他们的告别非常拘谨，一本正经的。

examples.english: Dr Aziz replied stiffly, ‘I do not consider Mrs Moore my friend.’
examples.chinese: 阿齐兹博士冷冷地回答道，“我不认为穆尔太太是我的朋友。”

centers.english: polite behaviour

examples.english: During my stay in Japan, I was treated with great politeness by everyone I met.
examples.chinese: 我在日本逗留期间，我所遇见的每一个人都对我极有礼貌。

examples.english: American businessmen were surprised that their French colleagues wanted to shake hands each morning, a formal sign of politeness in the US.
examples.chinese: 美国商人惊讶地发现，他们的法国同事每天早晨都要握手，而这在美国是一种正式的礼节。

examples.english: I don't like cake, but I accepted a piece out of politeness.
examples.chinese: 我不喜欢吃蛋糕，但出于礼貌我要了一块。

examples.english: I wish she'd teach that boy of hers some manners!
examples.chinese: 我希望她能教教她那个儿子一些礼貌！

examples.english: Our kids’ table manners are appalling - it's like living in the zoo.
examples.chinese: 我家的孩子进餐时的举止糟透了—就像生活在动物园一样。

examples.english: My mother was impressed with Tony's good manners.
examples.chinese: 我妈妈对托尼的礼貌举止印象深刻。

examples.english: We teach our children to speak correctly and to have good manners, and when they become teenagers they do exactly the opposite.
examples.chinese: 我们教育孩子要说话得体、有礼貌，但他们十几岁时会做得完全相反。

expressions.text: have the good manners to do something

examples.english: At least she had the good manners to let us know she would be late.
examples.chinese: 至少，她有礼貌，让我们知道她晚些到。

expressions.text: it is good manners (to do something)

examples.english: It wouldn't be good manners to leave so soon -- the party has only just started.
examples.chinese: 这么快离开不礼貌—晚会才刚开始。

examples.english: Businessmen value the service and courtesy offered by traditional hotels.
examples.chinese: 商人把传统旅店提供的服务及其员工的恭敬态度看得很重要。

examples.english: When you contact a government office, you should receive efficient service and be treated with courtesy.
examples.chinese: 与政府部门打交道，应当享受到高效服务和礼遇。

examples.english: I don't think she wanted us to come and stay with her, she just offered out of courtesy.
examples.chinese: 我不认为她真的希望我们来与她同住，她那样说仅仅是出于礼貌罢了。

expressions.text: have the courtesy to do something

examples.english: I wish he'd had the courtesy to tell me when he was coming back.
examples.chinese: 我希望他能够表现得礼貌些，告诉我他打算何时回来。

examples.english: Helping people who have marriage problems requires a great deal of tact and patience.
examples.chinese: 帮助人们解决婚姻中的问题需要极大的技巧和耐心。

examples.english: The old woman thrust a picture of a plain-looking girl into Meryl's hand. ‘Your granddaughter? She's lovely,’ said Meryl with tact.
examples.chinese: 老太太把一张相貌平平的女孩的照片塞到梅里尔手里。“是你孙女吗？真可爱。”梅里尔乖巧地说道。

examples.english: The following morning, Mr Harrison greeted her with careful formality.
examples.chinese: 第二天早晨，哈里森先生非常拘谨地向她问了声好。

examples.english: When I re-read my letter I saw that I had written it with a formality that I did not intend.
examples.chinese: 当我重读自己写的信时，我发现我无意间把信写得很客套。

centers.english: words for describing children who behave politely and well
centers.chinese: 描述有礼貌、规矩的儿童的词语

examples.english: His older brother was quieter and far better-behaved.
examples.chinese: 他哥哥更文静，也规矩得多。

examples.english: She was a thoughtful, kind, and well-behaved girl.
examples.chinese: 她是个体贴、和善、规矩的女孩。

examples.english: Their children are so well-behaved it seems almost unnatural.
examples.chinese: 他们的孩子太规行矩步了—看上去几乎显得不自然。

examples.english: She's a good girl -- I'm sure she won't give you any trouble.
examples.chinese: 她是个乖女孩—我肯定她不会给你带来任何麻烦。

examples.english: What good children - they went to bed as soon as I told them to!
examples.chinese: 真是一群乖孩子——我一叫他们上床睡觉他们就去了！

examples.english: If you're good you can stay up till eight o'clock tonight.
examples.chinese: 如果你听话，今晚你可以待到8点睡觉。

examples.english: They are well-brought-up children, and have a great respect for their teachers.
examples.chinese: 他们都是有教养的孩子，很尊敬老师。

examples.english: David is very well-brought up, but he does have a nasty temper sometimes.
examples.chinese: 戴维很有教养，但他有时候确实脾气不好。

centers.english: polite, confident, and relaxed, but in an insincere way
centers.chinese: 礼貌、自信且随和的，但不真诚

examples.english: Smooth and charming, Francis was the kind of man your mother would love you to marry.
examples.chinese: 弗朗西斯又圆滑又迷人，他是你母亲希望的能成为你丈夫的那种男子。

examples.english: Don't let his smooth manner fool you - he's just after your money.
examples.chinese: 不要被他圆滑的外表骗了—他只是看中你的钱罢了。

examples.english: Reginald was suave, handsome and charming.
examples.chinese: 雷金纳德温文尔雅、英俊迷人。

examples.english: He was tall and suave, careful in dress, careful in behaviour.
examples.chinese: 他身材高大，温文尔雅，而且很注意穿着和举止。

centers.english: an official rule that everyone must obey

examples.english: This law makes it illegal to smoke in public places.
examples.chinese: 这条法律使在公共场所抽烟成了违法行为。

examples.english: The law defines drunkenness as a certain percentage of alcohol in the blood.
examples.chinese: 法律上界定喝醉酒是血液中有一定比例的酒精含量。

examples.english: Japan has very strict laws against guns and drugs.
examples.chinese: 日本对于枪支和毒品管理有非常严格的法规。

expressions.text: under the law/according to the law

examples.english: Under the new law, anyone who assists in a suicide faces 10 years in prison.
examples.chinese: 根据新的法律，协助自杀者要面临十年徒刑。

examples.english: tough new laws on immigration
examples.chinese: 严厉的新移民法

examples.english: Both specific and general laws on child prostitution exist.
examples.chinese: 关于儿童卖淫的特别法和普通法都有。

examples.english: The current gun laws vary from state to state.
examples.chinese: 各个州的现行枪支法都不同。

examples.english: Legislation is needed to stop the spread of computer pornography.
examples.chinese: 阻止电脑色情的传播需要立法。

examples.english: The legislation requires motorcyclists to wear helmets.
examples.chinese: 这一法规要求摩托车手佩戴头盔。

examples.english: new legislation on the sale of alcohol
examples.chinese: 关于酒类销售的新法规

examples.english: the 1991 Prevention of Terrorism Act
examples.chinese: 1991年的《反恐法》

examples.english: The Wagner Act prohibited employers from firing workers for joining a union.
examples.chinese: 《瓦格纳法案》禁止雇主以参加工会为由解雇工人。

examples.english: Monday's debate on the defense bill lasted all night.
examples.chinese: 星期一关于国防议案的辩论持续了整个晚上。

examples.english: The president signed a bill that will help more families move from welfare to work.
examples.chinese: 总统签署了一项帮助更多家庭从享受福利救济转向就业的议案。

examples.english: In New Mexico, a state statute permits one minute of silent prayer at the beginning of school.
examples.chinese: 在新墨西哥，有一条新法规允许每天上课之前可以有一分钟的默祷。

examples.english: Unfortunately his lawyer could find no statute or point of law preventing his client's imprisonment.
examples.chinese: 不幸的是，他的律师找不到哪项法规或法律条文能使其当事人免于入狱。

examples.english: Fishing on this river is forbidden under a local bylaw.
examples.chinese: 当地法规禁止在这条河里钓鱼。

examples.english: a city ordinance prohibiting smoking in government buildings
examples.chinese: 禁止在政府大楼内吸烟的一项城市法规

centers.english: the whole system of laws of a country or place
centers.chinese: 一个国家或地方的法律体系

examples.english: Andrew is studying law at Harvard University.
examples.chinese: 安德鲁在哈佛大学读法律。

examples.english: In 1873 French law was imposed in Vietnam.
examples.chinese: 1873年法国的法律在越南实施。

examples.english: I didn't realize I was breaking the law.
examples.chinese: 我没有意识到自己是在犯法。

examples.english: Refugees are accorded special protection under international law
examples.chinese: 难民受到国际法的特别保护。

examples.english: By law, an advertiser can't use a person's name for commercial purposes without permission.
examples.chinese: 根据法律规定，广告商未经许可不得把一个人的名字用作商业用途。

examples.english: It's against the law to be drunk in public.
examples.chinese: 在公共场合喝醉酒是违法的。

examples.english: The soldiers were brought in to restore law and order after the riots.
examples.chinese: 暴乱后派遣了军队来恢复法律和秩序。

examples.english: Many people here have no faith in the legal system and do not expect to receive justice from it.
examples.chinese: 这里的许多人对法律制度没有信心，不指望法律能给他们公正。

examples.english: The American legal system says that you are innocent until proven guilty.
examples.chinese: 美国的法律制度说如果不能证明有罪就是无罪。

centers.english: part of a law or legal agreement
centers.chinese: 法律或法律协议的一部分

examples.english: Article 1 of the constitution guarantees freedom of religion.
examples.chinese: 宪法第一条保证宗教信仰自由。

examples.english: The country signed the treaty but then violated each of its 143 articles.
examples.chinese: 这个国家签署了条约，但是143条条款，它每一条都违反了。

examples.english: I was told that this clause would be removed from the contract.
examples.chinese: 我得知这一条款将从合同中删去。

examples.english: Courts ruled that prayer in school violates a clause of the First Amendment.
examples.chinese: 法院裁定，在学校里做祷告违反了《第一修正案》中的一个条款。

examples.english: He pays very little tax because of some loophole in income tax legislation.
examples.chinese: 由于所得税法规中存在着某些漏洞，他缴纳的税非常少。

examples.english: The new rules will close loopholes in British immigration law.
examples.chinese: 这些新的法规将堵住英国移民法中的漏洞。

centers.english: to make a new law

examples.english: Congress has passed an education-reform law.
examples.chinese: 国会通过了一项教育改革法规。

examples.english: The law was passed with only a few MPs voting against.
examples.chinese: 该法律已获通过，只有数名议员投了反对票。

examples.english: Should parliament legislate against experiments on animals?
examples.chinese: 议会应该立法反对在动物身上做实验吗？

examples.english: The government was under a lot of public pressure to legislate on equal pay.
examples.chinese: 政府正承受民众要求就同工同酬进行立法的巨大压力。

examples.english: Thomas Jefferson said that Britain had no right to legislate for its American colonies.
examples.chinese: 托马斯·杰斐逊说，英国无权为它在美国的殖民地立法。

examples.english: States are legislating stricter automobile safety measures for young children.
examples.chinese: 各州正在立法为幼童制定更为严厉的机动车安全措施。

centers.english: ways of saying that a law is officially accepted
centers.chinese: 表示一项法律被正式接受的说法

examples.english: The Education Bill finally became law last month.
examples.chinese: 《教育法案》在上个月终于成为法律。

examples.english: Until the Food Protection Bill became law, the ministry had no power to ban dangerous pesticides.
examples.chinese: 要到《食品保护法案》被确立为法律，这个部门才有权力禁止使用有毒杀虫剂。

expressions.text: get onto/reach the statute book/ be on the books

examples.english: The Employment Bill was passed in 1982 but did not reach the statute book until 1984.
examples.chinese: 《就业法案》于1982年就获通过，但直到1984年才付诸实施。

examples.english: The laws have been on the books for decades, but city officials failed to enforce them.
examples.chinese: 这些法律制定了数十年，但市政府官员一直没有执行。

centers.english: relating to the law

examples.english: People on low salaries can get free legal advice.
examples.chinese: 低收入者可以免费获得法律咨询。

examples.english: Neither side wanted a long and expensive legal battle.
examples.chinese: 双方都不愿意花巨款打一场持久的官司。

examples.english: The American government does not pay the legal fees of Americans who are arrested abroad.
examples.chinese: 美国公民境外被捕，美国政府不为他们支付律师费。

examples.english: The Liberal Party has won control of the legislative assembly.
examples.chinese: 自由党获得了立法议会的控制权。

examples.english: Legislative authority rests with parliament.
examples.chinese: 立法机关是国会。

examples.english: The U.S. president has no legislative power, but he can make recommendations.
examples.chinese: 美国总统没有立法权力，但是他可以提议。

centers.english: order

examples.english: It doesn't matter which order you answer the questions in.
examples.chinese: 以什么顺序答题不要紧。

examples.english: Movie scenes are not shot in the order in which they are shown.
examples.chinese: 电影镜头拍摄的先后和放映顺序是不一样的。

examples.english: We were given a printed sheet showing the order of events for the day.
examples.chinese: 我们获发一张节目单，上面印有当天活动的顺序安排。

examples.english: List three choices in order of preference.
examples.chinese: 按照喜欢的程度顺序列出三个选择。

examples.english: The subjects that students enjoyed most were, in order of popularity, music, history, and art.
examples.chinese: 学生最喜欢的三个学科，按受欢迎的程度排列，分别是音乐、历史和美术。

examples.english: The games were displayed on a long wall, in alphabetical order, from Acrobats to Wheel of Fortune.
examples.chinese: 游戏名目按字母顺序从“Acrobats”〔杂技表演〕到“Wheel of Fortune”〔幸运转盘〕在长长的墙上列出。

examples.english: White, who is doing research on the disease, was able to determine its DNA sequence.
examples.chinese: 怀特正从事这种疾病的研究工作，他能排出它的DNA序列。

examples.english: The dance is basically a sequence of steps that you repeat over and over again.
examples.chinese: 这种舞基本上就是不断重复一连串舞步。

examples.english: Basic computer code consists of sequences of ones and zeros.
examples.chinese: 电脑的基本编码是1和0排列组成的。！

examples.english: X-rays are taken in rapid sequence to get an image of the arteries leading to the heart.
examples.chinese: 用X光快速连拍，以取得通往心脏的动脉的影像。

examples.english: Women's lives used to follow a predictable pattern: school, then marriage and children.
examples.chinese: 以前女性的生活往往遵循一种可以预见的模式：上学，然后结婚生子。

examples.english: Critics of the police say they see a pattern of racism and abuse by officers.
examples.chinese: 批评警方的人说，他们发现警察经常实行种族歧视、虐待犯人。

examples.english: Police say that each of the murders follows the same pattern.
examples.chinese: 警方说这些谋杀案的手法同出一辙。

centers.english: in the correct order

examples.english: Are all the pages in the right order?
examples.chinese: 每一页的顺序都正确吗？

examples.english: It is important to add each ingredient in the right order.
examples.chinese: 每一种材料都要按正确的顺序加进去，这很重要。

examples.english: Mark the pieces so that you put them back the right way round.
examples.chinese: 把零件做好记号，以便正确地装回去。

centers.english: in the wrong order

expressions.text: in the wrong order/out of order

examples.english: A cake can be ruined by adding ingredients in the wrong order.
examples.chinese: 加材料顺序不对，蛋糕就做不成了。

examples.english: The files were completely out of order.
examples.chinese: 文件的顺序全弄乱了。

examples.english: The letters are all mixed up and you have to put them in the right order.
examples.chinese: 这些信都混起来了，你得把它们按正确顺序理好。

examples.english: The pages were all mixed up, and I only have five minutes before the deadline.
examples.chinese: 页码都乱了，而我只有五分钟的期限。

examples.english: The printer made an error and the pages were bound the wrong way round.
examples.chinese: 印刷厂出错，书页都装订乱了。

examples.english: Can you say the alphabet backwards?
examples.chinese: 你能倒过来背字母表吗？

examples.english: Count backward from 10.
examples.chinese: 从十倒数。

centers.english: doing things one after the other

examples.english: It's easier if you count things up in order, so that you don't get confused.
examples.chinese: 依次点数容易些，这样就不会搞混。

examples.english: A route is given to the postman, and he makes deliveries in order.
examples.chinese: 邮递员有指定的递送路线，让他按次序送邮件。

examples.english: One by one, the students were called in to be interviewed.
examples.chinese: 学生一个一个地被叫进去面试。

examples.english: The toy is made so that when you hold the top square, the rest fall down one after another, making a clacking noise.
examples.chinese: 这种玩具，你拿着最上面的方块，其余的就会哗啦啦地一块接一块落下来。

examples.english: I was hard on my eldest son, and he, in turn, was mean to his little brother.
examples.chinese: 我对大儿子很严厉，而他接着就对他弟弟凶。

examples.english: We distribute the book to charities, and those organizations in turn give the books to needy children.
examples.chinese: 我们把书分配给慈善机构，慈善机构再把书转送给需要的儿童。

expressions.text: take turns/ take it in turns

examples.english: Small children find it almost impossible to take turns.
examples.chinese: 要幼童轮流做事几乎是不可能的。

examples.english: We take turns doing the dishes.
examples.chinese: 我们轮流洗盘子。

examples.english: Mandy and Debbie took it in turns to look after the baby.
examples.chinese: 曼迪和戴比轮流照看孩子。

centers.english: a tradition

examples.english: A lot of the old traditions are dying out.
examples.chinese: 许多古老的传统正日渐消失。

examples.english: Every village has its own traditions.
examples.chinese: 每座村庄都有自己的传统。

examples.english: The region has a tradition of winemaking which goes back to Roman times.
examples.chinese: 该地区有酿酒的传统，这一传统可以追溯到古罗马时代。

examples.english: It's still the tradition here that the eldest son inherits all the family's money and land.
examples.chinese: 这里的传统仍然是长子继承所有的家庭财富和土地。

examples.english: We always go for a long walk on Christmas morning - it's a family tradition.
examples.chinese: 圣诞节早晨我们总会去长距离散步，这是家庭传统。

examples.english: A group of children will perform traditional dances.
examples.chinese: 一群儿童将表演传统舞蹈。

examples.english: The dancers were wearing traditional African costume.
examples.chinese: 舞蹈演员穿着非洲的传统服装。

examples.english: The restaurant offers a wide range of traditional French food.
examples.chinese: 这家餐厅提供各种各样的传统法国食品。

expressions.text: it is traditional to do something

examples.english: In the US it is traditional to dress up in costumes on Halloween.
examples.chinese: 在美国过万圣节时装扮起来是一种传统。

examples.english: a special dish that is traditionally eaten at New Year
examples.chinese: 传统上在过新年时吃的特色菜

examples.english: Sadly, a lot of the old customs are now dying out.
examples.chinese: 可惜的是许多古老的习俗如今正在消失。

examples.english: The custom of sending birthday cards began in the 19th century.
examples.chinese: 寄送生日贺卡的传统始于19世纪。

expressions.text: it is the custom (for somebody) to do something

examples.english: It is the custom in Japan to take your shoes off when you go into someone's house.
examples.chinese: 根据日本的传统，进入人家的屋子时要脱鞋。

examples.english: In those days it was the custom for farmers to give part of their crop to the lord of the manor.
examples.chinese: 那时候的传统是农民要把农作物的一部分交给领主。

examples.english: The man at the hotel welcomed us with the customary greeting.
examples.chinese: 旅馆的那个人以惯常的招呼方式欢迎我们。

expressions.text: it is customary (for somebody) to do something

examples.english: It is customary for the man to propose to the woman.
examples.chinese: 习惯上总是男人向女人求婚。

examples.english: Trading in ivory had become an institution in this part of Africa.
examples.chinese: 象牙交易已成为非洲这一地区的习俗。

examples.english: Church leaders are meeting this week to discuss ways of preserving the institution of marriage.
examples.chinese: 教会领袖本周将开会讨论维护婚姻制度的办法。

centers.english: all the customs and beliefs of a country or group
centers.chinese: 一国或一团体所有的风俗和信仰

examples.english: There is great respect for tradition among the older members of the community.
examples.chinese: 该社区的老年人对传统非常尊重。

examples.english: By tradition, it is the bride's parents who pay for the wedding.
examples.chinese: 按照传统由新娘的父母支付婚礼费用。

examples.english: According to folklore, King Arthur will one day return to become King of Britain.
examples.chinese: 根据民间传说，亚瑟王有一天会回来当英国国王。

examples.english: In folklore the snake is often a symbol of evil.
examples.chinese: 在民间传说里，蛇常常作为邪恶的象征。

examples.english: The town takes great pride in its architectural heritage.
examples.chinese: 该镇对自己的建筑遗产深感自豪。

examples.english: These works of art are considered of great importance to Russia's national heritage.
examples.chinese: 这些艺术作品被认为对俄罗斯的民族传统有重要意义。

examples.english: The castle is part of the heritage of Wales and should be preserved for the people of Wales.
examples.chinese: 这座城堡是威尔士历史遗产的一部分，应该为了威尔士人民将它好好保存。

examples.english: The trip offers you a unique opportunity to experience the culture of the remote hill tribes of the north.
examples.chinese: 这趟旅游使你有独一无二的机会体验一下北方偏远山区部落的文化。

examples.english: In what ways do British and Australian culture differ?
examples.chinese: 英国和澳大利亚的文化有哪些地方不同？

centers.english: a special event that is part of a tradition
centers.chinese: 作为传统一部分的某项特别活动

examples.english: After the wedding ceremony we went to a reception at the bride's parents’ house.
examples.chinese: 婚礼结束后，我们去参加了在新娘父母家举行的宴会。

examples.english: A ceremony is held every year to remember those who died in the war.
examples.chinese: 每年都会举行仪式来纪念那次战争的死难者。

examples.english: Over 2,000 people attended the official opening ceremony of the Olympic Games.
examples.chinese: 有两千多人参加了奥运会的正式开幕典礼。

examples.english: The Queen was in full ceremonial dress for the state opening of Parliament.
examples.chinese: 女王穿着整套礼服出席了国会的正式开幕典礼。

examples.english: His right hand rested on his ceremonial sword.
examples.chinese: 他的右手放在礼仪佩剑上。

examples.english: The full costume is only worn on important ceremonial occasions.
examples.chinese: 这全套礼服只有在重要的礼仪场合才穿。

examples.english: The book examines rituals for childbirth from different parts of the world.
examples.chinese: 这本书研究了世界上不同地区在分娩时进行的仪式。
