examples.english: After an elaborate ritual, the boys are formally accepted into the tribe.
examples.chinese: 经过一个复杂的仪式，男孩们被正式接纳为部落成员。

examples.english: The ritual is performed in order to thank the Sun Goddess for the rice harvest.
examples.chinese: 举行这种仪式的目的是为了稻谷丰收感谢太阳女神。

examples.english: Buddhist rites
examples.chinese: 佛教仪式

examples.english: The Batak chieftains perform the traditional initiation rite.
examples.chinese: 巴塔克酋长主持传统的成年仪式。

examples.english: A priest was called to perform last rites for the dying woman.
examples.chinese: 一位祭司被请来为那垂死的女人举行临终仪式。

examples.english: The body cannot be buried until the funeral rites have been performed.
examples.chinese: 要到举行过葬礼后遗体才能下葬。

centers.english: to not do something in the usual or traditional way
centers.chinese: 不按照惯例或传统行事

expressions.text: break with tradition/break with the past

examples.english: The Church has finally broken with tradition and allowed women into the ministry.
examples.chinese: 教会最终打破了传统，允许女性做牧师。

examples.english: I think it's time to break with the past and rewrite the constitution.
examples.chinese: 我认为现在是摒弃传统，重写宪法的时候了。

expressions.text: a break with tradition/a break with the past

examples.english: In a significant break with tradition, the Queen will not attend this year's ceremony.
examples.chinese: 女王将不会参加今年的典礼，这在很大程度上打破了传统。

examples.english: Political leaders are calling for a break with the past and a new spirit of cooperation.
examples.chinese: 政党领袖呼吁要摒弃过去，树立新的合作精神。

centers.english: allowed by law

examples.english: This trade in foreign currency is perfectly legal.
examples.chinese: 这宗外汇交易完全合法。

examples.english: Divorce finally became legal in 1992.
examples.chinese: 离婚终于在1992年成为合法的行为。

examples.english: Over 3,000 gay couples have married since it became legal for them to do so last year.
examples.chinese: 自从去年同性恋婚姻合法化之后，已有三千多对同性恋者结为夫妻。

examples.english: In Maastricht, Dutch Guilders, Deutschmarks and Belgian Francs are all considered legal tender.
examples.chinese: 在马斯垂克，荷兰盾、德国马克和比利时法郎都被认为是法定货币。

examples.english: Fuchs had entered the country legally on a tourist visa.
examples.chinese: 富克斯是用旅游签证合法入境的。

examples.english: The committee will investigate whether the funds were obtained legally.
examples.chinese: 委员会将调查这些资金是否为合法所得。

examples.english: Protesters must only use lawful methods of opposing the government.
examples.chinese: 抗议者必须采用合法手段来反对政府。

expressions.text: it is lawful to do something

examples.english: It is lawful to employ someone under the age of sixteen if their parents agree.
examples.chinese: 只要其父母许可，雇用16岁以下的儿童是法律许可的。

examples.english: The FBI will use all reasonable and lawful means to gather intelligence information.
examples.chinese: 联邦调查局会使用各种合理合法的手段来搜集情报。

examples.english: ‘Do you take this woman to be your lawful wedded wife?’ intoned the priest. ‘I do,’ murmured Carlos.
examples.chinese: “你愿意娶这位女子作为你的合法妻子吗？”牧师问道。“我愿意。”卡洛斯含糊地答道。

examples.english: When you claim Social Security benefits, you must prove that you are lawfully resident in this country.
examples.chinese: 你申请社会保障金的时候，必须证明你是本国的合法居民。

examples.english: He is a criminal who runs a legitimate business as well.
examples.chinese: 他干着犯罪勾当，同时也经营着一家合法的公司。

examples.english: Tobacco smuggling into the UK is seriously affecting the profits of legitimate importers.
examples.chinese: 烟草走私进入英国，严重影响了依法经营的进口商的利润。

examples.english: How can I be sure that an on-line business is legitimate?
examples.chinese: 我怎么确定网上的公司是不是合法的?

examples.english: At least three of the dead woman's relatives have a legitimate claim to her house.
examples.chinese: 这个死去的女人的亲戚中，至少有三人对她的房屋拥有合法继承权。

examples.english: The government has refused to recognise the far-right group as a legitimate political party.
examples.chinese: 政府拒绝承认这个极右翼的组织是合法的政党。

examples.english: He assured us that the insurance claim was honest and above board, but I'm not so sure.
examples.chinese: 他向我们保证，这项保险索赔是诚实正当的，但我不能确定。

examples.english: I'm sure Peggy wouldn't let anything happen that wasn't perfectly open and above board.
examples.chinese: 我确信，不是完全光明正大的事，佩姬是不会允许它发生的。

examples.english: He makes tough business deals, but he makes sure he always stays within the law.
examples.chinese: 他做生意手段很辣，但是确保自己一定要守法。

examples.english: Security forces must not only act within the law, but must be seen to do so.
examples.chinese: 安全部队不仅要依法办事，而且要让人知道他们是在依法办事。

examples.english: Building contractors must operate within the law by ensuring that an acceptable standard of work is carried out.
examples.chinese: 建筑承包商必须依法经营，确保工程的质量标准令人满意。

examples.english: The European Court will decide on the legality of his claim.
examples.chinese: 欧洲法院将对他的要求的合法性作出裁决。

examples.english: The union immediately challenged the legality of the decision.
examples.chinese: 工会立即对这个决议的合法性提出质疑。

examples.english: The Appeal Court judge said that his conviction was of dubious legality.
examples.chinese: 上诉法庭的法官说，对他的判决是否合法值得怀疑。

examples.english: This was the first of several actions that were of questionable legality, and which eventually led to his resignation.
examples.chinese: 他所做的几件事都令人质疑其合法性，这是当中的第一件，而这最终导致了他的辞职。

centers.english: when the law says you must do something or have the right to do it
centers.chinese: 法律认为你必须做某事或有权做某事

examples.english: Consumers have the legal right to demand their money back if a product is faulty.
examples.chinese: 如果产品有瑕疵，消费者依法享有要求退款的权利。

examples.english: the legal duties of a parent
examples.chinese: 父母的法律义务

examples.english: The alcohol content of his blood was three times over the legal limit.
examples.chinese: 他血液里的酒精含量是法定限量的三倍。

examples.english: The clerk to the court will reject any document that does not meet the legal requirements.
examples.chinese: 法庭书记将拒收任何不符合法律要求的文件。

examples.english: She now become the legal owner of the land.
examples.chinese: 她现在成了这块地的合法主人。

examples.english: If there is an accident, the owner of the vehicle will be legally responsible.
examples.chinese: 如果发生事故，车主将依法承担法律责任。

examples.english: When does the contract become legally binding?
examples.chinese: 这份合同什么时候产生法律效力？

examples.english: Is my live-in girlfriend legally entitled to a share of the proceeds from the sale of the house?
examples.chinese: 我的同居女友从法律上说有权分享出售房子所得的收益吗?

examples.english: Employers are legally obliged to consult trade unions about any redundancy proposals.
examples.chinese: 任何裁员的提议，按照法律规定雇主都必须和工会协商。

examples.english: When you buy something, you have certain statutory rights as a consumer.
examples.chinese: 购买东西时，你作为消费者拥有一定的法定权益。

examples.english: Local authorities have a statutory duty to house homeless families.
examples.chinese: 当地政府有法律义务安置无处栖身的家庭。

examples.english: Officers have a statutory obligation to report any crime committed by a government employee.
examples.chinese: 官员有法定义务报告政府雇员犯下的任何罪行。

examples.english: The statutory fine for this offence is $250.
examples.chinese: 这种违法行为的法定罚金是250美元。

examples.english: Nobody seemed to know whether the President's action was constitutional or not.
examples.chinese: 好像没有人知道总统的行为是否符合宪法规定。

examples.english: A court decision in 1954 ruled that segregated education was not constitutional.
examples.chinese: 1954年的法院判决裁定，种族隔离教育不符合宪法规定。

examples.english: The court will rule on whether the prisoner's constitutional rights were violated.
examples.chinese: 法院将对这名囚犯的宪法权利是否遭到侵犯作出裁决。

examples.english: Although unusual, the Governor's action was constitutionally quite correct.
examples.chinese: 州长的所作所为尽管非同寻常，但从宪法的角度来看，还是相当正确的。

examples.english: The police must ensure that all interviews and interrogations are carried out according to the law.
examples.chinese: 警方必须保证所有谈话和讯问都要依法进行。

examples.english: Islamic court officials said the men would be tried according to Sharia Muslim law.
examples.chinese: 伊斯兰法庭的官员说，这几名男子将按穆斯林的宗教法律接受审判。

examples.english: According to Singapore law, the immigration officers were within their rights to refuse me admission.
examples.chinese: 根据新加坡的法律，移民官有权拒绝让我入境。

examples.english: By law, the purchase must be completed within a month after the contracts are signed.
examples.chinese: 法律规定，购买程序必须在合同签署后一个月内完成。

examples.english: The wearing of seat belts in cars is required by law.
examples.chinese: 上车系安全带是法律规定的。

examples.english: Donations must not exceed the limits that are allowed by law.
examples.chinese: 捐款不得超过法律所允许的限额。

examples.english: The government is required by law to provide education for all minors.
examples.chinese: 政府必须依法为所有未成年人提供教育。

centers.english: to make something legal

examples.english: a campaign to legalise cannabis
examples.chinese: 争取大麻合法化的运动

examples.english: Denmark recently legalized marriage between gay couples.
examples.chinese: 丹麦最近从法律上承认了同性恋夫妻的婚姻。

examples.english: calls for the legalization of voluntary euthanasia
examples.chinese: 要求将自愿安乐死行为合法化的呼吁

examples.english: 57% of people wanted abortion to be made legal.
examples.chinese: 57%的人要求堕胎合法化。

examples.english: In November, marijuana was made legal for people with a recognized medical condition.
examples.chinese: 11月份，确诊的病人使用大麻成为合法。

expressions.text: make it legal to do something

examples.english: Texas law makes it legal to carry a concealed weapon.
examples.chinese: 得克萨斯的法律使携带暗器成为合法。

examples.english: Plenty of men and women think prostitution should be decriminalized.
examples.chinese: 不少男女认为，卖淫应该合法化。

examples.english: He has openly said that he favours decriminalizing soft drugs.
examples.chinese: 他公开说过他赞成把软毒品合法化。

examples.english: the decriminalization of so-called ‘recreational’ drugs
examples.chinese: 所谓“消遣性”的毒品的合法化

examples.english: He played a brief part in legitimizing black slavery.
examples.chinese: 在使黑奴制度合法化的过程中，他起过一点作用。

examples.english: Uganda's constitution still legitimized discrimination on the grounds of sex.
examples.chinese: 乌干达的宪法依旧允许性别歧视。

examples.english: The National Salvation Front took power, later trying to legitimize its position with elections.
examples.chinese: 民族拯救阵线夺取了政权，后来他们企图通过选举使他们的地位合法化。

centers.english: illegal

examples.english: Scott was arrested for being in possession of illegal drugs.
examples.chinese: 斯科特由于藏有非法毒品而被捕。

examples.english: In those days, abortion was illegal.
examples.chinese: 那时候，堕胎是非法的。

examples.english: Large numbers of illegal immigrants crossed the border at night.
examples.chinese: 大量非法移民在夜里越过边境。

expressions.text: it is illegal (for somebody) to do something

examples.english: It is illegal to sell tobacco to children under 16.
examples.chinese: 把香烟出售给16岁以下的儿童是非法的。

examples.english: Since 1990, it has been illegal for the US to develop or possess biological weapons.
examples.chinese: 自1990年起美国研制或拥有化学武器就属非法。

examples.english: Gorbachev wanted to make all strikes illegal, but the Soviet parliament refused to accept such a ban.
examples.chinese: 戈尔巴乔夫想立法禁止一切罢工，但苏联议会拒绝接受这一禁令。

examples.english: It is possible, of course, for computer users to illegally download games for free.
examples.chinese: 电脑使用者非法免费下载游戏当然是可能的。

examples.english: Driving a car without insurance is against the law.
examples.chinese: 驾驶未上保险的车上路是违法的。

expressions.text: it is against the law (for somebody) to do something

examples.english: In Britain, it's against the law to own a gun without having a licence.
examples.chinese: 在英国，无证持有枪支是违法的。

examples.english: Nowadays it is against the law for a teacher to hit a child in any circumstances.
examples.chinese: 现在教师在任何情况下打小孩都是违法的。

examples.english: Violence in the home is a crime, just as much as violence from a stranger.
examples.chinese: 家庭暴力同陌生人暴力行为一样，都是犯罪。

expressions.text: it is a crime (for somebody) to do something

examples.english: It should not be a crime for people to criticize their own government.
examples.chinese: 人民批评自己的政府不应该是犯罪。

examples.english: The court ruled that the raid had been unlawful.
examples.chinese: 法庭裁决该次搜查属非法行为。

examples.english: unlawful employment practices
examples.chinese: 非法的雇用行为

examples.english: Anyone who has been the victim of unlawful arrest is entitled to compensation.
examples.chinese: 任何人遭到非法逮捕都有权得到补偿。

examples.english: The teacher claimed that his contract was terminated unlawfully.
examples.chinese: 该教师称他的合同被非法终止了。

examples.english: Cruelty to animals is a criminal offence.
examples.chinese: 虐待动物是一种刑事犯罪。

examples.english: It was estimated that Walker had made around £100,000 from his criminal activities.
examples.chinese: 据估计沃克从其犯罪活动中获得了10万英镑。

examples.english: Illicit diamond exports are said to be worth over $200 million.
examples.chinese: 据称非法出口的钻石价值高于2亿美元。

examples.english: Marijuana remains the most commonly used illicit drug in the United States.
examples.chinese: 大麻仍然是美国最常见的非法毒品。

examples.english: Smoking in the school building is strictly against the rules.
examples.chinese: 在校舍内吸烟绝对违反校规。

expressions.text: it's against the rules to do something

examples.english: It's against the rules to touch the ball with your hand.
examples.chinese: 用手触球是犯规的。

centers.english: an illegal action

examples.english: Travelling on the train without a ticket is an offence.
examples.chinese: 不买票乘火车是违法行为。

expressions.text: it is an offence (for somebody) to do something

examples.english: It is an offence for a shopkeeper to sell alcohol to anyone under 18.
examples.chinese: 商店向18岁以下的人出售酒类是违法的。

examples.english: Davies claimed that he did not know he was committing an offence by accessing the website.
examples.chinese: 戴维斯说他不知道进入那网站是违法行为。

examples.english: Driving when drunk is a criminal offence.
examples.chinese: 酒后驾车是刑事犯罪。

examples.english: The number of women convicted of serious offences is still relatively small.
examples.chinese: 被判犯有重罪的女性人数仍然相对较少。

examples.english: Motorists can be fined on the spot for minor offences, such as speeding.
examples.chinese: 汽车驾驶者轻微违反交通法规，如超速行驶之类可当场罚款。

examples.english: The new rule was regarded as an infringement of the free-speech rights of government employees.
examples.chinese: 这一新规定被认为是对政府雇员的言论自由权的侵犯。

examples.english: an infringement of Article 86 of the Treaty of Rome
examples.chinese: 违反《罗马条约》第86条的行为

examples.english: Any further fighting will be seen as a violation of the ceasefire agreement.
examples.chinese: 任何继续交战行为都将被视为对停火协定的践踏。

examples.english: The United Nations described the invasion as ‘a flagrant violation of international law’.
examples.chinese: 联合国把这次入侵称为是“对国际法的公然践踏”。

examples.english: The way they treat women there represents a gross violation of human rights.
examples.chinese: 他们那里对待妇女的行为是在公然侵犯人权。

examples.english: The UK government was found to be in violation of the European Convention.
examples.chinese: 英国政府被裁定违反了《欧洲公约》。

examples.english: This is a clear breach of the 1994 Trade Agreement.
examples.chinese: 这显然违反了《1994年贸易协定》。

examples.english: Workers who have lost their jobs plan to sue the company for breach of contract.
examples.chinese: 失去工作的工人打算起诉该公司违反合同。

examples.english: In future, six-monthly accounts will be required from those firms that are in breach of the rules.
examples.chinese: 今后将要求那些违反规定的公司每六个月报一次账目。

examples.english: Many shops and bars stayed open, in contravention of the Sunday trading laws.
examples.chinese: 许多商店和酒吧仍然开门营业，这违反了星期日贸易法规。

examples.english: It was a clear contravention of EU regulations.
examples.chinese: 这明显违反了欧盟的规定。

centers.english: to do something that is illegal

examples.english: If you break the law, you must expect to be punished.
examples.chinese: 如触犯法律，必定要受到惩罚。

examples.english: You're breaking the law if you drive without wearing a seat belt.
examples.chinese: 驾车如不系好安全带即属违法。

examples.english: In many cases, people who have been released from prison will break the law again.
examples.chinese: 许多从监狱释放的人会再度犯法。

examples.english: Detectives believe that the crime was committed at around 7.30 pm.
examples.chinese: 侦探认为罪案的发生时间大约在晚上7时30分。

examples.english: Most violent crimes are committed by young men under the age of 25.
examples.chinese: 大部分暴力罪犯是25岁以下的男青年。

examples.english: She later claimed that she did not realize she was committing an offense.
examples.chinese: 她后来声称自己并未意识到是在犯罪。

examples.english: Penalties for contravening the laws on food hygiene have been increased.
examples.chinese: 对违反食品卫生法的处罚已加重了。

examples.english: Any interference in one country's domestic affairs by another country contravenes the UN charter.
examples.chinese: 一国对另一国内政的干涉违反联合国宪章。

examples.english: Any student caught breaking the school rules was immediately sent to the Principal.
examples.chinese: 学生一旦被发现违反校规立刻被送到校长那里。

examples.english: Athletes can be fined thousands of dollars for breaking the rules on steroid use.
examples.chinese: 违禁服用类固醇的运动员会被处以数千美元的罚款。

examples.english: If a teacher makes copies of software for students, he or she is infringing copyright.
examples.chinese: 如果教师为学生复制软件，他就侵犯了版权。

examples.english: Arrangements for widow's pensions infringed laws on equal pay and treatment.
examples.chinese: 对遗孀的抚恤金安排违反了有关公平薪酬和待遇的法律。

centers.english: to tell someone that they must not do something

examples.english: My parents won't let me stay out after 11 o'clock.
examples.chinese: 我父母不让我在外待到11点以后。

expressions.text: not allow somebody to do something

examples.english: The university does not allow athletes to work during the school year.
examples.chinese: 这所大学不让运动员在学期内打工。

examples.english: Joan and Bill don't allow smoking in their house.
examples.chinese: 琼和比尔不许有人在他们的房子里抽烟。

expressions.text: tell somebody not to do something

examples.english: My mother always told us not to talk to strangers.
examples.chinese: 我妈妈一直跟我们说不要和陌生人说话。

examples.english: His doctor told him not to drink any alcohol while he was taking the tablets.
examples.chinese: 医生告诉他服用这种药片时不能喝酒。

examples.english: Their religion forbids the eating of pork.
examples.chinese: 他们的宗教禁止吃猪肉。

examples.english: The management forbids employees to accept tips from customers.
examples.chinese: 管理层禁止员工接受顾客的小费。

examples.english: They were forbidden from entering the sacred chamber.
examples.chinese: 他们被禁止进入圣器室。

expressions.text: say no/say somebody can't do something

examples.english: He wanted to use the car tonight but I said no.
examples.chinese: 今晚他想用车，但我不同意。

examples.english: She wanted to go to the conference but her boss said she couldn't take the day off from work.
examples.chinese: 她想去参加会议，但老板说她不可以这一天请假。

examples.english: Many doctors now say that boxing should be banned.
examples.chinese: 现在许多医生都说拳击应被禁止。

examples.english: a new international treaty banning all nuclear tests
examples.chinese: 一项取缔所有核试验的新国际公约

examples.english: Relatives of the prisoners were banned from visiting them.
examples.chinese: 囚犯的亲属被禁止探访他们。

examples.english: International Law prohibits the use of chemical weapons.
examples.chinese: 国际法禁止使用化学武器。

examples.english: The U.S. prohibited all flights to the country while the war was in progress.
examples.chinese: 战争期间美国禁止所有飞机进入该国。

examples.english: Mexican law prohibits the clergy from teaching in universities and schools.
examples.chinese: 墨西哥法律禁止神职人员在大学和中小学内教书。

examples.english: Attempts to outlaw abortion have so far been unsuccessful.
examples.chinese: 通过法律禁止堕胎的尝试到目前为止尚未能成功。

examples.english: Slavery was not officially outlawed in Australia until 1859.
examples.chinese: 澳大利亚直到1859年才正式立法取缔了蓄奴制。

examples.english: Members of the Communist Party were blacklisted and had great difficulty finding work.
examples.chinese: 共产党员被列入了黑名单，要找到工作非常困难。

examples.english: When she tried to get a loan she found she had been blacklisted.
examples.chinese: 她想贷款时发现自己被列入了黑名单。

centers.english: when you are not allowed to do something

expressions.text: not be allowed to do something

examples.english: We're not allowed to wear jewellery at school.
examples.chinese: 校规不允许我们在学校里戴首饰。

examples.english: My mom wasn't allowed to wear makeup until she was 16.
examples.chinese: 我妈妈到16岁才被允许使用化妆品。

examples.english: Smoking is not allowed anywhere in the building.
examples.chinese: 这幢建筑内任何地方都不允许吸烟。

examples.english: In Saudi Arabia, alcohol and drug use are forbidden.
examples.chinese: 在沙特阿拉伯喝酒和吸毒都是被禁止的。

examples.english: Prisoners were forbidden to speak to each other while they were working.
examples.chinese: 囚犯在干活时是禁止交谈的。

examples.english: The use of mobile phones is strictly forbidden during take-off and landing.
examples.chinese: 飞机在起飞和降落时严格禁止使用手机。

examples.english: Teachers were forbidden by law to teach Darwin's theory of evolution.
examples.chinese: 法律禁止教师讲授达尔文的进化论。

examples.english: You can't park here.
examples.chinese: 你不能在这儿停车。

examples.english: Dad says I can't go out tonight.
examples.chinese: 爸爸说今晚我不可以出去。

examples.english: There were ‘no smoking’ signs in every room.
examples.chinese: 每间房内都有“请勿吸烟”的标志。

examples.english: The gate was locked and the sign said ‘No Trespassing’.
examples.chinese: 门锁上了，牌子上有“禁止擅入”的字样。

examples.english: Cars are prohibited in the city centre.
examples.chinese: 市中心禁止汽车通行。

examples.english: Talking is not permitted in class.
examples.chinese: 上课时不允许交谈。

examples.english: Cameras are prohibited inside the cathedral.
examples.chinese: 该教堂内禁止拍照。

examples.english: The use of calculators in the test is not permitted.
examples.chinese: 这次测验不准使用计算器。

examples.english: Smoking in the cinema is strictly prohibited.
examples.chinese: 电影院内严禁吸烟。

examples.english: You're not to tell anybody about this!
examples.chinese: 你们不许跟任何人说这事！

examples.english: Employees are not to leave their cars in the company parking lot overnight.
examples.chinese: 员工不可以将车停在公司停车场内过夜。

examples.english: Sex before marriage is no longer taboo in western countries.
examples.chinese: 婚前性行为在西方国家已不再是禁忌行为。

examples.english: Death is still a taboo subject for many people.
examples.chinese: 死亡对不少人来说仍然是个忌讳的话题。

examples.english: Until a few years ago, there was a taboo around the subject of divorce.
examples.chinese: 直到几年前为止，离婚一直是个忌讳的话题。

centers.english: to forbid books, films etc

examples.english: Films like that should be banned!
examples.chinese: 那种电影应该禁止放映！

examples.english: Comics were banned in my house because my parents thought they weren't a good influence.
examples.chinese: 连环漫画在我家里是要禁止的，因为我父母认为它影响不好。

examples.english: ‘Lady Chatterley's Lover’ was banned when it was first published.
examples.chinese: 《查泰莱夫人的情人》初版时遭到了查禁。

examples.english: The government censored all letters and telegrams going abroad during the war.
examples.chinese: 战争期间该国政府对寄发至海外的所有信件和电报都进行审查。

examples.english: The court ruled that student newspapers could not be censored by school officials.
examples.chinese: 法庭裁决校方无权审查学生办的报纸。

examples.english: Any films that are shown here have to pass government censorship.
examples.chinese: 在这里放映的电影都必须通过政府的审查。

examples.english: Angry journalists accused the government of censorship of free speech.
examples.chinese: 愤怒的新闻记者谴责政府对自由言论实施审查。

centers.english: to forbid someone from going somewhere

examples.english: When I was younger, my parents allowed me to go anywhere except the town centre, which was out of bounds.
examples.chinese: 我小时候，除了市中心不许去以外，父母哪儿都让我去。

expressions.text: be out of bounds to somebody

examples.english: The swimming pool is out of bounds to children unless they are with an adult.
examples.chinese: 这座游泳池是不许孩子们进入的，除非有大人陪同。

examples.english: The officer told the soldiers that the town was off limits.
examples.chinese: 长官跟士兵们说禁止去镇上。

examples.english: Much of the palace is off limits to the public.
examples.chinese: 这座宫殿的大部分地方禁止公众入内。

examples.english: Mr Finkelstein grounded his kids after they were caught fighting at school.
examples.chinese: 孩子们在学校打架被人捉住以后，芬克尔斯坦先生就罚他们不许出去。

examples.english: I can't go to the movie with you -- I'm grounded for the next two weeks.
examples.chinese: 我不能和你一起去看电影了，接下去的两个星期我被罚不许出门。

centers.english: to forbid someone from taking part in an activity or sport
centers.chinese: 禁止某人参加某项活动或运动

examples.english: Martinez was suspended for a week because he attacked another student.
examples.chinese: 马丁内斯被罚停学一周，因为他袭击了另一名学生。

examples.english: The teacher has been suspended while the accusation is being investigated.
examples.chinese: 在对指控进行调查期间，该教师暂时停职。

examples.english: Three police officers have been suspended for accepting bribes.
examples.chinese: 三名警察因受贿被责令停职。

examples.english: She was banned from driving for 6 months.
examples.chinese: 她被罚禁止驾车六个月。

examples.english: The government has banned public officials from accepting gifts from foreigners.
examples.chinese: 政府禁止公务员接受外国人的礼物。

examples.english: Three athletes were disqualified from the championships after failing drugs tests.
examples.chinese: 三名运动员因未通过药检被取消了锦标赛的参赛资格。

examples.english: He was fined £500, and disqualified from holding any political office.
examples.chinese: 他被罚款500英镑并被取消担任政治职务的资格。

examples.english: Sorry, you can't come into this club - you're barred.
examples.chinese: 抱歉，你不能进入这个俱乐部，你被禁入了。

examples.english: The fans were barred from ever attending football matches in England again.
examples.chinese: 这些球迷被永远禁止再到英格兰的球场观看足球赛。

examples.english: In 1903 the New York School Board barred married women from teaching.
examples.chinese: 1903年纽约市教育委员会禁止已婚妇女任教。

centers.english: forbidden political organizations

examples.english: The government ordered members of the banned political party to appear for questioning.
examples.chinese: 政府命令被取缔的政党成员来接受盘问。

examples.english: Leaders of the banned trade union were arrested last night.
examples.chinese: 被禁工会的领导昨晚被捕了。

examples.english: The government announced that the National Democratic Party had been outlawed.
examples.chinese: 政府宣布国家民主党已被取缔。

examples.english: Police were blaming an outlawed leftist group for the bombing.
examples.chinese: 警方将此次爆炸事件归咎于一个被取缔的左翼团体。

examples.english: All unions have been declared illegal by the ruling party.
examples.chinese: 所有工会都被该执政党宣布为非法。

examples.english: An increasing number of racist attacks are being carried out by the NPA and other illegal organizations.
examples.chinese: NPA以及其他的非法组织正在进行越来越多的种族主义袭击。

centers.english: an official order forbidding something

examples.english: The city has imposed a ban on smoking in all restaurants.
examples.chinese: 该市已颁布了在所有餐馆适用的禁烟令。

examples.english: There has been worldwide protest against the ban on girls’ education.
examples.chinese: 世界各地都在抗议这条禁止女孩受教育的禁令。

examples.english: The government is considering a total ban on the sale of handguns.
examples.chinese: 政府正在考虑全面禁止出售手枪。

examples.english: A ban has been imposed on the hunting and killing of whales.
examples.chinese: 已颁布了不许捕杀鲸的禁令。

examples.english: The new prime minister agreed to lift the ban on opposition newspapers.
examples.chinese: 新首相同意取消对反对派报纸的禁令。

examples.english: Economic sanctions can be as effective as military action.
examples.chinese: 经济制裁可以与军事行动一样有效。

examples.english: The Canadian foreign minister criticized U.S. sanctions against Cuba.
examples.chinese: 这位加拿大外交部长批评了美国对古巴的制裁。

examples.english: Protesters called for sanctions on all countries that violate the human rights of their citizens.
examples.chinese: 抗议者要求对所有侵犯本国公民人权的国家进行制裁。

examples.english: The U.S. threatened to impose sanctions on any country that used chemical or biological weapons.
examples.chinese: 美国威胁要对任何使用化学或生物武器的国家实施制裁。

examples.english: There was a relaxation of the American trade embargo.
examples.chinese: 美国贸易禁运有了一些放松。

examples.english: an embargo on British beef
examples.chinese: 对英国牛肉的禁运

examples.english: The government has imposed an arms embargo on countries involved in international terrorism.
examples.chinese: 该政府对从事国际恐怖主义活动的国家实行了武器禁运。

examples.english: A court injunction forbade Clive Heywood to enter his wife's house.
examples.chinese: 法院颁布了一道禁制令，不准克莱夫·海伍德进入妻子的房子。

examples.english: The government is taking out an injunction against the newspaper to try to stop it publishing a secret report.
examples.chinese: 政府在向法院申请禁制令，试图阻止这家报纸刊登一份机密报告。

centers.english: to defend a person, place, or country from attack
centers.chinese: 保护某人、地方或国家免受攻击

examples.english: Hundreds of soldiers died while defending the town.
examples.chinese: 在保卫该镇的战斗中，几百名战士牺牲了。

examples.english: US troops in Panama will only be used to defend the Canal.
examples.chinese: 在巴拿马的美军只是用来保护巴拿马运河的。

examples.english: The castle was built in 1549 to defend the island against invaders.
examples.chinese: 这座城堡建于1549年，目的是保护该岛不受侵略者袭击。

examples.english: Carson claims he was defending himself when he struck the other man.
examples.chinese: 卡森声称他是为了自卫才打另一名男子的。

examples.english: The bunkers were built on the cliffs to hold off the enemy's landing forces.
examples.chinese: 地堡筑在悬崖上以抵御敌人的登陆部队。

examples.english: At that point our troops were too weak to hold them off.
examples.chinese: 我军在那个时候很弱，抵挡不住他们。

examples.english: Things seemed to be going badly until NATO forces came to their defence.
examples.chinese: 形势似乎趋向恶化，直至北约部队来保卫了他们。

expressions.text: come to the defence/defense of somebody

examples.english: Rhonda came to the defense of her brother by swinging a chain at his attacker.
examples.chinese: 朗达为保护她弟弟，向攻击者挥舞链条。

expressions.text: in defence of something /defense of somethin

examples.english: Would you be prepared to fight in defence of your country?
examples.chinese: 你愿意为保卫祖国而战吗?

examples.english: These brave young men have given their lives in defence of freedom.
examples.chinese: 这些勇敢的年轻人为维护自由而献出了生命。

centers.english: used for defence against attack

examples.english: Defense is expected to be a big issue during the next election.
examples.chinese: 国防有可能成为下一次大选时的主要议题。

examples.english: Defence spending has risen by 10% in the current budget.
examples.chinese: 在当前的预算中国防开支已增加了10%。

examples.english: The military is continuing to work on its missile defense system.
examples.chinese: 军方在继续致力建设导弹防御系统。

examples.english: The defence industry relies heavily on sales of weapons to foreign countries.
examples.chinese: 国防工业严重依赖向外国出售武器。

examples.english: All nations have the right to self-defence.
examples.chinese: 所有国家都有自卫的权利。

examples.english: self-defence classes
examples.chinese: 自卫培训班

examples.english: She claims she shot him in self-defence.
examples.chinese: 她声称向他开枪是出于自卫。

examples.english: The new radar system is an important part of the country's defences.
examples.chinese: 这个新的雷达系统是该国国防的重要组成部分。

examples.english: The country has responded to threats of invasion by strengthening its defenses.
examples.chinese: 这个国家以加强国防力量来回应入侵的威胁。

examples.english: Police officers claimed that their actions during the riots were purely defensive.
examples.chinese: 警方声称，他们在暴乱中的行动完全是出于防卫。

examples.english: According to the report, only defensive weapons had been supplied to Iran.
examples.chinese: 该报道称提供给伊朗的仅限于防卫性武器。

centers.english: to defend an idea or person when they are criticized
centers.chinese: 当某观念或个人受到批评时为其辩护

examples.english: It's difficult to defend a sport that involves hurting animals.
examples.chinese: 很难为一项伤害动物的运动作辩解。

examples.english: Her speech defended the workers’ right to strike.
examples.chinese: 她的讲话为工人的罢工权利作了辩护。

examples.english: The Fire Chief defended his staff and said that they had done everything possible to save the girl's life.
examples.chinese: 消防队长为其属下辩护，说他们已尽了一切努力来营救那名女孩的生命。

examples.english: She has repeatedly tried to defend her husband against hostile criticism in the press.
examples.chinese: 她一再试图对报界恶意的批评为丈夫作辩护。

examples.english: Everyone was shouting at me, and I never got a chance to defend myself.
examples.chinese: 大家都朝我大喊大叫，我一直没有机会为自己辩解。

examples.english: Carey vigorously defended his fund-raising methods.
examples.chinese: 凯里奋力为自己的筹款方式作辩护。

examples.english: You have to be ready to stand up for the things you believe in.
examples.chinese: 你必须有思想准备，要坚决维护自己的信念。

examples.english: Didn't anyone stand up for James and say it wasn't his fault?
examples.chinese: 没人站出来为詹姆斯辩解，说这事不是他的错吗?

examples.english: Don't let her get away with that - stand up for yourself.
examples.chinese: 别让她就那样逃避了责任，你得挺身为自己辩护。

examples.english: The only person who stuck up for me was Sarah.
examples.chinese: 唯一支持我的是萨拉。

examples.english: You're her husband - you should stick up for her.
examples.chinese: 你是她丈夫—你应当支持她。

expressions.text: come to somebody's defence/come to the defence of somebody /defens

examples.english: Dad seemed to think the accident was my fault, but Judy came to my defence and told him what had happened.
examples.chinese: 爸爸好像认为这祸是我闯的，但朱迪为我辩护，跟他说了事情的经过。

examples.english: A large group of supporters have come to Robinson's defense.
examples.chinese: 一大群支持者来为鲁宾逊作辩护。

examples.english: Surprisingly, Major came to the defence of his old enemy.
examples.chinese: 令人吃惊的是，梅杰竟为他的老敌手辩护。

examples.english: As far as I'm concerned, there is nothing you can say in her defence.
examples.chinese: 在我看来，你没什么可以为她辩护的。

examples.english: I ought to say, in Jim's defence, that he only heard about the meeting half an hour ago.
examples.chinese: 我得为吉姆说一句，他半小时前才听说开会的事。

examples.english: No one spoke up in defense of Principal Blackman during the entire meeting.
examples.chinese: 整个会议期间没有人为布莱克曼校长辩护一句。

expressions.text: in defence of something /defense of somethin

examples.english: The miners went on strike in defence of their jobs.
examples.chinese: 为了保住工作，矿工们继续罢工。

examples.english: She spoke bravely and defiantly in defence of human rights.
examples.chinese: 为了维护人权，她作了一番勇敢无畏的演说。

examples.english: The article was a rather unconvincing defence of her economic record.
examples.chinese: 这篇文章对她经济纪录的辩护相当不能使人信服。

examples.english: Pacheco gave a vigorous defense of the state's affirmative action laws.
examples.chinese: 帕切科为该州的积极行动法作了强有力的辩护。

centers.english: when it is someone's job or duty to do something
centers.chinese: 做某事是某人的工作或职责

examples.english: The CEO is responsible for the day-to-day operation of the company.
examples.chinese: 行政总裁负责公司的日常运作。

examples.english: Why is it in our society that women are primarily responsible for raising children?
examples.chinese: 为什么在我们的社会中，养育子女的职责主要由女性来承担？

examples.english: The Navy has responsibility for the defense of the island.
examples.chinese: 海军负责守卫这小岛。

examples.english: The health minister has overall responsibility for Britain's hospitals.
examples.chinese: 卫生部长对英国的医院全面负责。

examples.english: She's done her part of the job. The rest is up to Phillip.
examples.chinese: 她已经干完了自己那部分的工作，其他的由菲利普负责。

expressions.text: it is up to somebody to do something

examples.english: It is up to the teacher to keep the class quiet and working hard.
examples.chinese: 让学生保持安静并勤奋学习，这是老师的责任。

examples.english: Who's in charge of the club's finances?
examples.chinese: 谁主管俱乐部的财务?

examples.english: The UN officer is in charge of coordinating all refugee programs in the region.
examples.chinese: 这位联合国官员负责协调这地区的所有安排难民的计划。

examples.english: The agency in charge of enforcing Mexico's gun laws declined requests for an interview.
examples.chinese: 负责执行墨西哥州枪支管理法的部门拒绝接受采访。

examples.english: My assistant takes care of all the travel arrangements - you'll have to ask him.
examples.chinese: 我的助手负责所有的旅行事宜，请问他吧。

examples.english: Sally looks after the accounts, and I'm in charge of the building itself.
examples.chinese: 萨莉负责账目，我管建筑项目。

examples.english: The onus of restarting the economy is on the government.
examples.chinese: 重振经济责任在政府。

expressions.text: the onus is on sb to do something

examples.english: The onus is on the taxpayer to make sure they pay enough tax.
examples.chinese: 纳税人有责任保证把税交足。

examples.english: At university the onus is on you to work hard - no one is going to force you.
examples.chinese: 在大学里用功学习是你的责任—没有人会强迫你。

centers.english: something that is your job or your duty to do
centers.chinese: 做某事是你的工作或职责

examples.english: The house is my responsibility, and I can't just let it fall apart.
examples.chinese: 我有责任照看这房子，不能就看着它坍塌。

examples.english: Having children is a big responsibility and I'm not sure I'm ready for that yet.
examples.chinese: 有子女可是个重大的责任，我不知道是否已准备好去承担它。

examples.english: It is a manager's responsibility to set clear expectations for his or her employees.
examples.chinese: 给手下的员工制订出明确的工作目标是经理的职责。

examples.english: I have a bad habit of taking on more responsibilities than I can handle.
examples.chinese: 我有个坏习惯，就是喜欢承担超出自己能力的责任。

examples.english: I'm not doing the shopping - that's your job.
examples.chinese: 我才不去买东西呢—那是你的事。

examples.english: Agency employees must enforce regulations once they're approved. That's their job.
examples.chinese: 法规一旦通过，行政部门的工作人员就必须负责其实施，那是他们的职责。

expressions.text: it's somebody's job to do something

examples.english: It's my job to make sure all the guests are comfortable.
examples.chinese: 使所有的客人感到舒适是我的责任。

examples.english: I don't give out parking tickets because I like to - it's my duty.
examples.chinese: 我可不是为自己高兴就开出停车罚款单的—这是我的职责。

expressions.text: it is somebody's duty to do something

examples.english: I think it's your duty to tell her what you know.
examples.chinese: 我觉得你有责任把知道的情况告诉她。

examples.english: My duty as a police officer is to find out the facts and communicate them to the proper people.
examples.chinese: 身为警察，我的职责是找出事实真相，并与相关人员联系。

examples.english: As the families wept openly, the prosecutor urged the jury to do its duty and convict Ballenger.
examples.chinese: 家属当众哭起来，控方律师强烈要求陪审团尽本分判巴伦杰有罪。

examples.english: Running the business on my own can be a burden at times.
examples.chinese: 自己做生意有时也是一个负担。

examples.english: The minister has the burden of explaining why he must raise taxes.
examples.chinese: 部长有责任对为何增税作出解释。

examples.english: She has three children and heavy financial burdens at home.
examples.chinese: 她有三个孩子，家里经济负担很重。

examples.english: Carrying the burdens of leadership is never an easy task.
examples.chinese: 挑起领导担子绝不是件容易的事。

centers.english: to agree to be responsible for something

examples.english: I'm very busy. I'm afraid I can't take anything else on at the moment.
examples.chinese: 我很忙，恐怕这阵子不能负责其他事了。

examples.english: Alice always seems willing to take on extra work without complaining.
examples.chinese: 艾丽丝好像总是愿意毫无怨言地承担额外的工作。

examples.english: The ship's owner has assumed responsibility for cleaning up the oil spill.
examples.chinese: 船主承担了清除溢油的责任。

examples.english: It was natural for Richard, as elder son, to assume responsibility for the family.
examples.chinese: 作为长子，理查德自然担起了家庭的责任。

examples.english: The burden of supporting the poor is shouldered mainly by charities.
examples.chinese: 资助穷人的重担主要由慈善机构来承担。

examples.english: The company is unwilling to shoulder the cost of installing a daycare center.
examples.chinese: 公司不愿负担设立日托中心的费用。

centers.english: to give the responsibility for doing something to another person
centers.chinese: 给予别人做某事的责任

examples.english: The law makes the government responsible for clean up of the waste at these sites.
examples.chinese: 法律规定政府有责任清理这些地方的废弃物。

examples.english: Our department has been made responsible for all areas of training.
examples.chinese: 我们部门负责全方位的训练工作。

examples.english: The best way of ensuring that the chores are done is by making each child responsible for a different one.
examples.chinese: 保证完成家务的最好办法是让孩子们每人负责一件事。

examples.english: The boss is going to be out of the office next week, and he's putting me in charge.
examples.chinese: 下周老板不在办公室，他让我全权负责。

examples.english: Who have they put in charge of the investigation?
examples.chinese: 他们派谁去负责这项调查？

examples.english: He had done rather well in the job and had been put in charge of a whole chain of stores.
examples.chinese: 他工作干得不错，被安排主管整个连锁店。

examples.english: New managers often find it difficult to delegate.
examples.chinese: 新上任的经理经常觉得委派人做事很难。

examples.english: If you're so busy, why don't you delegate some of your work?
examples.chinese: 如果你这么忙，那为什么不派点工作让别人做？

examples.english: It's easy to pass the buck and blame someone else for your failure.
examples.chinese: 推卸责任，把自己的失败归咎于他人是很容易的。

examples.english: Diplomats say NATO is clearly at fault, and that officials there are trying to pass the buck.
examples.chinese: 外交官说北约组织显然犯了错，北约的官员是在试图推卸责任。

examples.english: I didn't have time to do the accounts so I left them with Sophie.
examples.chinese: 我没有时间做账，所以就交给索菲了。

examples.english: Can we leave all this with you? It's just too complicated for us to understand.
examples.chinese: 我们把这全交给你行吗？太复杂了，我们理解不了。

examples.english: Leave it to me. I'll find you a place to stay.
examples.chinese: 交给我来安排吧，我会给你找个住的地方。

expressions.text: leave it to somebody to do something

examples.english: Can I leave it to you to sort out the details of the conference?
examples.chinese: 我把会议的详细内容交给你整理好吗?

examples.english: The proposal leaves it to local communities to enforce the law.
examples.chinese: 此项提议要交给地方委员会来执法。

examples.english: I foolishly entrusted the task of collecting the money to Ron.
examples.chinese: 我愚蠢地把收钱的事交托给罗恩去做了。

examples.english: Managers show respect for employees by entrusting them with important decisions.
examples.chinese: 经理把重要决定交由员工来作，以此显示出对员工的尊重。

expressions.text: entrust somebody/something to the care of somebody

examples.english: As a child Bertrand was entrusted to the care of nuns at a local convent.
examples.chinese: 伯特兰小时候被托给当地修道院的修女来照料。

centers.english: guilty

examples.english: The guilty were each given a life sentence.
examples.chinese: 每个犯人都被判了无期徒刑。

examples.english: The jury found Sewell guilty and he was sent to prison.
examples.chinese: 陪审团认为休厄尔有罪，把他关进了监狱。

examples.english: A 23-year-old woman was found guilty of murder in the Central Court today.
examples.chinese: 今天一名23岁的女子在中央法院被判谋杀罪名成立。

examples.english: Davis was found guilty of abducting and killing Polly Klaas.
examples.chinese: 戴维斯被判绑架和杀害波莉·克拉斯的罪名成立。

examples.english: Roberts pleaded guilty to driving without insurance.
examples.chinese: 罗伯茨供认他的汽车没有购买保险。

examples.english: The other driver was responsible for the accident, and he should pay for the damage.
examples.chinese: 另一个司机对事故负有责任，他应该赔偿损失。

examples.english: Police believe a local gang is responsible for the recent burglaries.
examples.chinese: 警方相信最近的这些入室盗窃案是当地的一个犯罪团伙干的。

examples.english: Mrs Williams says that the hospital was responsible for her husband's death.
examples.chinese: 威廉姆斯太太说，医院对她丈夫的死负有责任。

examples.english: If people develop smoking-related diseases, are they or the tobacco companies culpable?
examples.chinese: 如果人们得了抽烟引起的疾病，谁应该负责，他们自己还是烟草公司？

examples.english: Lawyers are debating whether allowing a terminally ill patient to die amounts to culpable homicide a legal decision that someone was criminally guilty of the death.
examples.chinese: 律师们在争论让晚期病人死亡是不是就等于犯了杀人罪。

centers.english: someone who is guilty

examples.english: Some money was taken from my desk yesterday. I think I know who the culprit is.
examples.chinese: 昨天我放在写字台上的一些钱被人拿了，我想我知道这个小偷是谁。

examples.english: The police did everything they could to try and track down the culprit, but he was never caught.
examples.chinese: 警方竭尽所能追捕罪犯，但是始终没有抓到他。

examples.english: We think we know who the guilty party is, but we need your help to find the evidence.
examples.chinese: 我们认为我们知道谁是有罪的一方，但需要你的帮助来找出证据。

examples.english: It's silly to imagine that one partner in a divorce is completely innocent and that the other is the sole guilty party.
examples.chinese: 认为离婚事件中一方毫无过错，过错全在于另一方，这是很愚蠢的。

centers.english: to show that someone is guilty

examples.english: She is claiming that the police are deliberately trying to implicate her.
examples.chinese: 她声称警方故意在把她牵连其中。

examples.english: New evidence implicates Mr Stapleton and his wife in the blackmail attempt.
examples.chinese: 新的证据表明斯特普尔顿先生和他的妻子与敲诈案有牵连。

examples.english: The managing director of the bank was implicated in a fraud scandal.
examples.chinese: 这家银行的总经理被卷入一桩欺诈丑闻。

examples.english: The killer left an incriminating trail of footprints across the lawn.
examples.chinese: 凶手在草地上留下了一串可以作为犯罪证据的脚印。

examples.english: Police found incriminating letters in the suspect's home.
examples.chinese: 警方在嫌疑犯的家中发现了可以证明他有罪的一些信件。

examples.english: They tried to dispose of the incriminating evidence by burning all their blood-stained clothes.
examples.chinese: 他们烧毁所有的血衣，想消灭罪证。

examples.english: Tape recordings of alleged conversations between the two suspects are unlikely to incriminate them.
examples.chinese: 据称是两个嫌疑犯之间对话的录音磁带不太可能显示出他们有罪。

examples.english: These tapes incriminate a number of well-known politicians.
examples.chinese: 这些录音带把一些知名政治家牵涉在内。

centers.english: to deliberately try to make someone seem guilty when they are not
centers.chinese: 故意使没有罪的人显得有罪

examples.english: He wasn't guilty of the fraud. He'd been set up by his business rivals.
examples.chinese: 他没有诈骗，是被商业对手陷害的。

examples.english: Cahill has always protested his innocence, and insists that someone set him up.
examples.chinese: 卡希尔一直声辩自己清白，坚持说有人陷害他。

examples.english: That's not my handwriting and it's not my signature! I've been framed.
examples.chinese: 那不是我的字迹，也不是我的签名！我是被人诬陷的。

examples.english: Healey agreed to defend two young men, who were being framed in a local murder case.
examples.chinese: 希利同意为两名青年男子辩护，他们被诬陷卷入当地的一宗谋杀案。

examples.english: The accused told the court that the police tried to frame him for assault.
examples.chinese: 被告在法庭上说警方想以侵犯人身罪诬陷他。

examples.english: The police pinned the murder on two men who were later proved to be innocent.
examples.chinese: 警方认为这宗凶案是两名男子所为，但后来证明他们无罪。

examples.english: You're not going to pin it on me! I was a hundred miles away at the time.
examples.chinese: 这事你别想赖我！我当时还在一百英里之外呢。

examples.english: The police found the stolen cameras in his flat, but he insisted they had been planted.
examples.chinese: 警察在他的寓所发现了失窃的相机，但他坚持说有人栽赃。

examples.english: Someone planted the drugs on her before she left the country.
examples.chinese: 有人在她出国之前把毒品栽赃给她。

centers.english: to officially prove that someone is guilty

examples.english: Think of all the time they've wasted trying to prove me guilty, while the real killer goes free.
examples.chinese: 你想想，他们花了那么多时间来证明我有罪，而真正的凶手却逍遥法外。

examples.english: It is a basic principle of US law, that a person is innocent until proven guilty.
examples.chinese: 一个人被证实有罪之前是清白的，这是美国法律的基本原则。

examples.english: If the jury finds him guilty he will face a maximum sentence of seven years.
examples.chinese: 如果陪审团定他有罪，他将面临最长七年的徒刑。

examples.english: No one has yet been convicted of any of the terrorist attacks.
examples.chinese: 还没有人因这些恐怖袭击被判定有罪。

examples.english: The two men were found guilty of the murder and jailed for life.
examples.chinese: 这两名男子被判谋杀罪名成立，处以终身监禁。

expressions.text: find somebody guilty of doing something

examples.english: He was found guilty of supplying drugs.
examples.chinese: 他被判提供毒品的罪名成立。

examples.english: Have you ever been convicted of a criminal offence?
examples.chinese: 你有没有被判过刑事罪？

examples.english: All four men were convicted of illegally bringing drugs into the country.
examples.chinese: 四个人全都因为非法携带毒品入境被判了刑。

centers.english: to feel guilty

examples.english: I felt really guilty after spending all that money.
examples.chinese: 花完了那些钱之后，我心里十分内疚。

examples.english: Are you feeling guilty because you didn't help her?
examples.chinese: 你是因为没有帮助她而感到内疚吗？

examples.english: Ed felt guilty about leaving work so early.
examples.chinese: 埃德对这么早下班感到内疚。

examples.english: She felt thoroughly ashamed when she remembered how drunk she'd been.
examples.chinese: 她想起自己醉成那个样子，心里极度惭愧。

examples.english: I feel ashamed of what I did.
examples.chinese: 我对自己所做的事感到很惭愧。

examples.english: I'm ashamed to admit it, but I wasn't really sorry when he died.
examples.chinese: 我真是羞于承认，他死的时候我不是很难过。

examples.english: We had a long talk about it afterwards and I know she felt bad.
examples.chinese: 后来我们长谈了一次，我知道她心里很不好受。

examples.english: I should have told Helen I was sorry. I feel really bad that I didn't.
examples.chinese: 我应该跟海伦说对不起的，我非常后悔我没有说。

examples.english: I feel bad about what I said. Things haven't been easy for either of us.
examples.chinese: 我说了那些话心里很难受，事情对我们俩来说都很不容易。

examples.english: I feel bad about not going to Debbie's party, but I've just got too much to do.
examples.chinese: 没有参加黛比的聚会我很不好意思，但我的确有很多事要做。

examples.english: You mustn't blame yourself. It was an accident. There was nothing you could have done.
examples.chinese: 你不应该责怪自己，这是一场意外，你没有办法的。

examples.english: Assistant coach Rex Hughes blamed himself for the team's poor performance.
examples.chinese: 助理教练雷克斯·休斯把球队欠佳的表现归咎于自己。

examples.english: I'm sorry it didn't work out. I feel responsible.
examples.chinese: 对不起，这个事情没有解决。是我不好。

examples.english: For a long time afterwards I felt responsible for his death.
examples.chinese: 事后有很长时间我都觉得自己对他的死负有责任。

examples.english: I suppose I did have a guilty conscience for a while, but not any more.
examples.chinese: 我有一阵子确实良心上感到不安，但是现在都过去了。

examples.english: Why is she being so nice to everyone all of a sudden? She's obviously got a guilty conscience about something.
examples.chinese: 她为什么突然之间对大家都这么好？显然她心里有什么事觉得内疚。

examples.english: Even if you didn't get caught, the murder would be on your conscience for the rest of your life.
examples.chinese: 即使你不被抓住，这件凶杀案也会让你的良心一辈子不安。

examples.english: In the end Martin told his wife about his affair - he just couldn't live with it on his conscience.
examples.chinese: 最后马丁把自己的婚外情告诉了妻子一他在良心上受不了。

centers.english: a guilty feeling

examples.english: Guilt can be a very destructive emotion.
examples.chinese: 内疚可以是一种破坏性很强的情绪。

examples.english: People often have feelings of guilt after a divorce.
examples.chinese: 人们离婚之后常常有一种内疚感。

examples.english: Voting through cuts in benefits to the poorest people is a matter of shame for all of us.
examples.chinese: 投票通过削减最贫困人民福利的计划，是我们所有人的羞耻。

examples.english: Too many women are taught to feel guilt or shame about sex.
examples.chinese: 有太多的女性都受到这样的教育——在性方面要有内疚或者羞愧的感觉。

examples.english: As he left the house, Mungo felt a pang of shame at telling Alice a lie.
examples.chinese: 芒戈离开房子的时候，因为对爱丽丝说了谎而感到一阵羞愧。

examples.english: The next day I remembered how drunk I'd been , and almost died of shame.
examples.chinese: 第二天我想起自己当时的醉态，羞愧得要命。

examples.english: Some girls feel that refusing their parents’ choice of husband will bring shame on their family.
examples.chinese: 有些女孩认为，在选择丈夫方面抗拒父母之命会使家庭蒙羞。

examples.english: He admitted killing the man but showed no sign of remorse.
examples.chinese: 他承认杀了那男人，但没有表示出一点悔恨之意。

examples.english: She was full of remorse for hurting her family.
examples.chinese: 她因为伤害了家人而后悔莫及。

examples.english: Many men are afflicted with guilt and remorse at leaving their wives.
examples.chinese: 许多男人因为离开妻子感到内疚和悔恨，心里备受折磨。

examples.english: The woman sounded so nice, McKee felt a twinge of remorse at what he had done to her family.
examples.chinese: 那女人听上去人很好，麦基为自己对她家所做的一切感到一阵懊悔。

examples.english: Her murderer was a psychopath with a total lack of conscience.
examples.chinese: 杀她的凶手是个毫无良知的精神变态者。

examples.english: He was capable of making the most ruthless decisions with no apparent pangs of conscience.
examples.chinese: 他能作出最残酷的决定，丝毫看不出有良心上的不安。

centers.english: to not feel guilty about something

expressions.gram: verb phrase not usually in progressive

examples.english: I made her cry but I don't feel guilty -- she deserved it.
examples.chinese: 我把她弄哭了，但我并不感到内疚—她活该的。

examples.english: Working mothers shouldn't feel guilty about wanting a career.
examples.chinese: 在职妈妈不应该为追求事业而感到内疚。

examples.english: I don't understand how on earth he can go on lying like that and not feel guilty about it.
examples.chinese: 我不明白他究竟怎么做得出来，总是这样撒谎，心里也不觉得内疚。

examples.english: You can face Lionel with a clear conscience -- you've done nothing to harm him.
examples.chinese: 你可以问心无愧地面对莱昂内尔，你没有做过任何伤害他的事。

examples.english: Let them say whatever they like. I have a clear conscience.
examples.chinese: 让他们随便说吧，我问心无愧。

examples.english: She had no qualms about sending her young children to boarding school.
examples.chinese: 她把幼小的孩子送到寄宿学校上学，心里没有一丝不安。

examples.english: Donald had been stealing stationery from work for years and had no qualms about it at all.
examples.chinese: 几年来唐纳德一直从公司偷文具，但丝毫不觉得愧疚。

examples.english: I warn you. These people have no compunction whatsoever and cannot be trusted.
examples.chinese: 我提醒你——这些人毫无悔疚之心，不可以信任。

examples.english: Eliot felt no compunction about living at the expense of his friends.
examples.chinese: 埃利奥特靠着朋友生活，心里毫无愧意。

centers.english: to stop yourself feeling guilty

examples.english: She felt guilty and tried to salve her conscience by inviting him out for a meal.
examples.chinese: 她感到内疚，便请他吃顿饭，想让自己的良心得到宽慰。

examples.english: Don't think you can salve your consciences by giving us money. We won't forgive you that easily.
examples.chinese: 别以为给我们钱你的良心就能安宁了，我们不会那么轻易就原谅你的。

examples.english: She decided to clear her conscience and confess everything.
examples.chinese: 她决定消除良心上的不安，把一切都坦白出来。

examples.english: He knew he might get into trouble if he went to the police but he had to do it to clear his conscience.
examples.chinese: 他知道投案自首就会有麻烦，但他必须这么做以消除良心上的不安。

centers.english: to punish someone

examples.english: She was suspended while the school decided how to punish her.
examples.chinese: 她被停了课，由校方决定如何处罚她。

examples.english: His parents punished him for disobedience.
examples.chinese: 他不听话，父母责罚他。

examples.english: The U.S. threatened to take away trading privileges as a way to punish the country for human rights violations.
examples.chinese: 美国威胁取消贸易优惠作为对该国践踏人权的处罚。

examples.english: Two instructors were punished for harassing female students.
examples.chinese: 两名讲师因骚扰女学生而受罚。

examples.english: Inspectors have the power to fine any passenger travelling without a ticket.
examples.chinese: 查票员有权对无票乘车者罚款。

examples.english: She was fined $300 for reckless driving.
examples.chinese: 她因莽撞驾驶被罚300美元。

examples.english: One player was fined for fighting during the game.
examples.chinese: 一名队员因比赛时斗殴被罚款。

examples.english: The state fined the company for safety violations.
examples.chinese: 该州因该公司违反安全措施，对其处以罚款。

examples.english: Because of the serious nature of the crime, the judge gave him 20 years.
examples.chinese: 因为犯罪性质严重，法官判他20年徒刑。

expressions.text: give sb 6 years/10 months etc for

examples.english: After a long trial she was given a life sentence for the bombings.
examples.chinese: 经过长时间的审理，她因数次炸弹爆炸案被判终身监禁。

examples.english: Brown will be sentenced for a series of sexual assaults.
examples.chinese: 布朗因犯一系列性侵犯罪将被判刑。

expressions.text: sentence somebody to 20 years/life imprisonment etc

examples.english: The judge sentenced Margolis to a year in prison.
examples.chinese: 法官判马戈利斯一年有期徒刑。

expressions.text: sentence somebody to 20 years/life imprisonment etc for something

examples.english: Some countries will sentence you to seven or more years in prison for drug offences.
examples.chinese: 一些国家会判犯吸毒、藏毒等罪者七年或七年以上徒刑。

examples.english: 60 prisoners have been sentenced to death in political trials.
examples.chinese: 60名犯人因政治案件被判处死刑。

examples.english: I hope a night in the cells has taught you a lesson.
examples.chinese: 我希望在牢房里关一晚上会给你一个教训。

examples.english: He was treating me badly, so I left - I just wanted to teach him a lesson.
examples.chinese: 他待我不好，所以我走了一我只想给他一个教训。

examples.english: If I ever find out who did this, I'll make them pay!
examples.chinese: 如果我查出是谁干的，我会让他们付出代价！

examples.english: I wanted to make my father pay for his betrayal.
examples.chinese: 我要让父亲为他的背叛行为付出代价。

examples.english: The prosecution asked jurors to make Mr. Sanderson pay for what he did.
examples.chinese: 控方请陪审团让桑德森先生为自己的行为付出代价。

examples.english: New laws will penalize firms that continue to pollute the environment.
examples.chinese: 新法律会处罚那些继续污染环境的公司。

examples.english: It is unfair that the whole class should be penalized because of the bad behaviour of a few students.
examples.chinese: 整个班级因其中几个人的行为不端而受到处罚是不公平的。

examples.english: A referee may penalise players for wasting time.
examples.chinese: 裁判可能会处罚故意拖延时间的运动员。

examples.english: The House of Representatives voted to penalize him for ethics violations.
examples.chinese: 众议院投票决定对他违反道德的行为作出处罚。

examples.english: Officers are expected to discipline soldiers who do not keep their uniforms in good condition.
examples.chinese: 军官们应该处罚那些不保持制服整洁的士兵。

examples.english: Anyone who is regularly late for work is likely to be disciplined or dismissed.
examples.chinese: 经常迟到的人可能会遭处罚或被开除。

examples.english: Even when Morton and Collins started fighting on the field, neither player was disciplined.
examples.chinese: 即使是莫伦和柯林斯在赛场上先打起架来，他们两人也无一遭到处罚。

examples.english: Government forces immediately took punitive action against the rebels.
examples.chinese: 政府军立刻对叛军采取惩罚性行动。

examples.english: The sanctions were a punitive measure used to try to force South Africa to reject apartheid.
examples.chinese: 这些制裁是一种惩罚性的手段，用来迫使南非放弃种族隔离制度。

examples.english: The company was ordered to pay punitive damages in a sex discrimination case.
examples.chinese: 在一起性别歧视案中，该公司被命令支付惩罚性赔偿。

examples.english: The committee members promised that appropriate disciplinary measures would be taken against the offenders.
examples.chinese: 委员们许诺将采取适当的惩戒性措施来对付违反者。

examples.english: So far, not a single person has faced prosecution or disciplinary action over the case.
examples.chinese: 迄今为止，在此案中没有一人被起诉或受到惩罚。

centers.english: to punish someone severely

examples.english: Mrs Green really came down on him for swearing.
examples.chinese: 格林太太因他骂脏话而狠狠惩罚了他。

examples.english: In the examinations we shall come down hard on any student who attempts to cheat.
examples.chinese: 考试期间，我们将严厉惩罚任何企图作弊的学生。

examples.english: The authorities are threatening to come down more heavily on drink-driving offences.
examples.chinese: 当局威胁说要更重地处罚酒后开车的司机。

examples.english: Unless you plead guilty, the prosecutors will throw the book at you.
examples.chinese: 除非认罪，否则检察官会对你从严处罚。

examples.english: Superior Court Judge Stephen Rosen threw the book at Davidson, sentencing him to six years in prison and ordering him to pay $1.6 million in restitution.
examples.chinese: 高等法院法官斯蒂芬·罗森对戴维森处以重刑，判决六年徒刑并支付160万美元赔偿金。

centers.english: to not punish someone

examples.english: I'll let you off this time, but don't do it again.
examples.chinese: 这次我放过你，但不要再干了。

expressions.text: let somebody off with a warning/a fine etc

examples.english: He was caught shoplifting, but the police let him off with a warning.
examples.chinese: 他在商店行窃被捉，但警方只警告他一下便放他走了。

examples.english: The group protested against a possible reprieve for an inmate on death row in Texas.
examples.chinese: 得州一名死囚可能改判缓刑，该组织对此表示抗议。

examples.english: He was granted a reprieve only a few hours before his execution.
examples.chinese: 他在被处决前几小时获得缓刑。

examples.english: The President issued a general amnesty to all the rebels, including their leader.
examples.chinese: 总统发布了对所有叛乱者，包括其首领的大赦令。

examples.english: The government has been forced to declare an amnesty for anyone who has not paid their taxes, because there are now too many to collect.
examples.chinese: 政府被迫宣布大赦那些未缴税的人，因为逃税的人太多，无法把钱收齐。

centers.english: a punishment

examples.english: In cases of sheep-stealing, the usual punishment was hanging.
examples.chinese: 偷羊一般被处以绞刑。

examples.english: Punishments for bad behavior can range from time-outs to withdrawing privileges, such as television
examples.chinese: 对于恶劣行为的惩罚可以从计时隔离直到取消特别待遇，如看电视等。

examples.english: Some people are demanding the return of capital punishment for murder.
examples.chinese: 有些人要求对杀人犯恢复死刑。

examples.english: Corporal punishment was banned in Sweden in 1979.
examples.chinese: 1979年瑞典禁止了体罚。

examples.english: I got a £100 fine for speeding.
examples.chinese: 我因超速驾驶被罚100英镑。

examples.english: A fine will be imposed for overstaying your visa.
examples.chinese: 签证到期继续居留会被罚款。

examples.english: The penalty is a $250 fine for the first offense.
examples.chinese: 初犯罚款250美元。

examples.english: There are heavy fines for drink-driving.
examples.chinese: 酒后驾车会被处以一大笔罚款。

examples.english: The penalty for treason was always death.
examples.chinese: 叛国罪的处罚必定是死刑。

examples.english: Drug smugglers face the death penalty if they are caught.
examples.chinese: 毒犯如果被捕会面临死刑。

examples.english: The contract includes stiff financial penalties for failure to complete the work on time.
examples.chinese: 合同写明，未按时完工将受到严厉的经济处罚。

examples.english: He got a 10-year prison sentence.
examples.chinese: 他被判十年徒刑。

examples.english: The victim's family are demanding the death sentence for his attacker.
examples.chinese: 受害者的家人要求判决袭击他的人死刑。

examples.english: Berger is serving a life sentence for the murders.
examples.chinese: 伯杰因谋杀被判终身监禁，目前正在服刑。

examples.english: Evans was given a light sentence in return for giving information to the police.
examples.chinese: 埃文斯因向警方举报被从轻判决。

examples.english: Employees need to be able to express their feelings without fear of retribution.
examples.chinese: 雇员应该能够表达自己的意见，不怕报复。

examples.english: Some officials felt that the bombings were retribution for the killing of the hijackers.
examples.chinese: 一些官员认为爆炸事件是对击毙劫持犯的报复。

examples.english: The earthquake was seen by some people as divine retribution.
examples.chinese: 地震在某些人看来是上帝的惩罚。

centers.english: to get a particular punishment

examples.english: He deserves to get at least 10 years in prison.
examples.chinese: 他至少应该判十年监禁。

examples.english: You'll probably just get a fine.
examples.chinese: 你可能只会被罚款。

examples.english: McLean was given a life sentence for his part in the bombing.
examples.chinese: 麦克莱恩因参与爆炸事件被判终身监禁。

expressions.text: be condemned to 20 years/life imprisonment etc

examples.english: Thomas McMahon was condemned to life imprisonment for killing Lord Mountbatten.
examples.chinese: 托马斯·麦克马洪因杀害蒙巴顿勋爵而被判终身监禁。

examples.english: He was taken away after being condemned for robbery and armed assault.
examples.chinese: 他犯有抢劫和武装袭击罪，判决后被带走了。

examples.english: Lewis was condemned to death after a trial lasting a year and a half.
examples.chinese: 经过一年半的审讯，刘易斯被判死刑。

examples.english: The prison rules allow no communication with a condemned man.
examples.chinese: 狱规不允许任何人与死刑犯接触。

centers.english: to be punished

examples.english: If you commit a crime you must expect to be punished.
examples.chinese: 如果你犯罪，一定会受到惩罚。

examples.english: Ellen was punished for being rude to her teacher.
examples.chinese: 埃伦因为对老师无礼受到惩罚。

examples.english: Anyone who disobeyed his orders was severely punished.
examples.chinese: 不听他命令的人都受到重罚。

examples.english: I've spent the last three years in jail. I tell you, I've paid for what I did.
examples.chinese: 过去的三年我是在监狱里度过的。我告诉你，我已为自己所做的付出了代价。

examples.english: People who sell drugs to our children should pay dearly for it.
examples.chinese: 将毒品卖给孩子的人应当为此付出昂贵的代价。

examples.english: Until the cause of the accident was proven, the company made it clear that it was not willing to take the rap.
examples.chinese: 事故的原因查清之前，该公司明确表示不愿背黑锅。

examples.english: The defense argued that Green was set up to take the rap for the murder of Roy Robinson.
examples.chinese: 辩方辩称，有人让格林在罗伊·罗宾逊谋杀案中当替罪羊。

examples.english: I prefer driving; I don't want to take the rap for getting lost.
examples.chinese: 我情愿开车；我可不想因迷路受责。

examples.english: Rather than face the music at a trial, Abingdon chose to plea bargain.
examples.chinese: 阿宾顿情愿达成认罪辩诉协议，而不愿在审判时接受惩罚。

centers.english: to not be punished

examples.english: If he gets off, it's because he has a smart lawyer.
examples.chinese: 如果他逃脱惩罚，只是因为他有一位聪明的律师。

examples.english: You got off easy; you should have been expelled.
examples.chinese: 你没吃亏；本来你是要被开除的。

examples.english: Despite the evidence against him, Heston got off scot-free.
examples.chinese: 尽管证据对他不利，赫斯顿却没受到惩罚。

expressions.gram: transitive phrasal verb not in passive

examples.english: He probably got away with about a dozen crimes before he was finally arrested for one.
examples.chinese: 他在最后被逮捕前可能已犯了一打罪行而没受到惩罚。

examples.english: He was the only child in the class who could be rude to the teacher and get away with it.
examples.chinese: 他是班里唯一一个能够顶撞老师而不受惩罚的学生。

examples.english: Ronnoe lets his kids get away with murder.
examples.chinese: 伦内允许自己的孩子为所欲为。

examples.english: Frye was arrested on state and federal charges, but he managed to beat the rap.
examples.chinese: 弗赖伊因州和联邦指控被逮捕，但他还是逃脱了罪责。

examples.english: If you see others breaking the law with impunity, you may be tempted to do the same.
examples.chinese: 如果你看到别人违反法律却不受惩罚，你可能会受到诱惑去干同样的事。

examples.english: The previous regime was corrupt, and government officials were able to flout the law with impunity.
examples.chinese: 前政府腐化成风，政府官员可以藐视法律却不受惩罚。

examples.english: Guards involved in drug deals went unpunished.
examples.chinese: 涉及毒品交易的卫兵未受惩罚。

examples.english: Hate crimes will not be tolerated and will not go unpunished.
examples.chinese: 仇视犯罪不会被容忍，必受惩罚。

centers.english: to not be punished severely enough
centers.chinese: 未受到足够严厉的惩罚

examples.english: If you're lucky you'll get off with a warning, if you're not you'll have to pay a fine.
examples.chinese: 如果你幸运的话，只会受到警告而已；如果你运气不好，就得罚款。

examples.english: It's appalling that rapists can get off with such short prison sentences.
examples.chinese: 强奸犯被从轻发落，只判那么短的有期徒刑真是令人震惊。

examples.english: Phil kept complaining that the $500 fine was unfair, but I think he got off lightly.
examples.chinese: 菲尔不断抱怨500美元的罚款不公平，但我认为他被罚得很轻。

examples.english: The fine was so low, it was little more than a slap on the wrist.
examples.chinese: 罚款那么低，真是不痛不痒。

examples.english: In the past, officers who mistreated prisoners often received a mere slap on the wrist.
examples.chinese: 过去，虐待囚犯的警察常常仅受到微不足道的处罚。

centers.english: when someone is likely to be punished

examples.english: You'll be in trouble if they catch you cheating.
examples.chinese: 如果他们发现你在作弊，你就有麻烦了。

examples.english: My sister's in trouble with the police again.
examples.chinese: 我姐姐又与警察惹上麻烦了。

examples.english: I'll get into trouble if my parents see me smoking.
examples.chinese: 要是父母看到我吸烟，我会有麻烦的。

examples.english: A lot of people think the murdered man had it coming.
examples.chinese: 许多人认为那个遇害男子是活该的。

examples.english: He had it coming to him, the jerk.
examples.chinese: 他咎由自取，那个混蛋。

centers.english: a crime

examples.english: The number of crimes reported in the New York City area has decreased dramatically over the last ten years.
examples.chinese: 在过去的十年中，纽约市区的报案数量大大下降。

examples.english: Investigators believe that the crime was committed at around 7.30 p.m.
examples.chinese: 调查人员相信，这宗案件发生在晚上7点30分左右。

examples.english: He was sentenced to 25 years in prison for rape and other sexual crimes against women.
examples.chinese: 他因强奸及其他性犯罪，被判25年监禁。

examples.english: Not surprisingly, the police say that 50% of serious crimes are drug-related.
examples.chinese: 警方称50%的重大罪案与毒品有关，这并不奇怪。

examples.english: The demonstrators called on the governor to make solving the crime a priority.
examples.chinese: 示威群众要求州长将侦破这宗罪案列为头等大事。

examples.english: Tarrant is now in jail for various offenses, including rape.
examples.chinese: 塔兰特正在服刑，他犯了多种罪行，包括强奸。

examples.english: Bates is being tried for offences committed in the early 1990s.
examples.chinese: 贝茨因20世纪90年代早期犯下的罪行正在接受审判。

examples.english: Driving under the influence of alcohol is a criminal offense.
examples.chinese: 酒后驾车是刑事犯罪。

examples.english: The bill seeks to make it a criminal offence to inflict cruelty on any animal.
examples.chinese: 该法案建议将虐待动物定为刑事犯罪。

examples.english: Possession of an unregistered firearm is a serious offense.
examples.chinese: 拥有未经登记的枪械是严重的违法行为。

examples.english: Hewson was arrested for a number of minor offences.
examples.chinese: 休森因一系列轻微罪行而遭逮捕。

examples.english: Speeding offences are usually punishable by a fine.
examples.chinese: 超速违规一般处以罚款。

examples.english: Leach was charged with sexual assault, which is a felony in Connecticut.
examples.chinese: 利奇被控性侵犯，这在康涅狄格州是重罪。

examples.english: Johnson was preparing his defense against felony charges of armed robbery and assault.
examples.chinese: 约翰逊被控告持枪抢劫和暴力袭击的重罪，他正准备为自己辩护。

examples.english: She denied that she had committed any kind of felony.
examples.chinese: 她否认犯下了任何重罪。

examples.english: By the time he was 14, Horowitz already had several misdemeanors on his file.
examples.chinese: 14岁时，霍罗威茨的档案上已有数次轻罪的记录。

examples.english: McFarlane pleaded guilty to four federal misdemeanor charges that he had lied to Congress.
examples.chinese: 麦克法兰承认四项违反联邦法律，欺骗国会的罪名。

examples.english: The court also processes cases of children and youth who have committed misdemeanors or felonies.
examples.chinese: 该法院还审理儿童和青少年犯的轻微罪行或重罪案。

centers.english: crimes in general

examples.english: Crime is a complex social problem with no single cause or solution.
examples.chinese: 犯罪是一种复杂的社会问题，没有单一的原因或解决方法。

examples.english: the growing problem of crime in the inner cities
examples.chinese: 市中心贫民区不断增长的犯罪问题

examples.english: Violent crime increased by 11% last year.
examples.chinese: 去年，暴力犯罪数目增加了11%。

examples.english: Increasing the number of patrol cars on the street has not had any effect on the level of serious crime.
examples.chinese: 增加街上巡逻车的数量对于严重犯罪的数量没有丝毫影响。

examples.english: Reynolds became involved in petty crime at a very young age.
examples.chinese: 雷诺兹很小的时候就参与轻微的违法活动。

examples.english: Delinquency and drug addiction are more common in areas of high unemployment.
examples.chinese: 违法行为和吸毒问题在失业率高的地区更为普遍。

examples.english: The study clearly demonstrates the link between juvenile delinquency and child abuse.
examples.chinese: 该研究明确地证实了少年犯罪与虐待儿童之间的关系。

examples.english: He denies that he was ever involved in any criminal activities.
examples.chinese: 他否认曾经参与任何犯罪活动。

examples.english: an expert on criminal law
examples.chinese: 一位刑法专家

examples.english: The former president could face criminal charges.
examples.chinese: 前总统可能面临刑事起诉。

examples.english: Scottish police are carrying out a criminal investigation into the affair.
examples.chinese: 苏格兰警方正在对该事件进行刑事调查。

centers.english: someone who is guilty of a crime

examples.english: Grimes is considered to be one of the most dangerous criminals in the US.
examples.chinese: 格兰姆斯被认为是美国最危险的罪犯之一。

examples.english: Sending children to adult prisons just means they learn to be ‘better’ criminals from the adult inmates.
examples.chinese: 将小孩子送入成年人监狱就是意味着他们会从成年人囚犯那里学会成为“更出色的”罪犯。

examples.english: The British government maintains that Donavan is a common criminal who should be brought to justice.
examples.chinese: 英国政府坚称多纳文是一名普通罪犯，应当绳之以法。

examples.english: The courts should impose tougher punishments on offenders.
examples.chinese: 法庭应当对罪犯从严处罚。

examples.english: The committee will investigate more effective ways of dealing with young offenders.
examples.chinese: 该委员会将会调查研究更有效的方法来处理青少年罪犯。

examples.english: He blames most of the town's problems on local delinquents.
examples.chinese: 他将镇上的大部分问题归咎于当地的少年犯。

examples.english: More than half of all juvenile delinquents currently in state institutions have disturbed family backgrounds.
examples.chinese: 目前关押在州监狱的少年犯半数以上都有不良家庭背景。

examples.english: delinquent children
examples.chinese: 犯罪少年

examples.english: The penalties must be severe enough to deter lawbreakers.
examples.chinese: 处罚必须严厉，使人不敢以身试法。

examples.english: Police say lawbreakers are encouraged by the slowness of the judicial system.
examples.chinese: 警方称司法体系的拖拉在鼓励犯罪分子。

examples.english: Oakdale Prison holds over 600 dangerous felons.
examples.chinese: 奥克代尔监狱关押了六百多名危险的重罪犯。

examples.english: Stevens said his plan would keep guns out of felons’ hands.
examples.chinese: 史蒂文斯称他的计划将使重罪犯无法取得枪械。

examples.english: Richards is wanted for the murder of a security guard at the City Bank in December of last year.
examples.chinese: 理查兹因去年12月份花旗银行的一名保安人员被杀而遭到通缉。

examples.english: The mass murderer known as the ‘Yorkshire Ripper’ was for a long time the most wanted man in Britain.
examples.chinese: 那个杀人如麻、人称“约克郡屠夫”的凶手，在很长一段时间里是英国的头号通缉犯。

centers.english: a group of criminals

examples.english: Warning: gangs of pickpockets operate in this area.
examples.chinese: 警告：此地区有扒窃团伙活动。

examples.english: Police say an armed gang stole nearly $1.9 million in a bank robbery over the weekend.
examples.chinese: 警方称，周末一武装团伙从一家银行抢走了近190万美元。

examples.english: Drug rings operate in most large cities of the world.
examples.chinese: 如今，世界上多数大城市里都有贩毒集团在活动。

examples.english: Corvino was the sixth member of the spy ring to be arrested for stealing high-tech secrets from several Silicon Valley firms.
examples.chinese: 一个间谍网从硅谷的数家公司窃取高科技秘密情报，科尔维诺是第六号要逮捕的成员。

examples.english: The syndicates see these women as easy candidates to force into the sex trade.
examples.chinese: 罪犯集团认为迫使这些妇女卖淫是轻而易举的。

examples.english: The police need more resources to combat organized crime.
examples.chinese: 警方需要有更多的资源来对抗犯罪集团。

examples.english: Owen has been active in the Las Vegas underworld for years.
examples.chinese: 欧文在拉斯韦加斯的黑社会里活跃了许多年。

examples.english: He's accused of having connections with Japan's criminal underworld.
examples.chinese: 他被控与日本黑社会勾结。

centers.english: to do something that is a crime

examples.english: Brady committed a series of brutal murders.
examples.chinese: 布雷迪犯下一连串残忍的谋杀罪。

examples.english: Women commit far fewer crimes than men.
examples.chinese: 女性犯罪比男性少得多。

examples.english: It now seems likely that Mason was sent to prison for an offence he never committed.
examples.chinese: 现在看来，梅森入狱可能是无辜的。

examples.english: I didn't realize that I was breaking the law.
examples.chinese: 我没有意识到自己在违法。

examples.english: Hamer acknowledges that what he did was wrong, but denies breaking the law.
examples.chinese: 哈默承认自己做得不对，但否认违法。

examples.english: Should journalists ever break the law in order to get a story?
examples.chinese: 记者应该违法获取新闻吗？

examples.english: Logue got into trouble for drug violations.
examples.chinese: 洛格惹上了毒品的麻烦。

examples.english: When he was a teenager, Wayne got into a lot of trouble with the police.
examples.chinese: 韦恩十几岁的时候，与警察惹上许多次麻烦。

examples.english: He claims that when he could not find work, he was forced to turn to crime.
examples.chinese: 他称自己找不到工作，被迫走上犯罪道路。

examples.english: Kramer said that he turned to crime in a bid to pay off his debts.
examples.chinese: 克雷默说他走上犯罪之路是为了努力还债。

examples.english: A background check confirmed that he had a criminal record.
examples.chinese: 个人背景调查证实他有过犯罪记录。

examples.english: Loman has a lengthy criminal record.
examples.chinese: 洛曼犯罪记录累累。

centers.english: to steal something

examples.english: Thousands of cars get stolen every year.
examples.chinese: 每年都有成千上万辆汽车失窃。

examples.english: In the end he had to steal in order to survive.
examples.chinese: 最后，为了生存，他只得偷东西了。

examples.english: drug addicts who steal from their friends and families
examples.chinese: 偷朋友和家人东西的吸毒者

examples.english: Thieves stole paintings worth $5 million from a Paris art gallery.
examples.chinese: 窃贼从巴黎的一家画廊偷走了价值500万美元的画作。

examples.english: It's strange he should have had so many things stolen in just a week.
examples.chinese: 很奇怪，一个星期里他就被偷了这么多东西。

examples.english: My grandfather refused to put his money in a bank because he was afraid it would get stolen.
examples.chinese: 我祖父不肯把钱存在银行，他怕被人偷走。

examples.english: Many people don't regard cheating on their taxes as stealing.
examples.chinese: 很多人并不认为骗税是一种偷窃行为。

examples.english: Someone has been taking money from the cash box.
examples.chinese: 有人从钱箱里拿走了钱。

examples.english: The burglars took our TV and stereo, but they didn't find the jewellery.
examples.chinese: 小偷拿走了我们的电视机和音响，但是他们没有发现珠宝。

examples.english: I wonder where she got that coat -- do you think she nicked it?
examples.chinese: 我不知道她从哪里弄来那件外套——会不会是她偷的?

examples.english: Jimmy was caught pinching money from his mum's purse.
examples.chinese: 吉米被发现从他母亲的钱包里拿钱。

examples.english: While I was out, someone went into my hotel room and ripped off the rest of my travelers’ checks.
examples.chinese: 我外出的时候，有人进了我的酒店客房，把我余下的旅行支票全都偷走了。

expressions.gram: transitive phrasal verb not in passive

examples.english: My bag's disappeared! That woman must have walked off with it!
examples.chinese: 我的包不见了！肯定是那女人顺手偷走了！

examples.english: Guards in the lobby prevent employees from going off with computers and sensitive documents.
examples.chinese: 大堂里有警卫防止员工拿走电脑和敏感的文件。

examples.english: While no one was looking Louise and Alice helped themselves to some apples and bananas.
examples.chinese: 趁没人注意的时候，路易斯和艾丽丝偷偷拿了几个苹果和香蕉。

examples.english: Burglars cut through the ceiling and helped themselves to $3.6 million in jewels.
examples.chinese: 窃贼在天花板上开了一个口进来，偷走了价值360美万元的珠宝。

examples.english: The farmer caught them pilfering apples from his orchard.
examples.chinese: 农夫逮着他们在他的果园里偷苹果。

examples.english: The villagers pilfered stones from ancient ruined cities to build their houses.
examples.chinese: 村民们从古城废墟里偷来石头造房子。

examples.english: Losses from stores through shoplifting and pilfering amounted to over a billion dollars last year.
examples.chinese: 去年商店由于失窃所造成的损失超过了十亿美元。

examples.english: While I was swimming in the river, somebody swiped all my clothes!
examples.chinese: 我在河里游泳的时候，有人把我的衣服全偷走了！

examples.english: I wish I knew who'd swiped my earrings.
examples.chinese: 我希望能知道谁偷了我的耳环。

examples.english: The supermarket has a problem with kids snitching candy bars off the shelves.
examples.chinese: 超级市场里有个问题，就是有小孩子从货架上偷糖棒。

examples.english: He watched as Grover snitched two packets of sugar from behind the counter.
examples.chinese: 他看着格罗弗从柜台后面偷了两包糖。

centers.english: to steal from a house, shop, or bank
centers.chinese: 从别人的家里、或从商店或银行里偷窃

examples.english: He got five years in jail for robbing a gas station.
examples.chinese: 他因为抢劫一家加油站而被判刑五年。

examples.english: Two men robbed the Central Bank yesterday, escaping with over $1 million.
examples.chinese: 昨天有两名男子抢劫中央银行，抢了一百多万美元逃跑了。

examples.english: He was caught burgling the house of a police officer.
examples.chinese: 他闯入一个警察家里行窃被抓住。

examples.english: Our apartment has been burglarized twice since we moved here.
examples.chinese: 我们搬到这里来以后，我们的公寓已经两次被盗了。

examples.english: The clerk spotted the girl shoplifting and stopped her from leaving the store.
examples.chinese: 店员发现那女孩偷东西，就阻止她离开商店。

examples.english: The men who held up the store were wearing Halloween masks.
examples.chinese: 持枪抢劫商店的那些人戴着万圣节的面具。

examples.english: He was arrested and charged with holding up a cab driver.
examples.chinese: 他因为抢劫一名出租车司机被逮捕，并遭到起诉。

examples.english: His store was broken into and looted during the riot.
examples.chinese: 他的商店在暴乱期间被人闯进来抢劫。

examples.english: As the army advanced toward Mantes it burned and looted everything that lay in its path.
examples.chinese: 部队向曼蒂斯推进时，一路上又烧又抢，什么都不留。

examples.english: Additional police officers were put on the street to prevent looting.
examples.chinese: 街上增加了警力以防止抢劫行为发生。

examples.english: In full view of our cameras, looters calmly walked off with TVs, radios, and VCRs.
examples.chinese: 从我们的摄影机可以清楚看到，抢劫的人不慌不忙地搬走了电视机、收音机和录像机。

centers.english: to steal from someone in the street

examples.english: Two men tried to rob him as he left the restaurant.
examples.chinese: 在他离开餐厅的时候，有两名男子试图抢他东西。

examples.english: The woman had been robbed and was badly shaken.
examples.chinese: 那个女人遭人抢劫，受到了极大的惊吓。

examples.english: She decided to move from the city after she was mugged for the third time in less than a year.
examples.chinese: 在不到一年的时间里被人抢劫了三次之后，她决定搬走，离开这个城市。

examples.english: A young boy pushed her over and snatched her purse as she fell.
examples.chinese: 一个小男孩把她推倒在地上，然后抢走了她的钱包。

centers.english: to steal money that you have been trusted to look after

examples.english: The court was told that Julie had been embezzling funds for the last two years.
examples.chinese: 法庭获知朱莉最近两年一直在盗用公款。

examples.english: He embezzled large amounts of money to finance his gambling.
examples.chinese: 他挪用大量公款去赌博。

examples.english: During the trial, Raabe admitted that he misappropriated $80,000 of church funds.
examples.chinese: 审讯期间，拉伯承认挪用了80,000美元教堂基金。

expressions.text: have your fingers in the till

examples.english: They knew that money was going missing and Davy was eventually caught with his fingers in the till.
examples.chinese: 他们发现钱总是少，而戴维终于在偷钱的时候被逮到了。

centers.english: someone who steals

examples.english: The thieves had been careful not to leave any fingerprints.
examples.chinese: 窃贼很小心，没有留下任何指纹。

examples.english: She accused me of being a thief and a liar.
examples.chinese: 她骂我是小偷，是骗子。

examples.english: Warning! Car thieves are operating in this area.
examples.chinese: 警告！本区有盗车贼在作案。

examples.english: A young teller was shot dead by bank robbers today.
examples.chinese: 今天，一名年轻的银行出纳员被抢劫银行的歹徒开枪打死。
