examples.english: Police believe the burglar got in through the kitchen window.
examples.chinese: 警方认为盗贼是从厨房的窗户爬进来的。

examples.english: The store has installed hidden cameras to catch shoplifters.
examples.chinese: 商店里安装了隐蔽的摄影机来抓小偷。

examples.english: They have a policy of prosecuting all shoplifters.
examples.chinese: 他们的政策是，凡在商店里行窃的人都要遭到起诉。

examples.english: There are a lot of pickpockets in crowded tourist areas, so look after your belongings.
examples.chinese: 旅游区人多的地方有很多扒手，所以要保管好自己的物品。

examples.english: Harry suffered serious head injuries when he was attacked by a gang of muggers.
examples.chinese: 哈里被一伙人行凶抢劫，头部受了重伤。

examples.english: Two joyriders died when their car crashed during a police chase.
examples.chinese: 两名偷车人被警方追捕的时候发生车祸，车毁人亡。

examples.english: She must be some kind of kleptomaniac -- she can't go into a bar without coming out with a stack of glasses.
examples.chinese: 她肯定是那种偷窃狂—她去酒吧没有一次不是带出许多杯子的。

centers.english: the crime of stealing

examples.english: This warehouse is not adequately protected against theft or vandalism.
examples.chinese: 这仓库没有足够的防盗或防破坏的措施。

examples.english: The mayor is taking credit for decreases in theft since he took office.
examples.chinese: 自市长上任以来，盗窃案减少了，他因而得到赞扬。

examples.english: The rate of bicycle theft in this area is very high.
examples.chinese: 这个地区的自行车失窃率非常高。

examples.english: Perkins was given five years in prison for robbery with violence.
examples.chinese: 珀金斯因为行凶抢劫被判刑五年。

examples.english: Robbery was believed to be the motive for the killing.
examples.chinese: 据认为抢劫是这起凶杀案的动机。

examples.english: He made two escape attempts while serving a sentence for armed robbery.
examples.chinese: 他因持枪抢劫被判刑，服刑期间两次企图越狱。

examples.english: Foster had been in prison twice already for burglary.
examples.chinese: 福斯特因入室行窃已两度入狱。

examples.english: Burglary, murder and rape are all on the increase.
examples.chinese: 入室行窃、凶杀以及强奸案都越来越多。

examples.english: If you live in an area where burglary is common, it may be worth investing in an alarm system.
examples.chinese: 如果你住在一个入室行窃很普遍的地方，那么花钱装一个警报系统也许是值得的。

examples.english: Shoplifting cost the major stores millions of dollars last year.
examples.chinese: 去年商店行窃给大商店造成数百万美元的损失。

examples.english: Taylor left the country to escape charges of embezzlement.
examples.chinese: 泰勒为了逃避贪污罪的指控而潜逃出国。

examples.english: The judge sentenced Walker to five years in prison for embezzlement of state funds.
examples.chinese: 法官因为沃克尔盗用州政府基金而给他判刑五年。

examples.english: Anyone found guilty of joyriding can now be sentenced for up to five years in prison.
examples.chinese: 凡是因为偷车兜风被判有罪的人，现在可被判刑高达五年。

examples.english: Brook now faces probable jail after an indictment for larceny and income tax evasion.
examples.chinese: 布鲁克因为盗窃和逃避所得税遭到了起诉，现在面临着入狱的可能。

centers.english: when someone steals something

examples.english: Call the police -- there's been a burglary.
examples.chinese: 叫警察来，发生入室盗窃案了。

examples.english: Most burglaries occur when a house or apartment is empty.
examples.chinese: 大多数入室盗窃案发生在屋里没人的时候。

examples.english: I took part in my first robbery when I was only thirteen years old.
examples.chinese: 我第一次参与抢劫时只有13岁。

examples.english: In the first nine months of this year there were 9611 street robberies involving violence.
examples.chinese: 今年头九个月里发生了9，611起街头行凶抢劫事件。

examples.english: Police claim to have found the gun used in this morning's robbery of a downtown convenience store.
examples.chinese: 警方称他们已经找到今早在市中心一家便利店里发生的抢劫案所使用的枪。

examples.english: The police are investigating a series of bank robberies.
examples.chinese: 警方正在调查一连串的银行抢劫案。

examples.english: There was a break-in at the college last night -- they took all the computers.
examples.chinese: 昨天夜里有人闯入学校打劫——所有电脑都被偷走了。

examples.english: A man was shot dead in a hold-up at a downtown bank.
examples.chinese: 市中心一家银行发生持枪抢劫，一名男子被开枪打死。

examples.english: If your passport has been stolen, report the theft to your nearest embassy immediately.
examples.chinese: 如果护照被窃，就马上到最近的大使馆报失。

examples.english: Security has been tightened since the theft of a $150,000 oil painting.
examples.chinese: 自从一幅价值15万美元的油画被盗后，保安措施就加强了。

examples.english: Police believe they have found the man responsible for a series of car thefts in the past year.
examples.chinese: 警方相信他们已经找到过去一年里发生的一连串盗车案的涉案男子。

examples.english: There have been a number of muggings outside downtown hotels recently.
examples.chinese: 近来市中心的宾馆外面发生了多起行凶抢劫的案件。

examples.english: The police accused the woman of planning a huge armed bank raid in Scotland.
examples.chinese: 警方指控这名女子在苏格兰策划一场大型的银行武装劫案。

examples.english: Detectives managed to catch the gunman who had taken three hostages in a raid on a jeweller's shop.
examples.chinese: 警探终于抓获了在抢劫一家珠宝店时劫持三名人质的那个持枪歹徒。

examples.english: Police have released a photo of a man they believe carried out a raid on a supermarket.
examples.chinese: 警方发布了一名男子的照片，他们认为就是这名男子在一家超级市场进行抢劫。

examples.english: Her boyfriend was put in prison after a bank job theft from a bank.
examples.chinese: 她男朋友抢劫银行被关进了监狱。

examples.english: The police are convinced it was an inside job.
examples.chinese: 警方认为这是内贼干的。

centers.english: something that has been stolen

examples.english: Thieves can sell stolen passports for a lot of money.
examples.chinese: 小偷把偷来的护照卖掉可以得到不少钱。

examples.english: The antiques he was selling turned out to be stolen.
examples.chinese: 他出售的那些古董原来是偷来的。

examples.english: Wilson was convicted of theft and handling stolen goods.
examples.chinese: 威尔逊因为行窃和买卖赃物被定罪。

examples.english: The gunman stuffed the loot into a paper bag and ran outside to a waiting car.
examples.chinese: 持枪歹徒把抢来的东西塞进一个纸袋，然后直奔一辆在外面等候的汽车。

examples.english: Two weeks later, police found the loot hidden in an abandoned warehouse.
examples.chinese: 两个星期之后，警方发现赃物藏在一个废弃的仓库里。

examples.english: Trevino hid the haul in his mother's closet for over a year.
examples.chinese: 特雷维诺把赃物藏在他母亲的壁橱里超过一年。

examples.english: The police caught three men examining their haul in a house in north London.
examples.chinese: 警方抓获了三名男子，他们当时正在伦敦北部一栋房子里查看赃物。

examples.english: a drugs haul
examples.chinese: 一大批毒品

centers.english: a place where people are kept as punishment
centers.chinese: 人们被囚禁作为惩罚的地方

examples.english: Conditions in the prison were shocking.
examples.chinese: 监狱的状况令人震惊。

examples.english: a maximum security prison
examples.chinese: 一座高度设防监狱

examples.english: Johnson pleaded guilty and was sentenced to five years in prison.
examples.chinese: 约翰逊认罪，被判五年监禁。

examples.english: The prosecuting lawyers say that Price may face life in prison.
examples.chinese: 原告律师称普赖斯可能面临终身监禁。

examples.english: When he was released from prison, Mandela was interviewed in Zambia.
examples.chinese: 曼德拉从狱中获释，在赞比亚接受了采访。

examples.english: Clayton will be released on Tuesday after serving seven years, prison officials said.
examples.chinese: 监狱的官员说克莱顿已服刑七年，将于星期二获释。

examples.english: a fifteen-year prison sentence
examples.chinese: 15年的刑期

examples.english: This old building is the jail that Butch Cassidy escaped from in 1887.
examples.chinese: 这幢古旧的建筑物是1887年布奇·卡西迪逃出来的监牢。

examples.english: Alfassi was taken to a cell in the Los Angeles County jail.
examples.chinese: 阿尔法西被关进洛杉矶县立监狱的一间囚室。

examples.english: 58% of prisoners are in jail for non-violent crimes.
examples.chinese: 58%的犯人因非暴力罪案入狱。

examples.english: The strikers were harassed, beaten and put in jail for trespassing.
examples.chinese: 罢工者受到骚扰、殴打，并因擅入私人土地入狱。

expressions.text: go to jail/be sent to jail

examples.english: Grover got caught for not paying his taxes and went to jail.
examples.chinese: 格罗弗因漏税被发现而入狱。

examples.english: The riots ended with long jail terms for 338 mobsters.
examples.chinese: 骚乱以338名暴徒被判长期监禁结束。

examples.english: The murderer served 10 years at the penitentiary in Stillwater.
examples.chinese: 杀人犯在位于斯蒂尔沃特的大监狱服刑十年。

examples.english: the Ohio State penitentiary
examples.chinese: 俄亥俄州立监狱

examples.english: the abandoned federal penitentiary on Alcatraz Island
examples.chinese: 阿尔卡特拉斯岛上废弃的联邦监狱

examples.english: Conditions were poor, and there were several prisoners to one cell.
examples.chinese: 条件很差，几个犯人关在一间囚室里。

examples.english: The prison cells have doors of heavy steel.
examples.chinese: 那些监狱的囚室装有厚重的钢门。

examples.english: Kevin, who had been abandoned by his mother, had been in and out of detention centres all his life.
examples.chinese: 凯文被母亲遗弃了，一辈子在拘留所进进出出。

examples.english: a juvenile detention center
examples.chinese: 一间青少年罪犯拘留所

centers.english: to put someone in prison as a punishment
centers.chinese: 把某人投入监狱作为惩罚

expressions.text: put somebody in prison/jail/send somebody to prison/jail

examples.english: Eventually, her attacker was caught and put in prison.
examples.chinese: 最终袭击她的人被捕入狱。

examples.english: The judge sent him to jail for seven years.
examples.chinese: 法官判他入狱七年。

examples.english: Rapists deserve to be locked up for the rest of their lives.
examples.chinese: 强奸犯活该坐一辈子牢。

examples.english: It costs $23,000 a year to lock up an adult.
examples.chinese: 关押一名成年人每年耗资23,000美元。

examples.english: Locking up more criminals has helped to reduce the crime rate and produce safer streets.
examples.chinese: 将更多罪犯关进监狱有助于降低犯罪率，使街上更安全。

examples.english: The court's decision suggests that it is OK to throw pregnant women in jail just because they are addicted.
examples.chinese: 法院判决意味着仅仅因为其有毒瘾就把孕妇投入监狱没错。

examples.english: When they called for free elections, the government threw them all in jail.
examples.chinese: 他们要求自由选举，政府便将他们都投入监狱。

examples.english: Many of the group's leaders have now been jailed.
examples.chinese: 这个团体的许多领导人都已经被关押。

examples.english: About 5000 people have been jailed for crimes of terrorism or treason since 1992.
examples.chinese: 自1992年以来，约5,000人因恐怖主义犯罪或叛国罪被捕入狱。

examples.english: Marco was arrested and jailed for accepting bribes from drug dealers.
examples.chinese: 马科因收受毒贩贿赂被捕入狱。

examples.english: Thousands of civilians were arrested, imprisoned and killed
examples.chinese: 成千上万的平民遭到逮捕，关押并处决。

examples.english: Two of the boys have been imprisoned for theft.
examples.chinese: 男孩中有两个因偷盗被监禁。

examples.english: The priest had been imprisoned for preaching the gospel.
examples.chinese: 那位牧师因宣讲福音被关押。

examples.english: The maximum penalty is three years’ imprisonment.
examples.chinese: 最高的处罚是三年监禁。

examples.english: It was a very sad case of false imprisonment.
examples.chinese: 这是一个错判监禁的案例，令人十分难过。

examples.english: Carter spent 19 years incarcerated in New Jersey on murder charges.
examples.chinese: 卡特被控杀人，在新泽西州坐了19年牢。

examples.english: There are too many people on death row who are innocent of the crimes for which they are incarcerated.
examples.chinese: 冤枉入狱被判死刑的人太多了。

examples.english: Anyone speaking out against the regime faced death or incarceration.
examples.chinese: 任何公开反对该政权的人都有可能被处死或监禁。

examples.english: The French soldiers, who had surrendered without fighting, were interned in Hanoi.
examples.chinese: 不战而降的法军士兵被扣押在河内。

examples.english: Thousands died. And thousands were interned in forced labour camps.
examples.chinese: 成千上万人死亡，又有成千上万人被扣押在强制劳动营中。

examples.english: One of the subjects for debate was the government's power of internment without trial.
examples.chinese: 辩论的主题之一是政府未经审判将人拘留的权力。

centers.english: to force someone to stay in a place as a prisoner
centers.chinese: 强制某人作为囚犯留在一地

examples.english: West had abducted the young girl and kept her in his basement for 10 days.
examples.chinese: 韦斯特绑架了那名少女，将她关在地下室十天。

examples.english: Police think that the woman may have been kept prisoner for the twenty four hours before she was murdered.
examples.chinese: 警方认为那名女子遇害前可能曾被监禁了24小时。

examples.english: The government is concerned that British troops might be taken hostage by guerrillas.
examples.chinese: 政府担心英国部队可能会被游击队扣作人质。

examples.english: A band of human rights activists stormed the embassy and took several people hostage.
examples.chinese: 一帮人权活动分子冲进大使馆，将数人扣为人质。

examples.english: Police are holding two men in connection with the robbery.
examples.chinese: 警方拘留了两名与劫案有关的男子。

examples.english: Several tourists were being held captive by rebels in Kashmir.
examples.chinese: 数名游客在克什米尔地区遭叛乱分子扣留。

examples.english: Militant prisoners held 24 guards hostage on Friday, as jail unrest spread throughout the country.
examples.chinese: 随着监狱骚乱在全国蔓延，激进的囚犯于星期五将24名狱卒扣作人质。

examples.english: The judge has confined the jury to their hotel until after the verdict.
examples.chinese: 作出判决前法官让陪审团留在酒店，不许外出。

examples.english: All the illegal immigrants were confined to a small island in the harbour.
examples.chinese: 所有的非法移民都被关在港口的一个小岛上。

examples.english: Brett was eventually confined in a psychiatric hospital, where he committed suicide.
examples.chinese: 布雷特最终被关进一所精神病院，他在那里自杀身亡。

examples.english: Many women spent a lifetime of virtual confinement in the home.
examples.chinese: 许多女性事实上一辈子被关在家里。

examples.english: Pratt spent the first eight years of his prison sentence in solitary confinement.
examples.chinese: 头八年普拉特被单独禁闭。

examples.english: According to the legend, Acrisius built an underground house for his daughter. Here he shut her up and guarded her.
examples.chinese: 根据传说，阿克里西俄斯为女儿在地下建了一座房子。他把她禁闭在那里，守护着她。

examples.english: The lawyer claimed that his client had been shut up in a prison cell for hours, when there was no legal reason to keep him.
examples.chinese: 那位律师称他的委托人在牢里被关了几小时，当时没有法律依据这么做。

centers.english: to be in prison as a punishment

examples.english: Both her sons are now in jail.
examples.chinese: 她的两个儿子现在都在坐牢。

examples.english: The two Irishmen were in prison for five years before they were found to be innocent.
examples.chinese: 这两名爱尔兰人在监狱里待了五年之后才被判无罪。

examples.english: ‘When I was inside,’ said Jimmy. ‘I really learned how to look after myself.’
examples.chinese: “在牢里的时候，”吉米说道，“我真正学会了怎样照顾自己。

examples.english: Sid's wife ran off with another man while he was doing time.
examples.chinese: 锡德坐牢期间，妻子和一名男子私奔了。

examples.english: None of us knew that Greg had done time for stealing cars.
examples.chinese: 我们谁都不知道格雷格因盗窃汽车而坐过牢。

examples.english: Holt is currently serving five years for child abduction.
examples.chinese: 霍尔特因绑架儿童目前在服五年徒刑。

examples.english: Both the brothers had criminal records and had served time for robbery.
examples.chinese: 兄弟两人都有犯罪记录，因抢劫服过刑。

examples.english: She met Schmidt while serving time in prison for drug possession.
examples.chinese: 她因藏毒在监狱服刑时遇见了施米特。

examples.english: Fowler was released after serving two-thirds of his sentence.
examples.chinese: 福勒服满三分之二的刑期后被释放了。

centers.english: to be kept in a place by the police

examples.english: The twenty-seven militants now in custody were arrested in raids last month.
examples.chinese: 现在拘留的27个激进分子是在上月突击搜查中逮捕的。

examples.english: An inquiry has been launched following the death of a man in police custody.
examples.chinese: 一名男子在被警方拘留期间死亡，于是便开始了调查。

examples.english: A woman is being held in custody in connection with the murder.
examples.chinese: 一名与谋杀案有关连的女子目前被拘留。

examples.english: Naylor was remanded in custody by Huyton magistrates until June 17th.
examples.chinese: 内勒被海顿地方法官还押候审，一直拘留到6月17日。

examples.english: Police confirmed last night that Mr Joshi is under arrest.
examples.chinese: 昨晚警方证实乔西先生被捕。

examples.english: I'm afraid your son is under arrest for theft.
examples.chinese: 很抱歉，你儿子因偷盗被捕了。

examples.english: On Tuesday last week, Finnegan was detained and questioned by fraud squad officers.
examples.chinese: 上周二，芬尼根被反欺诈小队的警察扣押问话。

examples.english: He was detained for questioning about the terrorist attacks.
examples.chinese: 他被扣押查问有关恐怖袭击的事。

centers.english: someone who is in prison as a punishment for a crime
centers.chinese: 作为对其罪行的惩罚而被关进监狱的人

examples.english: The prisoners are allowed an hour's exercise every day.
examples.chinese: 犯人们每天有一小时锻炼时间。

examples.english: Thousands of political prisoners remain imprisoned, frequently as a result of unfair trials.
examples.chinese: 经常由于不公正的审判，成千上万名政治犯一直被关在监狱里。

examples.english: Sakhalin was an island where convicts were sent, 700 miles from Khabarovsk.
examples.chinese: 萨哈林岛距离哈巴罗夫斯克700英里，是已决犯的服刑地。

examples.english: Stubbs was an ex-convict who got a job as a security guard.
examples.chinese: 谋到了一份保安工作的斯塔布斯以前曾因犯罪入狱。

examples.english: There was a report on the news about an escaped convict.
examples.chinese: 新闻里有关于一名逃犯的报道。

examples.english: More than half the inmates were there for some sort of violent crime.
examples.chinese: 那里关押的犯人半数以上犯了某种暴力罪。

examples.english: The number of prison inmates has been increasing in recent years.
examples.chinese: 近年来，监狱关押的犯人数量一直在上升。

centers.english: someone who is kept in a place when they do not want to be there
centers.chinese: 被迫留在不愿意逗留的地方的人

examples.english: My parents were very strict. Sometimes I felt like a prisoner in my own home.
examples.chinese: 我的父母十分严格，有时我觉得像是一个被关在自己家里的犯人。

examples.english: It's a science fiction story about people being taken to another planet as prisoners.
examples.chinese: 这是一部讲述人们作为囚犯被带到另一个星球的科幻小说。

examples.english: Mann was held prisoner in the back of the Chevrolet and told she was going to be killed.
examples.chinese: 曼被强留在雪佛兰车的后座，有人对她说要杀死她。

examples.english: There were general codes covering such matters as the treatment of prisoners of war.
examples.chinese: 关于对待战俘这类问题有一些通则。

examples.english: a POW camp
examples.chinese: 战俘营

examples.english: All the captives were kept in a darkened room with their hands tied.
examples.chinese: 所有的战俘都被绑住双手，关在一间黑暗的房间里。

examples.english: The rebels promised to release their captives unharmed if the government did as they said.
examples.chinese: 叛乱分子答应，要是政府满足他们的要求，他们会不伤害俘虏并放了他们。

examples.english: The terrorists say that they will kill the hostages if we don't agree to their demands.
examples.chinese: 恐怖分子称要是我们不答应他们的要求，他们就杀死人质。

examples.english: An attempt to rescue the American hostages ended in disaster when a helicopter crashed.
examples.chinese: 一架直升机坠毁，营救美国人质的行动以灾难告终。

examples.english: The medical team were captured and taken hostage.
examples.chinese: 医疗队被俘虏作了人质。

examples.english: A British journalist was held hostage for over four years.
examples.chinese: 一名英国记者被扣作人质四年多。

examples.english: The government has ordered the trial of all detainees within six months.
examples.chinese: 政府下令六个月之内审讯所有被拘留者。

examples.english: According to a recent report, many detainees claim that police have mistreated them.
examples.chinese: 最近有篇报道说，许多被拘留者称受到警方虐待。

centers.english: when someone is kept in a place they do not want to be in
centers.chinese: 某人被迫留在不愿意逗留的地方

examples.english: In his book, he describes what life was like during his long captivity.
examples.chinese: 书中，他描述了自己遭长期拘禁的生活。

examples.english: The industrialist, who was captured on November 24th, was freed after 84 days in captivity.
examples.chinese: 那位工业家于11月24日被虏，囚禁了84天后获释。

examples.english: Folkes says that he was held in captivity for over a year.
examples.chinese: 福克斯称自己被囚禁了一年多。

examples.english: Johnson was sentenced to three years’ imprisonment for causing a riot.
examples.chinese: 约翰逊因煽动骚乱被判三年监禁。

examples.english: Many women believe that the punishment for rape should be life imprisonment.
examples.chinese: 许多女性认为强奸的惩罚应该是无期徒刑。

examples.english: Cases of detention without trial were common in the last century.
examples.chinese: 上个世纪，未经审判监禁的案例很普遍。

examples.english: Ormerod, aged 19, was sentenced to nine months’ detention for possessing and supplying cannabis.
examples.chinese: 奥默罗德，19岁，因私藏并提供大麻被判九个月监禁。

examples.english: Marik, who had been held in detention for over a year, was eventually found not guilty.
examples.chinese: 马里克被关了超过一年，最终被判无罪。

examples.english: Mrs Davis was released from detention yesterday and all charges have been dropped.
examples.chinese: 昨天戴维斯夫人从狱中获释，所有指控都已撤消。

centers.english: the period of time that someone must spend in prison
centers.chinese: 某人必须在狱中度过的一段时间

examples.english: Belfast Appeal Court increased his sentence from five to nine years.
examples.chinese: 贝尔法斯特上诉法院将他的刑期从五年加至九年。

examples.english: He was recently freed after serving a sentence for leading anti-government riots.
examples.chinese: 他因领导反政府骚乱服刑，最近获释。

examples.english: Perrault is serving a 15-year sentence for fraud and tax evasion.
examples.chinese: 佩罗因诈骗和逃税在服15年的徒刑。

examples.english: Moore began an eighteen-month prison sentence in November.
examples.chinese: 11月份穆尔开始服刑，为期18个月。

examples.english: Hailey is serving a life sentence, and is reported to be in poor health.
examples.chinese: 黑利在服无期徒刑，据报道身体很差。

examples.english: If found guilty of first-degree murder, Bangham could face the death sentence.
examples.chinese: 如果被裁定犯有一级谋杀罪，班厄姆可能会面临死刑。

examples.english: The judge said that his was a very serious crime, and sentenced him to eight years in prison.
examples.chinese: 法官说他的罪行非常严重，判处他八年监禁。

examples.english: 60 prisoners have been sentenced to death in political trials.
examples.chinese: 在政治审讯中60名囚犯被判死刑。

centers.english: fighting between countries or armies
centers.chinese: 国家或军队之间的战争

examples.english: the Vietnam War
examples.chinese: 越南战争

examples.english: When the war ended in 1945, Europe was in chaos.
examples.chinese: 1945年战争结束时，欧洲一片混乱。

examples.english: Who won the Franco-Prussian War?
examples.chinese: 谁赢了普法战争？

examples.english: More Americans died in the Civil War than in World War II.
examples.chinese: 内战中死亡的美国人比第二次世界大战还多。

examples.english: Iran's seven-year war with Iraq
examples.chinese: 伊朗与伊拉克的七年战争

examples.english: In 1874, war broke out in Europe again.
examples.chinese: 1874年，欧洲再次爆发战争。

examples.english: In the months leading up to the outbreak of war, both countries were involved in a massive arms build-up.
examples.chinese: 战争爆发前的几个月里，两个国家都在大规模地扩张军备。

examples.english: a war hero and former fighter pilot
examples.chinese: 战争英雄、前战斗机飞行员

examples.english: War veterans claim that they were exposed to chemical weapons while fighting in the Gulf.
examples.chinese: 参加过海湾战争的老兵称，他们在战争中曾接触化学武器。

examples.english: the conflict in the Middle East
examples.chinese: 中东的冲突

examples.english: Can this peace settlement bring an end to years of conflict?
examples.chinese: 这个和平协议可以结束多年的冲突吗？

examples.english: The conflict began early in December 1994.
examples.chinese: 冲突早于1994年12月开始。

examples.english: The rebellion spread quickly through the Western Provinces.
examples.chinese: 叛乱很快在西部省份蔓延开来。

examples.english: an armed rebellion against the government
examples.chinese: 反政府武装叛乱

examples.english: The army was brought in to crush the rebellion.
examples.chinese: 军队被派来平息叛乱。

examples.english: The UN had failed to stop the fighting in Rwanda.
examples.chinese: 联合国未能制止发生在卢旺达的战斗。

examples.english: The streets of the capital are now quiet again, after three weeks of heavy fighting.
examples.chinese: 三周激战过后，首都的街道现已恢复平静。

examples.english: Some 15,000 people have fled the city, following renewed fighting.
examples.chinese: 战斗再次开始后，大约15，000人已逃离该市。

examples.english: the history of modern warfare
examples.chinese: 现代战争史

examples.english: a secret underground chemical warfare plant
examples.chinese: 一座秘密的地下化学兵工厂

examples.english: Many people believe that what happened in 1940 was a British chemical warfare experiment that went wrong.
examples.chinese: 许多人认为，1940年发生的事是英国化学战试验出错所致。

examples.english: The rebels aimed to overthrow the government through protracted guerrilla warfare.
examples.chinese: 叛乱分子的目标是通过持久的游击战来推翻政府。

examples.english: Land mines maim and kill innocent people, long after hostilities have ceased.
examples.chinese: 战争结束很久以后还有地雷把无辜民众炸伤或炸死。

examples.english: Mexican forces were ordered to avoid all hostilities with the American troops.
examples.chinese: 墨西哥军队奉命要完全避免与美军交战。

examples.english: The two sides reach an agreement to end hostilities.
examples.chinese: 双方达成协议结束战争。

examples.english: The Japanese navy scored a success only two days after the start of hostilities, by sinking two British battleships.
examples.chinese: 战争开始才两天，日本海军就击沉两艘英国战舰，打了个胜仗。

examples.english: a naval battle in the North Sea
examples.chinese: 北海海战

examples.english: the Battle of the Somme
examples.chinese: 索姆河战役

examples.english: The French lost the Battle of Agincourt in 1415.
examples.chinese: 1415年，法国在阿让库尔战役中失利。

examples.english: King Olaf died in battle, in 1030.
examples.chinese: 1030年，国王奥拉夫在战役中阵亡。

examples.english: Lyndon Johnson first sent U.S. combat troops into battle in March 1965.
examples.chinese: 1965年3月，林登·约翰逊首次派遣美国作战部队参战。

examples.english: Last night skirmishes were reported along the border.
examples.chinese: 据报道，昨晚边境地区发生了小规模战斗。

examples.english: Government soldiers ran into a group of rebels, and a skirmish followed.
examples.chinese: 政府军遭遇一群叛乱分子，发生了小冲突。

centers.english: to fight in a war or be in a war

examples.english: His grandfather fought on the Republican side in the Spanish Civil War.
examples.chinese: 他祖父在西班牙内战中加入共和派军队作战。

examples.english: The Boers were fighting the British at this time.
examples.chinese: 此时，布尔人正与英国人开战。

examples.english: Most of these young soldiers don't even know what they're fighting for.
examples.chinese: 这些年轻士兵大部分甚至不知道为了什么打仗。

examples.english: My grandfather fought in World War II.
examples.chinese: 我祖父参加过第二次世界大战。

examples.english: They were fighting a war of independence against a powerful enemy.
examples.chinese: 他们在与强大的敌人打一场独立战争。

examples.english: Iranian and Iraqi troops clashed on the border.
examples.chinese: 伊朗和伊拉克军队在边境爆发冲突。

examples.english: US planes clashed with enemy fighter aircraft again today.
examples.chinese: 美国飞机今天又与敌方战斗机发生了冲突。

examples.english: border clashes between India and Pakistan
examples.chinese: 印度和巴基斯坦之间的边境冲突

examples.english: Europe had been at war for nearly two years.
examples.chinese: 欧洲已经打了将近两年的仗。

examples.english: He could not remember a time when his country had not been at war.
examples.chinese: 他记不得什么时候自己的国家不在打仗。

examples.english: In 1792 England was at war with America.
examples.chinese: 1792年，英国与美国交战。

examples.english: In his speech he promised full support to wars of independence waged by colonial peoples.
examples.chinese: 在演说中，他承诺全力支持殖民地人民发动的独立战争。

examples.english: Many Americans now question whether the US should have waged war on Vietnam.
examples.chinese: 如今许多美国人都质疑美国是否应该对越南发动战争。

examples.english: He believes that men make war because they are by nature aggressive.
examples.chinese: 他相信人类发动战争是因为他们天生好斗。

examples.english: Throughout the nineteenth century the colonial powers made war on poorer countries in order to gain territory.
examples.chinese: 整个19世纪，殖民地列强为了扩展版图向贫穷国家发动战争。

examples.english: Fighting between the various warring factions was destroying the country.
examples.chinese: 各敌对派系之间的战斗正在毁灭这个国家。

examples.english: All attempts to reconcile the two warring groups have failed.
examples.chinese: 所有想调解这两个交战团体的努力都失败了。

centers.english: to start a war

examples.english: He was visiting his parents in Torino when war was declared.
examples.chinese: 宣布开战时，他正在都灵看望父母。

examples.english: Within hours of the incident, both countries had declared war.
examples.chinese: 这事件发生几小时后，两个国家宣战。

examples.english: In April the Americans declared war on Germany and entered the war.
examples.chinese: 4月，美国对德国宣战，加入了战争。

examples.english: The women stayed at home and farmed the land, while the men went to war.
examples.chinese: 男人到前线打仗，妇女在家种地。

examples.english: The two countries went to war over a small, but important, area of land.
examples.chinese: 这两个国家为了一块面积虽小但很重要的土地开战。

centers.english: during a war

examples.english: He died on a wartime bombing mission.
examples.chinese: 他死于战时的一次轰炸行动。

examples.english: My grandmother's wartime experiences were still fresh in her memory.
examples.chinese: 我祖母对于战时的经历仍记忆犹新。

examples.english: She grew up in Africa, far away from the hardships of wartime Europe.
examples.chinese: 她在非洲长大，没有经历过战时欧洲的艰苦情况。

examples.english: wartime President, Franklin D. Roosevelt
examples.chinese: 战时总统富兰克林·D.罗斯福

examples.english: I longed for a bar of chocolate, but this was wartime, and such luxuries were not available.
examples.chinese: 我很想吃块巧克力，但这是战争时期，没有这样的奢侈品。

examples.english: the importance of secrecy in wartime
examples.chinese: 战时保密的重要性

examples.english: What did your father do in the war?
examples.chinese: 在战争中你父亲做什么?

examples.english: Three of his brothers were killed in the First World War.
examples.chinese: 他有三个兄弟死于第一次世界大战。

examples.english: a memorial to the thousands of soldiers killed in action
examples.chinese: 为成千上万阵亡士兵竖立的纪念碑

centers.english: the place where a war is fought

examples.english: Thousands died on the battlefields of northern France.
examples.chinese: 成千上万的人在法国北部的战场上死去。

examples.english: We were now just a few kilometres behind the front line.
examples.chinese: 我们现在距离前线仅几公里。

examples.english: Her grandfather had four years on the Western Front.
examples.chinese: 她爷爷在西部前线待过四年。

examples.english: the latest news from the war zone
examples.chinese: 来自战区的最新消息

examples.english: Aid workers returning from the war zone reported seeing groups of rebels waving white flags.
examples.chinese: 从战区回来的救援人员说，看见一群群叛乱分子挥舞着白旗。

examples.english: It is better to negotiate than to settle political disputes on the field of battle.
examples.chinese: 谈判总比在战场上解决政治争议好。

examples.english: The new weapon has not yet been tried out in the field.
examples.chinese: 新武器还未在战场上试用过。

examples.english: He was awarded a medal for distinguished service in the field.
examples.chinese: 他因在战场上的突出贡献而获得了一枚奖章。

examples.english: It was in the Pacific theater of the war that the US won its first major victories.
examples.chinese: 美国初次赢得重大胜利是在太平洋战区。

examples.english: Many of NATO's nuclear weapons in the European theatre are obsolete.
examples.chinese: 北约在欧洲战场的许多核武器都淘汰了。

examples.english: In 1941, Margaret E. Ray escaped war-torn France and landed in New York.
examples.chinese: 1941年，玛格丽特·E.蕾逃离了饱受战争蹂躏的法国，来到纽约。

examples.english: The plan offered long-term aid to war-torn Europe.
examples.chinese: 该计划向饱受战争蹂躏的欧洲提供长期援助。

centers.english: the people you are fighting against in a war

examples.english: Even though these soldiers were our enemies, I felt desperately sorry for them.
examples.chinese: 这些士兵虽然是我们的敌人，我还是为他们感到难过。

examples.english: They accused him of giving secret information to the enemy.
examples.chinese: 他们指控他将秘密情报给了敌国。

centers.english: someone who is keen to start a war

examples.english: Some saw him as a great statesman, but others saw him as a ruthless warmonger.
examples.chinese: 有些人认为他是个伟大的政治家，有些人则认为他是个残酷无情的战争贩子。

examples.english: The militarists wanted Japan to invade China.
examples.chinese: 军国主义者希望日本入侵中国。

examples.english: The hawks in the government would never permit any talks with the enemy.
examples.chinese: 政府里的主战派人物绝不会允许同敌人进行任何会谈。

examples.english: We don't yet know whether the new President is a hawk or a dove someone who prefers peaceful methods.
examples.chinese: 我们还不知道新总统是鹰派还是鸽派。

examples.english: the hawkish element in the opposition party
examples.chinese: 反对党里的主战派

centers.english: when people fight each other

examples.english: Two men were fighting in the street outside.
examples.chinese: 外面街上两个男人在打架。

examples.english: He said he'd fight anyone who tried to stop him entering.
examples.chinese: 他说，谁想阻止他进去他就跟谁打架。

examples.english: Billy had been fighting with some kids from another school.
examples.chinese: 比利一直跟几个外校的小孩打架。

examples.english: Two men in the bar began fighting over a game of cards.
examples.chinese: 酒吧里两个男人为了一局牌打了起来。

examples.english: As kids, we fought about everything, but now we're pretty good friends.
examples.chinese: 小时候我们动不动就打起来，但现在我们是很好的朋友。

examples.english: The two girls had a fist fight in the school cafeteria.
examples.chinese: 两个女孩在学校的餐厅里拳斗了一架。

examples.english: He ran away from school after he had a fight with a bigger boy.
examples.chinese: 他和一个比他大些的男孩打了一架后就逃离了学校。

examples.english: She tried to struggle but he put his hand over her mouth.
examples.chinese: 她想挣扎，但他用手捂住她的嘴。

examples.english: Vince struggled to free himself from the policeman's grip.
examples.chinese: 文斯挣扎着想摆脱警察抓住他的手。

examples.english: It seems that he struggled with the robber and got quite seriously hurt.
examples.chinese: 看样子他和强盗有过一番搏斗，受了重伤。

examples.english: The victim had obviously struggled furiously against her attacker.
examples.chinese: 很明显，被害者曾与袭击者拼命搏斗过。

examples.english: The two boys wrestled for a while then gave up, tired.
examples.chinese: 两个男孩一阵揪扭后累了，就放弃了。

examples.english: His jaw was broken while he tried to wrestle with a drunken bus driver.
examples.chinese: 他和一个喝醉酒的公共汽车司机扭打纠缠时，下巴骨被打碎了。

examples.english: Police say they don't know what the two were arguing about, only that it came to blows.
examples.chinese: 警察说他们不知道那两个人为什么争吵，只知道他们打了起来。

examples.english: Animal rights activists and fox-hunters clashed at the annual Boxing Day hunt.
examples.chinese: 在每年一度的节礼日猎狐时，动物权益保护者与猎狐者发生了冲突。

examples.english: Police clashed with demonstrators for the second time in a week.
examples.chinese: 在一个星期内，警察与示威者发生了第二次冲突。

centers.english: to start a fight

examples.english: Don't talk to him -- he's just trying to start a fight.
examples.chinese: 别跟他说话——他正想找人打架呢。

examples.english: The fight was started by a group of English football fans.
examples.chinese: 这次打架是一群英格兰足球迷先挑起的。

examples.english: Some of the students regularly try to pick fights in the playground.
examples.chinese: 有些学生经常在操场上寻衅斗殴。

examples.english: I walked into the bar and some drunk tried to pick a fight with me.
examples.chinese: 我走进那家酒吧，一名醉汉企图跟我找碴打架。

expressions.text: be looking/spoiling for a fight/itching for a fight

examples.english: When he's drunk , he gets violent and starts looking for a fight.
examples.chinese: 他喝醉后就撒起野来要寻衅打架。

examples.english: The other driver came at me, obviously spoiling for a fight.
examples.chinese: 另一名驾车者朝我冲过来，显然是想打一架。

examples.english: He's not the kind of guy that goes into a bar itching for a fight.
examples.chinese: 他不是那种爱到酒吧去找人打架的人。

centers.english: behaving in a way that is likely to start a fight
centers.chinese: 行为很可能引起打架的

examples.english: The men were drunk and aggressive.
examples.chinese: 那些人喝得醉醺醺的想找人打架。

examples.english: Some breeds of dog, such as German shepherds, were bred to be aggressive.
examples.chinese: 有些品种的狗，比如德国牧羊犬，被培养成好斗的性格。

examples.english: He glared aggressively at me.
examples.chinese: 他气势汹汹地瞪着我。

examples.english: When parents divorce, children often respond with anger and aggression.
examples.chinese: 父母离婚，孩子们的反应经常是愤怒、敌对。

examples.english: When police officers questioned him, he became belligerent and tried to hit one of them.
examples.chinese: 当警察盘问他时，他变得怒气冲冲，并想打其中一名警察。

examples.english: Harris is a belligerent man with an explosive temper.
examples.chinese: 哈里斯是个争强好胜的人，脾气火爆。

centers.english: a fight

examples.english: There was a massive fight after school yesterday.
examples.chinese: 昨天放学后发生了一场大规模斗殴。

examples.english: Three of his ribs were broken in a fight.
examples.chinese: 斗殴时他有三根肋骨被打断。

examples.english: He had been at the pub for several hours before getting into a fight with another man.
examples.chinese: 他在酒吧里待了几个小时，后来与另一个人打了起来。

examples.english: A couple of fights broke out near the stadium after the game.
examples.chinese: 比赛后在体育场附近发生了几场斗殴。

examples.english: How did you get that black eye? Were you in a fight?
examples.chinese: 你这乌青眼是哪来的？和别人打架了？

examples.english: He ended up in jail after a punch-up with a bloke in the pub.
examples.chinese: 他在酒吧内与一个人打架后进了监狱。

examples.english: Some drunks began calling us names and we ended up getting into a punch-up.
examples.chinese: 几个醉鬼开始骂起我们来，最后大家就打了一架。

examples.english: No one was injured in the brawl, which police quickly stopped.
examples.chinese: 警察很快阻止了这场打斗，没有人受伤。

examples.english: He got his face cut in a brawl outside a nightclub.
examples.chinese: 他在一家夜总会外面跟人打架时脸上被划伤了。

examples.english: There was a brief scuffle as the crowd left the football ground.
examples.chinese: 人群离开足球场时发生了短暂的扭打。

examples.english: Rioters threw stones at the police and a few scuffles broke out.
examples.chinese: 闹事者朝警察扔石头，接着就爆发了几处轻微的混战。

examples.english: Scraps in the playground are a pretty frequent occurrence.
examples.chinese: 操场上发生打架是很常见的事。

examples.english: It's normal for brothers and sisters to have a few scraps. It's part of growing up.
examples.chinese: 兄弟姐妹之间打打架是正常的事，这是成长的一部分。

examples.english: There was a brief altercation and someone called the police.
examples.chinese: 发生了一阵争吵，有人去叫了警察。

centers.english: a fight involving a large number of people

examples.english: There was fighting on the streets of Paris yesterday when police and demonstrators clashed.
examples.chinese: 昨天在巴黎的街道上警察与示威者发生冲突，大打出手。

examples.english: Fighting between rival gangs resulted in the death of a teenage boy.
examples.chinese: 两伙敌对的流氓打群架，造成一名少年死亡。

examples.english: Fighting broke out between English and Dutch football fans after the game.
examples.chinese: 足球比赛结束后，英格兰球迷与荷兰球迷之间发生了斗殴。

examples.english: There were riots in several cities after it was announced that the price of bread would rise by 200%.
examples.chinese: 宣布面包价格要上涨200%之后，有几个城市发生了骚乱。

examples.english: Four days of unrest and anti-government riots left at least three people dead.
examples.chinese: 为期四天的骚乱和反政府暴乱造成至少三人死亡。

examples.english: A riot broke out after a police shooting of a local man.
examples.chinese: 警察开枪打死一名当地人之后就发生了暴乱。

examples.english: He was killed in a street battle in 1998.
examples.chinese: 1998年他死于一场街头群殴中。

examples.english: a battle between rival gangs
examples.chinese: 两帮敌对流氓之间的冲突

examples.english: About 200 students fought pitched battles with police during the demonstrations.
examples.chinese: 游行示威中约200名学生与警察发生了激烈冲突。

examples.english: The clashes came as farmers blockaded roads.
examples.chinese: 农民封锁了道路，于是引起了冲突。

examples.english: There were clashes last night between local residents and young people attending the rock festival.
examples.chinese: 昨晚当地居民和参加摇滚音乐节的年轻人发生了冲突。

examples.english: The police were obviously anticipating a confrontation, as they were heavily armed.
examples.chinese: 警察显然预料到有一场冲突要发生，因为他们已全副武装。

examples.english: After Mathews was attacked, a free-for-all broke out in the audience.
examples.chinese: 马修斯遭到袭击后，观众中就爆发了群殴。

centers.english: when people fight as a sport

examples.english: He knocked out his opponent only five minutes into the fight.
examples.chinese: 拳赛开始才五分钟他就击倒了对手。

examples.english: Are you going to watch the big fight tomorrow?
examples.chinese: 你去看明天那场重要的拳击赛吗？

examples.english: the fight between Joe Louis and Rocky Marciano
examples.chinese: 乔·路易斯与洛基·马西亚诺的拳击比赛

examples.english: McCallum and Toney fought to a draw.
examples.chinese: 麦卡勒姆与托尼打成平手。

examples.english: The two wrestlers have fought each other many times before.
examples.chinese: 这两位摔跤手以前对抗过许多次。

examples.english: As a teenager, Dolittle took up boxing.
examples.chinese: 杜利特尔青少年时就开始练拳击。

examples.english: The boxing match will be held at the Arena.
examples.chinese: 这场拳击赛将在大运动场进行。

examples.english: Sumo wrestling originated in Japan.
examples.chinese: 相扑运动起源于日本。

examples.english: He won six high-school wrestling matches in a row.
examples.chinese: 他在高中摔跤比赛中连续六场获胜。

examples.english: a professional wrestler
examples.chinese: 职业摔跤运动员

centers.english: to fight for something you think is right or against something you think is wrong
centers.chinese: 为支持你认为是正确的事或反对你认为是错误的事而奋斗

examples.english: We are determined to fight drug abuse in schools.
examples.chinese: 我们决心对抗校园内的吸毒问题。

examples.english: Freedom of speech is something well worth fighting for.
examples.chinese: 值得为争取言论自由而进行斗争。

examples.english: Mandela fought to abolish white-only rule in South Africa.
examples.chinese: 曼德拉为废除南非的白人专政而斗争。

examples.english: Amnesty is an organization that fights against torture and injustice.
examples.chinese: 大赦国际是和酷刑与不义作斗争的组织。

examples.english: The group has become a small but significant force working for change.
examples.chinese: 该组织已成为致力于改革的力量，它虽然微小却不可忽视。

examples.english: an organization that is working to preserve California's redwood trees
examples.chinese: 致力于保护加州红杉树的一个组织

examples.english: She will be remembered as someone who worked tirelessly for educational reform.
examples.chinese: 人们将记得她曾为教育改革孜孜不倦地工作过。

examples.english: After months of campaigning, local parents have persuaded the council to provide a school bus service.
examples.chinese: 经过数月的活动，当地家长已说服委员会提供校车服务。

examples.english: Women campaigned for equal pay and equal rights throughout the 1960s.
examples.chinese: 在20世纪60年代，妇女一直在为同工同酬和平等权利展开运动。

examples.english: He was one of the people who campaigned to change the law on homosexuality.
examples.chinese: 他是为改变同性恋法律而活动的人中的一个。

examples.english: During his years as a human rights campaigner he was arrested seven times.
examples.chinese: 他长年作为人权斗士，被逮捕了七次。

examples.english: Martin Luther King championed the rights of all black Americans.
examples.chinese: 马丁·路德·金为捍卫所有美国黑人的权利而奋斗。

examples.english: Throughout her political career she was a champion of prison reform.
examples.chinese: 在她的政治生涯中，她始终支持监狱改革。

examples.english: The police are looking for more effective ways to combat drugs gangs in the city.
examples.chinese: 警方在寻找更有效的方法对付该市的贩毒集团。

examples.english: Measures to combat pollution within the city have been introduced.
examples.chinese: 为应付市内的污染问题已实施了一些措施。

examples.english: The government sees price controls as a way to combat inflation.
examples.chinese: 政府把控制物价作为对抗通货膨胀的一种方法。

examples.english: The World Health Organization is constantly waging war on malaria.
examples.chinese: 世界卫生组织正在同疟疾作持久战。

examples.english: We need a comprehensive strategy to wage war on poverty in our inner cities.
examples.chinese: 我们需要一项综合的战略来对抗市中心的贫困现象。

centers.english: to fight against someone powerful or something bad

examples.english: Residents are fighting the local council over plans for a new road.
examples.chinese: 居民反对地方委员会的新路修建计划。

examples.english: The community is struggling to fight against drug dealers and prostitution, in their effort to make the area a safer place to live.
examples.chinese: 该社区正在对抗贩毒分子和卖淫以努力使该地区成为更安全的居住区。

examples.english: By resisting the Mafia's attempts to control the region, he was putting his own life in danger.
examples.chinese: 他反对黑手党控制这一地区的企图，将自己的生命置于危险之中。

examples.english: The unions have resisted attempts to change the pay structure.
examples.chinese: 工会抵制了改变工资结构的企图。

examples.english: She became one of the symbols of resistance both at home and abroad.
examples.chinese: 她成为国内外抵抗运动的象征之一。

examples.english: There has been a lot of resistance to tax increases, even those designed to benefit education.
examples.chinese: 增税遭到普遍反对，甚至包括旨在资助教育的增税。

examples.english: Any policy that creates unemployment is likely to meet with strong resistance.
examples.chinese: 任何引起失业的政策都可能遭到坚决抵制。

examples.english: Children are often powerless to fight back when they are treated unfairly.
examples.chinese: 孩子们受到不公正的待遇时，通常无力反抗。

examples.english: You must fight back if you become a victim of discrimination.
examples.chinese: 如果你是歧视的受害者，你一定要起来反抗。

examples.english: This nation has been oppressed for too long, and it's time we fought back.
examples.chinese: 这个国家受压迫已太久了，我们该起来反抗了。

examples.english: Aggressive bosses are less likely to criticize workers who stand up to them.
examples.chinese: 攻击性强的老板较少批评那些敢于反对他们的员工。

examples.english: He is respected as a leader who is willing to stand up to the West.
examples.chinese: 他作为一名敢于反对西方国家的领导人而受到尊敬。

examples.english: Although parents and local residents put up a fight, they couldn't stop the school being closed.
examples.chinese: 虽然家长和当地居民起来反对，可仍阻止不了学校被关闭。

examples.english: People are not going to accept being sent back to the war zone without putting up a fight.
examples.chinese: 人们不会束手接受被送回战区。

examples.english: The workers held out for several months against the closure of the mine, but they were eventually defeated.
examples.chinese: 工人们对关闭矿井的决定进行了数月之久的坚决斗争，但最后还是失败了。

examples.english: If you're not prepared to make a stand yourself, you can't expect anyone else to.
examples.chinese: 如果你自己都没打算公开反对，就别期望别人会站出来了。

examples.english: Gandhi and his followers made a determined stand against the racist and imperialist policies of the government.
examples.chinese: 甘地和他的追随者坚决反对政府的种族主义和帝国主义政策。

examples.english: Those who opposed the regime were put into prison or even executed.
examples.chinese: 反对该政权的人都被关进了监狱，甚至被处死。

examples.english: There will be a rally on September 22 for all those who oppose direct military action.
examples.chinese: 9月22日有一次集会，反对直接军事行动的人都可参加。

examples.english: The newspaper became well known for its fierce opposition to apartheid.
examples.chinese: 这家报纸以强烈反对种族隔离制度而出名。

centers.english: when someone fights for or against something
centers.chinese: 某人为支持或反对某事而斗争

examples.english: New laws have been passed to help the police in their fight against organized crime.
examples.chinese: 已通过了几项新法律以帮助警察对付有组织的犯罪。

examples.english: The fight against malnutrition and preventable diseases must continue.
examples.chinese: 必须继续努力对抗营养不良和可预防疾病。

examples.english: Women's fight for equality has not ended.
examples.chinese: 女性争取平等的斗争尚未结束。

examples.english: He was a hero in the fight for independence from France.
examples.chinese: 他是争取独立，脱离法国统治的斗争的英雄。

examples.english: Many freedom fighters were imprisoned, but they never gave up the struggle.
examples.chinese: 许多争取自由的斗士遭监禁，但他们从未放弃斗争。

examples.english: Nkrumah led the people in their struggle for independence.
examples.chinese: 恩克鲁玛领导人民为独立而斗争。

examples.english: He devoted his life to the struggle against fascism and oppression.
examples.chinese: 他将毕生献给了与法西斯主义以及压迫的斗争。

examples.english: The battle against racial discrimination is not over.
examples.chinese: 与种族歧视的斗争尚未结束。

examples.english: The President is fully committed to the battle against the drug traffickers.
examples.chinese: 总统全身心地致力于对抗毒品走私贩。

examples.english: They now have a good chance of winning the battle against violence and drugs in the community.
examples.chinese: 他们现在完全有机会战胜社区内的暴力和毒品。

examples.english: Motoring organizations have started a campaign for safer roads in the area.
examples.chinese: 汽车协会已经发起了一场在该地区改善路面条件的运动。

examples.english: the Campaign for Nuclear Disarmament
examples.chinese: 核裁军运动

examples.english: Our campaign against drug abuse is supported by the medical profession.
examples.chinese: 我们反对滥用药物的运动得到了医学界的支持。

examples.english: Clark's vigorous campaign against the dumping of nuclear waste will continue.
examples.chinese: 克拉克坚决反对倾倒核废料的运动将继续进行。

examples.english: Environmental groups launched a campaign against the widespread production of genetically modified crops.
examples.chinese: 环境保护组织发起了一场反对大规模生产基因改良作物的运动。

examples.english: As a politician she's made the fight for women's rights into a personal crusade.
examples.chinese: 作为政治家，她把争取妇女权利的斗争发展成了一场个人运动。

examples.english: She intends to continue her crusade against sex and violence on TV.
examples.chinese: 她决心继续开展反对电视上的性和暴力镜头的运动。

examples.english: He has begun a crusade for gun control.
examples.chinese: 他开始了管制枪支的运动。

examples.english: Our cause is just, and we are prepared to give our lives for it.
examples.chinese: 我们的事业是正义的，我们准备为之牺牲性命。

examples.english: Thousands died in the cause of freedom.
examples.chinese: 在争取自由的事业中成千上万的人献出了生命。

examples.english: The cause of Socialism is not dead.
examples.chinese: 社会主义理想并未破灭。

examples.english: The Health Department launched an anti-smoking drive.
examples.chinese: 卫生部发动了一场反对吸烟的运动。

examples.english: The government's economy drive has failed to produce the expected savings.
examples.chinese: 政府所发起的节约运动并未带来预期的效果。

centers.english: to attack someone

examples.english: A woman was attacked by three youths while she was out jogging in Central Park.
examples.chinese: 一名女子在中央公园慢跑时受到三个青年的袭击。

examples.english: Police dogs are trained to attack in certain circumstances.
examples.chinese: 警犬受过训练，会在某些情况下攻击人。

examples.english: He was badly injured when one of his own bulls attacked him.
examples.chinese: 他自己的一头公牛向他扑来，使他受了重伤。

examples.english: Her husband attacked her with a knife.
examples.chinese: 她丈夫用刀子伤害她。

examples.english: Since moving to New Jersey, he has been mugged at gunpoint twice.
examples.chinese: 他搬到新泽西州以后，已经两次遇到了持枪抢劫。

examples.english: If anyone ever tried to mug me, I would throw my bag and run.
examples.chinese: 要是有什么人想抢劫我，我会扔了包就跑。

examples.english: I was scared I would get mugged or raped.
examples.chinese: 我怕被人抢劫或强暴。

examples.english: He assaulted a female flight attendant who refused to serve him more drinks.
examples.chinese: 他殴打了一名拒绝为他供应更多饮料的女乘务员。

examples.english: Some supporters ran onto the field and assaulted the referee.
examples.chinese: 一些球迷跑进球场打了那个裁判。

examples.english: She was kidnapped and sexually assaulted at gunpoint.
examples.chinese: 她遭人绑架，在枪口威逼之下被强暴了。

examples.english: The victim had been stabbed six times.
examples.chinese: 受害人被捅了六刀。

examples.english: Meyers was stabbed once in the abdomen and once in the neck.
examples.chinese: 迈耶斯腹部和颈部各被捅了一刀。

examples.english: Her assailant lunged, stabbing at her again and again.
examples.chinese: 袭击者猛扑过来，捅了她一刀又一刀。

examples.english: Charlie went for Murray as soon as he entered the room, pushing him up against the wall.
examples.chinese: 默里一进房间，查利就扑过去把他推到墙边。

examples.english: One day Grandma got so mad she went for Grandpa with the kitchen knife.
examples.chinese: 有一天祖母气极了，拿起一把菜刀就扑向祖父。

examples.english: The dog went straight for my throat, without warning.
examples.chinese: 那只狗冷不防就扑过来咬我的喉部。

examples.english: If you are attacked, go for your attacker's eyes as they are the most vulnerable part of the face.
examples.chinese: 如果你遭到袭击，就对准袭击者的眼部打去，眼睛是脸上最脆弱的部位。

examples.english: From the moment the bell rang, Tyson laid into his opponent.
examples.chinese: 铃声响过之后，泰森就猛击对手。

examples.english: The video shows a policeman repeatedly laying into a protestor with his baton.
examples.chinese: 录像中显示一名警察在用警棍不断痛打一名抗议者。

centers.english: to attack someone suddenly and unexpectedly
centers.chinese: 突然出其不意地袭击某人

examples.english: The rebel group successfully ambushed a regiment of American reinforcements.
examples.chinese: 这群叛乱分子成功伏击了美国的一支增援部队。

examples.english: He was afraid he would be stopped by government troops or, even worse, ambushed by the Vietcong.
examples.chinese: 他担心自己会受到政府军阻截，或者更糟的是遭到越共伏击。

examples.english: Parker ambushed a school bus on a field trip and held 17 children and their teacher hostage.
examples.chinese: 帕克伏击了一辆前去旅行考察的校车，劫持了17名学生和一名教师作为人质。

examples.english: He had been set upon by bat-wielding racists, so he understood how I felt.
examples.chinese: 他也曾经遭到过挥舞着球棒的种族主义者的袭击，所以他能理解我的感受。

examples.english: The drivers were set upon by a mob, including several women, which showered them with stones.
examples.chinese: 这些司机受到一群暴徒突袭，他们向司机猛扔石头，其中有些暴徒是女性。

examples.english: Red with rage, Frank turned on Anna, grasping her arm in a vice-like grip.
examples.chinese: 弗兰克气得满脸通红，突然向安娜冲过去，像老虎钳一般牢牢地抓住她的手臂。

examples.english: Then the warriors turned upon each other, for a fight to the death.
examples.chinese: 接着勇士们互相扑向对方，进行了一场殊死搏斗。

examples.english: They felt sure the killer would strike again, but could not say when.
examples.chinese: 他们确信凶手会再次出击，但说不准会是在什么时候。

examples.english: The police struck at dawn in a carefully timed operation to catch the bombers.
examples.chinese: 警方在黎明时分发起突击，抓捕放置炸弹的人，这是在时间上经过周密安排的一次行动。

examples.english: He crouched on the ground, like an animal ready to pounce.
examples.chinese: 他蹲伏在地上，就像一头野兽准备随时扑出去。

examples.english: Before he could rescue it, the cat pounced on the bird and carried it to the bushes.
examples.chinese: 他还没来得及前去相救，那只猫就一个纵身扑向小鸟，叼着它跑向树丛。

examples.english: Two guys tried to jump me in the park last night.
examples.chinese: 昨晚在公园里有两个家伙突然从背后袭击我。

examples.english: He climbed over the wall and jumped the guard, easily overpowering him.
examples.chinese: 他攀过墙猛地向卫兵扑去，轻而易举地制伏了他。

centers.english: to attack a place or country

examples.english: On 25 April, British and Australian troops attacked the enemy at Gallipoli.
examples.chinese: 4月25日，英、澳两国部队向在加利波利的敌人发起了进攻。

examples.english: The village had been attacked by enemy warplanes.
examples.chinese: 那村庄曾遭到敌军战机的轰炸。

examples.english: The special unit attacked at dawn, inflicting heavy losses.
examples.chinese: 特别小分队在黎明时分发动了进攻，使敌人遭受了惨重的损失。

examples.english: General Powell consulted with the President before giving the order to attack.
examples.chinese: 鲍威尔上将下令发动进攻之前曾与总统商议。

examples.english: Almost two-thirds of the attacking force had been wiped out.
examples.chinese: 将近2/3的进攻部队已被歼灭了。

examples.english: Enemy forces were almost certainly preparing to invade.
examples.chinese: 敌军准备入侵差不多是肯定的了。

examples.english: Sicily was invaded by the Normans, and later by the Saracens.
examples.chinese: 西西利岛先后遭诺曼人和撒拉森人入侵。

examples.english: In his latest film, super-intelligent aliens invade Earth and try to take over.
examples.chinese: 在他的这部最新影片中，超智慧的外星人入侵地球并企图占领地球。

examples.english: The villagers headed for the mountains to escape the invading army.
examples.chinese: 村民们逃往山里躲避侵略军。

examples.english: The rebels raided the tiny mountain town early on Tuesday.
examples.chinese: 星期二清早，叛军突然袭击了这个山区小镇。

examples.english: Again, the tribe had raided a neighbouring village, inflicting many casualties.
examples.chinese: 该部落再一次袭击了邻村，造成许多伤亡。

expressions.text: launch an attack/mount an attack / launch an invasion/mount an invasion

examples.english: A fresh attack was mounted on the last remaining rebels.
examples.chinese: 残余叛军遭到新一轮的攻击。

examples.english: The Huns, normally a peaceful race, launched an invasion into Europe via the Caspian Steppes.
examples.chinese: 一向爱好和平的匈奴人经由里海草原发动进攻，入侵欧洲。

examples.english: Heavily armed and masked gunmen stormed an ammunitions store in Co. Mayo.
examples.chinese: 一群全副武装的蒙面持枪歹徒突然袭击了梅奥郡的一个军火库。

examples.english: an attempt by government forces to storm the hijacked airplane
examples.chinese: 政府军试图猛攻被劫飞机

examples.english: The capital has been besieged by the opposition militia for two months now.
examples.chinese: 首都至今已被反对派民兵组织围困两个月了。

examples.english: Federal agents besieged the compound in Waco in 1993.
examples.chinese: 1993年，联邦探员包围了在韦科的大院。

examples.english: Hundreds of Serbs managed to flee the besieged city.
examples.chinese: 成百上千的塞尔维亚人设法逃出了那座被包围的城市。

centers.english: to attack someone because they attacked you

examples.english: The government wants peace, but will not hesitate to retaliate if attacked.
examples.chinese: 政府希望和平，但人若犯我，我必还击。

examples.english: She decided not to retaliate physically, because it would put her in even greater danger.
examples.chinese: 她决定不作肉体上的报复，因为那只会使她更加危险。

examples.english: When police tried to push back the crowd, a few youths retaliated by throwing stones at them.
examples.chinese: 警察试图将人群往后推，一些年轻人就向他们投石头进行报复。

examples.english: Later that day, whites retaliated by killing a young black delivery driver.
examples.chinese: 那天稍后白人出手报复，杀了一个年轻的黑人送货司机。

examples.english: He has promised to take tough measures to retaliate against extremists.
examples.chinese: 他承诺要采取严厉措施，对极端分子予以还击。

examples.english: In an interview, Tyson claimed he was retaliating for Holyfield's attack on him.
examples.chinese: 在一次采访中，泰森称他是对霍利菲尔德的攻击进行报复。

examples.english: I fully accept that it was wrong of the guards to retaliate with blows and kicks.
examples.chinese: 我完全同意，警卫拳打脚踢进行还击是不对的。

examples.english: America stopped short of military retaliation, but issued a strong statement condemning the invasion.
examples.chinese: 美国克制着没有实施军事报复，但是发表了一份措辞严厉的声明，谴责了这种侵略行为。

examples.english: the threat of retaliation
examples.chinese: 报复威胁

examples.english: They plotted the attack in retaliation for the attack by federal agents on the camp.
examples.chinese: 他们策划了这次袭击行动以报复联邦探员进攻他们的营地。

examples.english: Three inmates were killed in retaliation.
examples.chinese: 三名囚犯遭报复被杀。

examples.english: The enemy had started a vicious counter-attack, forcing the French into the woods.
examples.chinese: 敌人开始疯狂反攻，把法军逼进了丛林。

examples.english: Allied forces were regrouping in order to launch a counter-attack.
examples.chinese: 盟军正在重新部署军队以发动反击。

examples.english: Once the harvest was in, the peasants were free to counter-attack.
examples.chinese: 庄稼一收割完，农民就有时间进行反击了。

examples.english: The tanks and artillery will hit back hard if the ceasefire is broken.
examples.chinese: 如果违反停火协定，就会有坦克和大炮予以重重回击。

examples.english: Less than 24 hours after this cross-border raid, army jets hit back with a devastating air strike.
examples.chinese: 这次越界侵袭之后不到24小时，军队的喷气式飞机就进行了反击，发动了一次毁灭性的空袭。

examples.english: He suspected that the US would take the opportunity to strike back at the Axis forces.
examples.chinese: 他怀疑美国将利用这次机会对轴心国部队进行反击。

examples.english: Any hope of peace is destroyed by these endless tit-for-tat attacks.
examples.chinese: 任何一线和平的希望都被这些没完没了的报复行动所粉碎了。

examples.english: The murder is thought to have been a tit-for-tat response by the Mafia to an earlier gangland killing.
examples.chinese: 这宗凶杀案被认为是黑手党对早前的一宗黑帮杀人事件的复仇行为。

centers.english: an attack against a person

examples.english: The attack took place as she was walking home.
examples.chinese: 她是在步行回家的时候遭到袭击的。

examples.english: Fong did not suffer a physical attack, but he was humiliated by the three men.
examples.chinese: 方身体上没有受伤，只是受到了那三个男人的羞辱。

examples.english: victims of racial attacks
examples.chinese: 种族袭击的受害人

examples.english: There was no indication of a sexual attack.
examples.chinese: 没有迹象显示这是一起强奸案。

examples.english: They finally caught the gang responsible for the armed attacks on foreigners in Dakar.
examples.chinese: 他们终于抓获了在达喀尔武装袭击外国人的歹徒。

examples.english: New statistics show a further increase in attacks on women.
examples.chinese: 新的统计显示袭击妇女的事件又增加了。

examples.english: Police say it was a particularly nasty attack.
examples.chinese: 警方说这是一起极其恶毒的袭击事件。

examples.english: a number of brutal and unprovoked attacks on gays
examples.chinese: 一些无故毒打同性恋者的事件

examples.english: Preston was a victim of a mugging three months ago.
examples.chinese: 普雷斯顿三个月前遭人行凶抢劫。

examples.english: Police are investigating a spate of muggings that took place on the campus last week.
examples.chinese: 警方正在调查上周在校园里接连发生的多起行凶抢劫事件。

examples.english: The charges against the prisoner include criminal damage and assault.
examples.chinese: 对囚犯的指控包括刑事毁坏罪和侵犯人身罪。

examples.english: He was convicted of adultery and indecent assault.
examples.chinese: 他被判犯有通奸罪和猥亵罪。

examples.english: the problem of domestic violence and sexual assault within the home
examples.chinese: 家庭暴力和家庭性侵犯的问题

examples.english: Assaults on public transportation workers have doubled in the last 10 years.
examples.chinese: 殴打公共交通工作人员的事件在过去的十年里增加了一倍。

centers.english: a military attack

examples.english: The attack began at dawn.
examples.chinese: 进攻在拂晓开始。

examples.english: The caller warned that the attacks will continue until the demands are met.
examples.chinese: 打电话来的那人警告说，这些要求如果得不到满足，他们还将继续发动袭击。

examples.english: missile attacks on civilian targets
examples.chinese: 对非军事目标的导弹袭击

examples.english: The city is exposed and vulnerable to air attack.
examples.chinese: 这个城市毫无防守，容易受到空袭。

examples.english: Eleven people were injured in a rocket attack on Sunday night.
examples.chinese: 有11人在星期天晚上的火箭攻击中受伤。

examples.english: International terrorists have mounted an attack aimed at disrupting the huge tourist industry here.
examples.chinese: 国际恐怖分子发动了袭击，旨在打击这里庞大的旅游业。

examples.english: To my horror, the soldiers went on the attack, killing men, women and children indiscriminately.
examples.chinese: 使我大为惊恐的是，这些士兵继续行凶作恶，不分男女老幼，见人就杀。

examples.english: The fear of an invasion by rebels is always present.
examples.chinese: 害怕叛军入侵的感觉无时不在。！

examples.english: Some analysts fear that increasing desperation could lead to a military invasion of the country's southern neighbors.
examples.chinese: 一些分析家担心，这个国家越来越深的绝望会使它对南部邻国发动军事侵略。

examples.english: the Soviet invasion of Czechoslovakia
examples.chinese: 德国对波兰的侵略

examples.english: He led a commando raid in the desert.
examples.chinese: 他在沙漠里指挥了一场突击队的袭击。

examples.english: a surprise raid
examples.chinese: 偷袭

examples.english: NATO bombing raids
examples.chinese: 北约的突击轰炸

examples.english: Some of the most beautiful architecture in the city was destroyed in the air raids.
examples.chinese: 这座城里一些最漂亮的建筑在空袭中遭到了破坏。

examples.english: air-raid sirens
examples.chinese: 空袭警报

examples.english: Sixty people are thought to have been killed in the raid on the village just west of the capital.
examples.chinese: 在首都西面这个村子的袭击事件中，疑有60人被夺去了生命。

examples.english: John Brown's raid on Harper's Ferry
examples.chinese: 约翰·布朗袭击哈珀号渡船

examples.english: As a teenager, he was involved in a raid against a village of Omaha Indians.
examples.chinese: 他在十几岁的时候参与过一次行动，袭击了奥马哈印第安人的一个村落。

expressions.text: be killed/shot etc in an ambush

examples.english: Six or seven of the passengers were killed in an ambush on the narrowest part of the road.
examples.chinese: 有六七名乘客在最狭窄的一段路上中了埋伏而丧命。

examples.english: They moved slowly, knowing that in the next clump of trees enemy soldiers might be lying in ambush.
examples.chinese: 他们行动很慢，因为他们知道下一簇树丛里可能埋伏着敌军的士兵。

examples.english: a massive armed assault on the city
examples.chinese: 对这个城市发动的大规模武装袭击

examples.english: Only a successful assault on the rebels’ headquarters could have ended the civil war.
examples.chinese: 只有成功袭击叛军司令部才有可能结束内战。

examples.english: The rebels launched a retaliatory strike.
examples.chinese: 叛军发动了报复性攻击。

examples.english: The bomb strike took place on a camp near Krek.
examples.chinese: 这次炸弹袭击发生在克雷克附近的一个军营里。

examples.english: nuclear strike capability
examples.chinese: 核打击能力

examples.english: The great military offensive had failed, and it seemed victory was escaping them.
examples.chinese: 这次大规模的军事进攻失败了，胜利似乎在躲着他们。

examples.english: The rebel offensive resumed on Thursday, leaving 12 dead and many injured.
examples.chinese: 星期四，叛军继续进攻，造成12人死亡，多人受伤。

examples.english: Government troops launched an offensive against UNITA positions in the north.
examples.chinese: 政府军向争取安哥拉彻底独立全国联盟的北方阵地发动进攻。

examples.english: The President announced a counter-offensive on the rebels.
examples.chinese: 总统宣布向叛军发动反攻。

examples.english: The invasion was condemned as ‘blatant aggression’ by the British Prime Minister.
examples.chinese: 这次入侵行动被英国首相斥为“明目张胆的侵略”。

examples.english: The President promised to use all his powers to prevent further aggression.
examples.chinese: 总统保证将运用他的全部权力阻止敌人再次侵略。

examples.english: another example of communist aggression
examples.chinese: 敌人的又一次挑衅

examples.english: As our older generation knows from experience, unchecked aggression against a small nation is a prelude to international disaster.
examples.chinese: 我们的老一辈从经验中得知，侵犯小国不加以制止必会酿成一场国际性的灾难。

examples.english: Any eastward expansion would be regarded by the government as an act of aggression.
examples.chinese: 任何向东扩张的行动都被该国政府认为是一种侵略行为。

centers.english: a person or place that attacks another person or country
centers.chinese: 攻击别人或别国的人或地方

examples.english: Unknown assailants stabbed a British tourist and wounded his wife.
examples.chinese: 一些身份不明的歹徒刺死了一名英国游客，并刺伤了他的妻子。

examples.english: The attacker fled empty-handed.
examples.chinese: 凶犯空手而逃。

examples.english: Her attacker is described as white, in his mid-fifties and with medium-length dark hair.
examples.chinese: 她描述说对她行凶的是一个白人，年龄在五十四五岁左右，留着中等长度的黑发。

examples.english: Mrs Lundy's alleged assailants were aquitted of all charges.
examples.chinese: 涉嫌对伦迪夫人行凶的那些人被宣判所有罪名不成立。

examples.english: The situation is complex and it is not easy to determine exactly who is the aggressor in this case.
examples.chinese: 局势很复杂，很难判定这事到底是哪一国先挑起来的。

examples.english: a call for united action against the foreign aggressor
examples.chinese: 联合起来一起对付外国侵略者的号召

examples.english: The USSR scored valuable propaganda points against its Western aggressors.
examples.chinese: 苏联在宣传上压过了西方侵略者，赢得了宝贵的分数。

centers.english: a person or place that is attacked

examples.english: In most sexual offences, the attacker is known to the victim.
examples.chinese: 大多数性犯罪案件中，作案人都是受害者所认识的。

examples.english: The victim was shaken, but physically unharmed.
examples.chinese: 受害人受了惊，但是身体上没有受伤。

examples.english: The program was grossly insensitive to Holocaust victims.
examples.chinese: 这个节目悍然不顾大屠杀中受害人的感受。

examples.english: One of the bombing victims was dead on arrival in hospital.
examples.chinese: 炸弹袭击中的一名受害人送到医院时已经死亡。

examples.english: She had been the victim of a particularly vicious attack.
examples.chinese: 她曾遭受过极其恶毒的攻击。

examples.english: victims of domestic abuse
examples.chinese: 家庭暴力的受害人

examples.english: The bomb missed its target by several kilometres.
examples.chinese: 炸弹没有击中目标，偏差了几公里。

examples.english: The GIA continued its attacks on civilian targets.
examples.chinese: 他们继续袭击平民目标。

examples.english: When the plane gets to the target area, it drops the missile and returns to base.
examples.chinese: 飞机到达目标区域，投弹后便返回基地。

examples.english: The Institution has been the target of terrorist attack several times.
examples.chinese: 该机构已多次成为恐怖袭击的目标。

examples.english: The commonly used roads are the targets of heavy fire.
examples.chinese: 通常的道路是炮火猛烈攻击的目标。

examples.english: Holding a US passport makes these tourists a prime target for terrorists.
examples.chinese: 这些旅游者持有美国护照，这使他们成了恐怖分子首要的袭击目标。

examples.english: The rebels are under attack and may surrender at any time.
examples.chinese: 叛乱分子正遭到袭击，随时都可能会投降。

examples.english: At first, he thought the Pacific Fleet was under attack from German forces.
examples.chinese: 起初，他以为太平洋舰队遭到了德军的袭击。

examples.english: We were united by a sense of national pride when our country came under attack.
examples.chinese: 国家受到袭击，民族自尊心使我们团结了起来。

centers.english: easy to attack

examples.english: His victims are vulnerable young women.
examples.chinese: 他的作案对象都是娇弱的年轻女子。

examples.english: Ground floor windows are particularly vulnerable and secure locks should be fitted.
examples.chinese: 底层的窗户特别不安全，应该装上防盗锁。

examples.english: The tanks’ positions made them vulnerable to enemy gunfire.
examples.chinese: 坦克停放在这些位置上很容易遭受敌人炮火的轰击。

examples.english: The troops in their bunkers were sitting ducks for enemy missiles.
examples.chinese: 这些地堡里的军队是敌军导弹的“活靶子”。

examples.english: We were like sitting ducks, our only defense a small shed surrounded by a few concrete blocks.
examples.chinese: 我们就像是坐以待毙的鸭子，唯一的防护就是一个小棚子，周围有几块大的混凝土砖。

examples.english: I knew that in our current position, we were an all-too-easy target for thieves and bandits.
examples.chinese: 我知道以我们目前的处境，盗匪要向我们下手是最容易不过的。

examples.english: Women living alone make easy targets for robbers.
examples.chinese: 独居的妇女容易成为窃贼的目标。

centers.english: the army, navy etc

examples.english: Units of the Nigerian army were quickly sent to the border.
examples.chinese: 尼日利亚陆军部队很快被派往边境。

examples.english: My sons are both in the army.
examples.chinese: 我的两个儿子都在陆军服役。

examples.english: In 1066 William the Conqueror raised an army and invaded England.
examples.chinese: 1066年征服者威廉募集军队入侵英格兰。

examples.english: It was an important battle for the navy.
examples.chinese: 这是海军的一场重要战役。

examples.english: My father was in the navy during the war.
examples.chinese: 战时我父亲在海军服役。

examples.english: The French have a very powerful airforce.
examples.chinese: 法国拥有一支非常强大的空军部队。

examples.english: The airforce played a huge part in the Kosovo conflict.
examples.chinese: 空军在科索沃的冲突中发挥了巨大的作用。

examples.english: My brother and sister are both in the airforce.
examples.chinese: 我的哥哥和姐姐都在空军服役。

examples.english: The military may be sent in to deal with the riots.
examples.chinese: 有可能会派军队去平定暴乱。

examples.english: a company that supplies electronic equipment to the military
examples.chinese: 向军方供应电子设备的一家公司

examples.english: A new government minister is now responsible for the armed forces.
examples.chinese: 现在由一位新上任的政府部长掌管着武装力量。

examples.english: Measures will be taken to help modernize the country's armed forces.
examples.chinese: 将要采取措施帮助该国的武装部队实现现代化。

examples.english: The town was captured by Italian forces under the command of General Ciano.
examples.chinese: 那小镇被查诺上将指挥的意大利军队占领了。

examples.english: The United States placed its forces in the region on alert.
examples.chinese: 美国让该地区的军队保持戒备状态。

examples.english: Ground forces were wiped out by the air attack.
examples.chinese: 地面部队被空袭消灭了。

examples.english: Camp Lejune was the first place I was stationed when I was in the service.
examples.chinese: 莱琼营是我进部队后驻扎的第一个地方。

examples.english: The family has a tradition of going into the services.
examples.chinese: 这个家族有参军服役的传统。

examples.english: A special force of 500 US Marines has been sent to the area.
examples.chinese: 一支由500名美国海军陆战队士兵组成的特别部队被派往该地区。

examples.english: I have a 25-year-old brother who's in the Marine Corps.
examples.chinese: 我有一个25岁的哥哥在海军陆战队服役。

centers.english: someone who is in the army, navy etc
centers.chinese: 在陆军、海军等服役的人

examples.english: The ceremony was held to honour the tens of thousands of servicemen and servicewomen who lost their lives in the war.
examples.chinese: 这次典礼是为了缅怀在战争中牺牲的成千上万的军人。

examples.english: Four Australian servicemen were reported missing after the ambush.
examples.chinese: 伏击行动之后，有四名澳大利亚军人被报失踪。

examples.english: a tribute to the bravery of our servicemen and -women
examples.chinese: 对我们军人的大无畏精神的颂扬

examples.english: Moore has been a soldier for most of his adult life.
examples.chinese: 穆尔成年后大部分时间都在部队里当兵。

examples.english: There were several soldiers guarding the main gate.
examples.chinese: 大门有几名士兵把守。

examples.english: Thousands of French troops died in the attack.
examples.chinese: 这次袭击中有数千名法国士兵阵亡。

examples.english: The President is sending three hundred troops to the area.
examples.chinese: 总统将派遣300名士兵前往该区。

examples.english: Janet married a sailor in the French navy.
examples.chinese: 珍妮特嫁给了法国海军的一名水兵。

examples.english: Two thousand British sailors lost their lives when the ship went down.
examples.chinese: 2,000名英国水兵因为船只沉没失去了生命。

examples.english: Three airmen were killed during the battle.
examples.chinese: 战斗中三名空军士兵阵亡了。

examples.english: He's an officer in the US Marines.
examples.chinese: 他是美国海军陆战队的一名军官。

examples.english: Colonel Gary G. Mahle is the commanding officer here.
examples.chinese: 加利·G.马尔上校是这里的指挥官。

centers.english: used by or connected with the army, navy etc
centers.chinese: 陆军、海军等所使用的，或与陆军、海军等有关的

examples.english: The President visited a military cemetery at Bitburg.
examples.chinese: 总统凭吊了比特堡的军人墓地。

examples.english: China reportedly planned to sell military equipment to Saudi Arabia.
examples.chinese: 有报道称该国计划出售军事设备。

examples.english: Peres said the military campaign would last as long as it took to secure the country's northern border.
examples.chinese: 佩雷斯说这次军事行动将会持续很长时间，以保护国家北部边境的安全。

examples.english: There's an American army base nearby.
examples.chinese: 附近有个美国陆军基地。

examples.english: An army jeep was parked outside their house.
examples.chinese: 一辆军用吉普车停在他们家门外。

examples.english: Army officers have overthrown the government in a well planned coup d'état.
examples.chinese: 陆军军官们在一场精心策划的政变中推翻了该政府。

examples.english: His orders were to protect the port from naval attack.
examples.chinese: 他的命令是为了保护港口不受海军袭击。

examples.english: a huge Chinese naval base
examples.chinese: 一个庞大的中国海军基地

examples.english: Stedman spent nine months recovering in a naval hospital.
examples.chinese: 斯特德曼在一家海军医院进行了九个月的康复治疗。

examples.english: The island's defences have been badly damaged by recent air attacks.
examples.chinese: 该岛的防御工事在最近几次空袭中遭到严重的破坏。

examples.english: Ground forces will be backed up by NATO air power.
examples.chinese: 地面部队将由北约组织的空军掩护。

centers.english: to join the army, navy etc

examples.english: He wants to join the air force when he finishes school.
examples.chinese: 他想毕业之后加入空军。

examples.english: Frank lied about his age in order to join the army.
examples.chinese: 弗兰克为了参军谎报了年龄。

examples.english: My dad joined up at the beginning of the war.
examples.chinese: 战争刚开始我爸爸就参军了。

examples.english: By the end of 1915, over 700,000 men had enlisted.
examples.chinese: 到了1915年年底，已有七十多万人入伍。

examples.english: Frank enlisted in the marines at the age of 19.
examples.chinese: 弗兰克19岁时加入了海军陆战队。

centers.english: when people are made to join the army, navy etc
centers.chinese: 人们被征召加入陆军、海军等

examples.english: When was conscription introduced in Britain?
examples.chinese: 英国是何时引入征兵制度的？

examples.english: Many young men went abroad to avoid the draft.
examples.chinese: 许多年轻人出国逃避被征召入伍。

examples.english: Some of the men were volunteers, but most of them had been conscripted.
examples.chinese: 这些人当中有些是自愿参军的，但多数都是被征召入伍的。

expressions.text: be conscripted into the army/the armed forces etc

examples.english: Many of the young soldiers who were conscripted into the army in World War I did not want to fight.
examples.chinese: 在第一次世界大战中有许多应征入伍的年轻士兵并不愿意上战场作战。

examples.english: All males between the ages of 18 and 60 were liable for military service.
examples.chinese: 18至60岁的所有男性均有义务服兵役。

examples.english: My father was exempted from military service on the grounds of ill health.
examples.chinese: 我父亲因身体不好而被免除兵役。

examples.english: My father was posted to Germany during his national service, and that's where he met my mother.
examples.chinese: 我父亲服兵役期间被派驻德国，就在那里认识了我母亲。

examples.english: Did you have to do military service?
examples.chinese: 你那时一定要服兵役吗？

examples.english: I was called up three months after the First World War broke out.
examples.chinese: 第一次世界大战爆发三个月以后，我就被征召入伍了。

examples.english: Thousands of young Americans were drafted to fight in the war in Vietnam.
examples.chinese: 成千上万的美国青年人被征召赴越南作战。

centers.english: experienced in a particular job or activity
centers.chinese: 在某项工作或活动中有经验的

examples.english: Ms Carter is one of our most experienced teachers.
examples.chinese: 卡特女士是我们最有经验的老师之一。

examples.english: This job would suit someone experienced in dealing with the public.
examples.chinese: 这份工作适合与大众打交道有经验的人。

examples.english: Highly experienced cost estimators for construction projects earn around $80,000 a year.
examples.chinese: 经验丰富的建筑项目造价预算师一年可以挣8万美元左右。

examples.english: Being a seasoned traveller, he was fully prepared for the long delay at the airport.
examples.chinese: 他出门旅行很有经验，所以对于长时间在机场耽搁有充分的准备。

examples.english: We need a seasoned manager to run this project.
examples.chinese: 我们需要一位有经验的经理来管理这个项目。

examples.english: A practised observer would quickly notice changes in the birds’ behaviour.
examples.chinese: 一位有经验的观察者会马上注意到鸟类的行为变化。

examples.english: Morris is a skilful salesman, practiced in the art of persuasion.
examples.chinese: 莫里斯是个高明的推销员，很有说服技巧。

examples.english: Chiles, a three-term veteran of the U.S. Senate, won the governorship of Florida.
examples.chinese: 美国参议院的一位三届元老奇利斯当选佛罗里达州州长。

examples.english: Millett is a veteran campaigner for women's rights.
examples.chinese: 米利特是妇女权利的资深活动家。

examples.english: Veteran diplomat Richard Murphy is heading the commission.
examples.chinese: 资深外交官理查德·墨菲正领导着这个委员会。

examples.english: Charlie will show you what to do - he's one of our old hands.
examples.chinese: 查利会教你怎么做—他是我们这儿的老手。

examples.english: Nurse Baker is an old hand at dealing with difficult patients.
examples.chinese: 贝克尔护士对付麻烦的病人很有经验。

examples.english: You may not want to believe me, but I do know a thing or two.
examples.chinese: 你也许不相信我，但我确实是很了解的。

expressions.text: know a thing or two about

examples.english: I think he knows a thing or two about football - he's been playing for 15 years.
examples.chinese: 我想他在足球方面是很在行的一他踢了15年了。

examples.english: The best way to learn is to spend some time with someone who knows the ropes.
examples.chinese: 最好的学习方法是跟着在行的人学上一段时间。

examples.english: People who shop at thrift stores regularly know the ropes.
examples.chinese: 经常光顾旧货店的人知道怎么淘旧货。

examples.english: My accountant knows his stuff - he's a real pro.
examples.chinese: 我的会计师很在行一他是个真正的专家。

examples.english: If there's a fish down there he'll catch it - he's a old pro.
examples.chinese: 如果下面有鱼他就能捉到—他是个老手。

centers.english: the knowledge and skill that you get from doing something
centers.chinese: 做某事获得的知识和技能

examples.english: She's very bright and ambitious but she doesn't have much experience.
examples.chinese: 她非常聪明，又有抱负，但是没有多少经验。

examples.english: She has plenty of experience of dealing with difficult situations.
examples.chinese: 她应付困境很有经验。

examples.english: I have a little bit of experience working in a hotel.
examples.chinese: 我略有一些在酒店工作的经验。

examples.english: The job requires five years’ secretarial experience.
examples.chinese: 这份工作要求有五年从事秘书工作的经验。

examples.english: Have you had any previous experience as a construction worker?
examples.chinese: 你以前有当建筑工人的经验吗？

examples.english: Fran is gaining valuable experience working for her father's firm.
examples.chinese: 弗兰在她父亲的公司工作，正在积累宝贵的经验。

centers.english: not experienced in a particular job or activity
centers.chinese: 在某项工作或活动中没有经验的

examples.english: Inexperienced managers often have problems with their staff.
examples.chinese: 缺乏经验的经理人员经常会跟员工产生问题。

examples.english: There are a lot of young, inexperienced players on the team.
examples.chinese: 队里有许多年轻、没有经验的球员。

examples.english: I know Sally lacks experience, but she's tremendously enthusiastic.
examples.chinese: 我知道萨莉缺乏经验，但她非常充满热情。

examples.english: If Glover lacks experience of management, why was he put in charge?
examples.chinese: 格洛弗缺乏管理经验，那为什么叫他来主管？

examples.english: He clearly lacked experience speaking before large groups.
examples.chinese: 他显然缺乏当着大群人发言的经验。

examples.english: As you are new to the job, we don't expect you to work as fast as the others.
examples.chinese: 你刚开始做这一工作，我们不指望你能做得和别人一样快。

examples.english: They're new to the software game, so they're spending a lot on advertising.
examples.chinese: 软件方面他们刚刚起步，所以在广告上投资很大。

examples.english: Untrained nurses are not allowed to treat patients who are seriously ill.
examples.chinese: 未受正规训练的护士不允许去照顾重病患者。

examples.english: The records are confusing to anyone untrained in accounting.
examples.chinese: 这些记录对于在会计方面没有受过正规训练的人来说是很难搞得清楚的。

examples.english: Don't be too hard on the guy, he's just a rookie.
examples.chinese: 不要对这小伙子要求太严了，他还是个新手。

examples.english: Mariucci is the first rookie coach in NFL history to win 11 games in a row.
examples.chinese: 马里厄西是美国橄榄球联盟历史上第一位连胜11场比赛的新人教练。

examples.english: The Eiger is a difficult mountain to climb. Novices should not attempt it.
examples.chinese: 艾格尔山是座很难攀登的山，初次爬山的人不应当去爬这座山。

examples.english: If you're a novice to working with computer graphics, you should buy this CD-ROM.
examples.chinese: 如果你是从事电脑图像工作的新手，就应该购买这张只读光盘。

examples.english: Novice drivers are responsible for a large portion of all accidents.
examples.chinese: 所有交通事故中有很大一部分是由新手驾驶员造成的。

examples.english: To the uninitiated, most computer systems seem complex and difficult to understand.
examples.chinese: 对于门外汉来说，大部分电脑系统似乎都非常复杂，难以理解。

examples.english: The classes are designed for the uninitiated, starting with the basics of car mechanics.
examples.chinese: 这些学习班专为新手开设，从汽车结构的基础教起。

centers.english: lack of experience

examples.english: Because of my inexperience in the business, I think I trusted other people too much.
examples.chinese: 我做生意缺乏经验，我想我是太相信别人了。

examples.english: The inexperience of the teaching staff has taken its toll on student test scores.
examples.chinese: 教员经验不足，已经对学生的考试成绩产生了重大的影响。

examples.english: I'm not worried about her lack of experience - we can easily train her.
examples.chinese: 我可不担心她经验不足—培训她很容易。

examples.english: Mallory's lack of political experience shows in some of the decisions he's made.
examples.chinese: 马洛里缺乏从政经验，这在他所作的一些决定上表现了出来。

centers.english: knowing about life, people, and the world

examples.english: Paul liked to turn to more experienced people for advice.
examples.chinese: 保罗喜欢去找更有经验的人征求意见。

examples.english: My elder brother was a lot more experienced in these matters than I was.
examples.chinese: 在这些事情上，哥哥比我要有经验得多。

examples.english: When you've been around as long as I have you realize some things aren't worth getting upset about.
examples.chinese: 等到你有了我这些阅历，你就会发现有些事情根本不值得去难过。

expressions.text: have been around the block (a few times)

examples.english: I've been around the block a few times, and I think I know when someone's trying to cheat me.
examples.chinese: 我也见过一些世面，我想我看得出什么时候有人想骗我。

expressions.text: be a man/woman of the world
