examples.english: Look, Ray, you're a man of the world - I'm sure you've been in situations like this before.
examples.chinese: 听我说，雷，你也是一个阅历丰富的人—我相信你以前也碰到过这种情形。

examples.english: Everyone at the party was sophisticated and well-educated.
examples.chinese: 聚会上人人都世故练达，很有教养。

examples.english: The play is intended for a sophisticated audience.
examples.chinese: 这出戏是供有鉴赏力的观众欣赏的。

examples.english: Kids these days are much more streetwise than we ever were at their age.
examples.chinese: 现在的孩子比我们在他们那么大时懂事多了。

examples.english: Copeland is a streetwise cop who knows how to take care of himself.
examples.chinese: 科普兰是一名熟悉街头生活的警察，他知道如何保护自己。

examples.english: For a priest he was surprisingly worldly.
examples.chinese: 作为牧师，他的世故令人吃惊。

examples.english: She was much older and more worldly than I was.
examples.chinese: 她年纪比我大得多，也世故得多。

examples.english: Even the most hardened criminal would have been shocked by the brutality of the crime.
examples.chinese: 纵然是最冷酷无情的罪犯也会对这起犯罪案件中的残暴行径感到震惊。

examples.english: Hardened foes of abortion are unlikely to be persuaded by her arguments.
examples.chinese: 堕胎的坚定反对者不可能被她的观点说服。

examples.english: Miss Davies is not really the tough, hard-bitten businesswoman that she appears to be.
examples.chinese: 戴维斯小姐实际不是她表面上看起来的那种强硬、不讲情面的女商人。

examples.english: Jensen's experience in prison left him hard-bitten, cynical, and ruthless.
examples.chinese: 詹森在狱中的经历令他变得冷漠无情、愤世嫉俗、心狠手辣。

centers.english: not knowing very much about life, people, and the world
centers.chinese: 对于人情世故懂得不多的

examples.english: She's too young and inexperienced to go abroad on her own.
examples.chinese: 她年龄太小，不谙世事，不能一个人出国去。

examples.english: I'm not going to take orders from some foolish inexperienced young man.
examples.chinese: 我可不想听命于一个愚蠢又不懂事的年轻人。

examples.english: He's so innocent that anyone can take advantage of him.
examples.chinese: 他很天真，谁都可以利用他。

examples.english: Don't get her mixed up in your plan - she's just an innocent girl.
examples.chinese: 不要把她牵涉进你们的计划—她只是个单纯的小姑娘。

examples.english: He'll lose his innocence pretty fast, living in New York.
examples.chinese: 生活在纽约，他很快就会丢失原来的那份天真。

examples.english: I was so naive - I believed everything the military told me.
examples.chinese: 我那时候很天真一部队里所教的一切我全都相信。

examples.english: He held onto the naive belief that Marxism would solve all the world's problems.
examples.chinese: 他坚持这个天真的想法，以为马克思主义可以解决世上所有的问题。

examples.english: She naively believed that he would send her a check as soon as he got home.
examples.chinese: 她天真地以为，他一到家就会寄支票来。

examples.english: Through naivete, she signed over the rights to all her music to her manager.
examples.chinese: 她因为天真无知，把她所有音乐方面的权利都签给了她的经纪人。

examples.english: When she arrived in the city, she was just an unsophisticated country girl.
examples.chinese: 她初到这个城市的时候，还只是一个涉世不深的乡下女孩。

examples.english: I felt very ignorant and unsophisticated when I was with my brother and his university friends.
examples.chinese: 我和哥哥以及他的大学朋友在一起时，就感到自己非常无知，不谙世事。

examples.english: Even when I was 21 I was so green, I had no idea that my best friend was on drugs.
examples.chinese: 甚至在我21岁的时候，我仍然很幼稚，不知道自己最要好的朋友在吸毒。

examples.english: Pike was a grizzled combat veteran in charge of fifteen green recruits.
examples.chinese: 派克是一位头发花白的老战士，带领着15名新兵。

examples.english: Stop worrying about Lucia - she's no babe in the woods anymore.
examples.chinese: 不要担心露茜娅——她已经不是三岁小孩了。

centers.english: a religion

examples.english: We spent hours discussing politics, religion, and poetry.
examples.chinese: 我们聊了好几个小时，大谈政治、宗教和诗歌。

examples.english: the Catholic religion
examples.chinese: 天主教

examples.english: My parents’ religion is very important to them.
examples.chinese: 我父母的宗教信仰对他们非常重要。

examples.english: The Buddhist and Shinto religions coexist in Japan.
examples.chinese: 佛教和神道教在日本并存。

examples.english: We respect all religions here.
examples.chinese: 我们尊重这里的所有宗教。

examples.english: She can't eat pork. It's against her religion.
examples.chinese: 她不能吃猪肉，这有违于她的宗教。

examples.english: People of all faiths are welcome in this building.
examples.chinese: 欢迎所有宗教信仰的人进入这座建筑。

examples.english: One of the things our faith teaches us is that God created us in His own image.
examples.chinese: 我们的宗教教会了我们一件事，就是上帝以自己的形象造人。

examples.english: The tensions are growing between members of different faiths.
examples.chinese: 不同宗教的人之间的紧张局势在不断加剧。

examples.english: Most of the island's population belong to the Islamic faith.
examples.chinese: 这座岛上的大部分人口都信奉伊斯兰教。

examples.english: Godparents agree to educate their godchild in the practice of the Christian faith.
examples.chinese: 教父教母同意对自己的教子教女进行基督教教育。

examples.english: The belief in Jesus as a prophet is a major part of several world creeds.
examples.chinese: 耶稣是先知这个信念是世界几大宗教信条的一个重要组成部分。

examples.english: Give everybody an equal chance, regardless of race, color, creed, or gender.
examples.chinese: 给每个人以平等的机会，不必考虑其种族、肤色、信条或性别。

expressions.text: people of all creeds/people of every creed

examples.english: Mother Teresa offered her service and love to people of every caste and creed.
examples.chinese: 特雷莎修女为各社会阶层和信条的人服务，奉献自己的关爱。

examples.english: Our church welcomes people of various races, colors, and creeds.
examples.chinese: 我们的教会欢迎各种不同种族、肤色和信条的人。

centers.english: a religious group

examples.english: Islam has two main sects: the Sunnis and the Shias.
examples.chinese: 伊斯兰教有两大派别：逊尼派与什叶派。

examples.english: A monk named Kashyapa is regarded as the founder of the Zen sect of Buddhism.
examples.chinese: 一位名叫迦叶的和尚被认为是佛教禅宗派的创始人。

examples.english: She is a member of a religious sect that was formed from various aspects of Asian religions.
examples.chinese: 她是一个宗教派别的成员，该宗派由亚洲诸宗教的各个方面形成。

examples.english: a fundamentalist sect
examples.chinese: 原教旨主义派

examples.english: The evangelical churches are particularly strong in the big cities.
examples.chinese: 福音派教会在大城市里影响力特别大。

examples.english: He took us to a Pentecostal meeting in one of the city's many black churches.
examples.chinese: 城市里有很多黑人教堂，他带我们去参加了其中一所黑人教堂内举行的一个五旬节派教会的集会。

examples.english: Even though I belong to the Catholic Church, I don't agree with everything it says.
examples.chinese: 虽然我信天主教，但并非同意它所说的一切。

examples.english: The Church of England finally agreed to accept the ordination of women priests.
examples.chinese: 英国国教会最终同意了给女神职人员授予圣职。

examples.english: Dozens of religious cults have appeared in the US, most making a fortune for their leaders.
examples.chinese: 美国出现了许多异端教派，大多数都让其领袖发了大财。

examples.english: Members of the cult are not allowed to marry or own property without permission.
examples.chinese: 这个异端教派的教徒没有得到许可不得结婚，也不得拥有财产。

examples.english: A spokesman denied the group is a cult and said members could leave whenever they wanted.
examples.chinese: 一位发言人否认了该组织属于异端教派，并说其成员随时都可以按自己的意愿离开。

centers.english: things that you believe because of your religion
centers.chinese: 因所信仰的宗教而相信的事

examples.english: Martin Luther King was assassinated because of his beliefs.
examples.chinese: 马丁·路德·金因其信仰而遭暗杀。

examples.english: The religious beliefs and practices of Americans have hardly changed since the 1940s.
examples.chinese: 美国人的宗教信仰和习俗自20世纪40年代以来没有什么变化。

examples.english: She refused to change her strongly-held beliefs.
examples.chinese: 她拒绝改变自己坚定的信仰。

examples.english: They are acting in a way that directly contradicts Christian beliefs.
examples.chinese: 他们的行为方式完全背弃了基督教的信仰。

examples.english: In spite of all that has happened, somehow she has held onto her faith.
examples.chinese: 尽管发生了那一切，她还是坚持着自己的信仰。

examples.english: Instead of celebrating their religious faith, they are forced to conceal it for fear of reprisals.
examples.chinese: 他们没有为自己的宗教信仰举行庆祝仪式，反而因为害怕报复而被迫隐瞒信仰。

examples.english: Nothing could shake his faith in God.
examples.chinese: 什么都无法动摇他对上帝的信仰。

examples.english: The only reason I stayed in my marriage was because my faith in religion sustained me.
examples.chinese: 我维持着这段婚姻的唯一原因，是我对宗教的信仰使我得以坚持下去。

centers.english: relating to religion

examples.english: Religious education is compulsory in all English schools.
examples.chinese: 在英国的所有学校里都必须接受宗教教育。

examples.english: All acts of religious worship were banned.
examples.chinese: 一切宗教崇拜活动都遭到了禁止。

examples.english: The tutor discussed her own religious beliefs openly with the students.
examples.chinese: 这位导师开诚布公地与学生讨论了她自己的宗教信仰。

examples.english: Record companies feared the album might cause offence to people on religious grounds.
examples.chinese: 唱片公司担心这张专辑可能会因为宗教原因得罪人。

examples.english: The walls were decorated with religious symbols.
examples.chinese: 墙上装饰着一些宗教性符号。

examples.english: a religious festival
examples.chinese: 宗教节日

examples.english: Jerusalem is a holy city for Jews, Christians, and Muslims.
examples.chinese: 耶路撒冷是犹太人、基督教徒和穆斯林的圣城。

examples.english: In Islam, only the Qur'an is considered holy.
examples.chinese: 在伊斯兰教中，只有《可兰经》被认为是圣经。

examples.english: the holy month of Ramadan
examples.chinese: 神圣的斋月

examples.english: The priest sprinkled each member of the congregation with holy water.
examples.chinese: 神父向每一位教徒洒圣水。

examples.english: She came seeking spiritual guidance.
examples.chinese: 她来寻求精神上的引导。

examples.english: the spiritual leader of the Tibetan people
examples.chinese: 当地人民的精神领袖

examples.english: Just as the emotional needs of the mentally disabled are overlooked, so too are their spiritual needs.
examples.chinese: 就如精神有问题者的情感需求被忽视一样，他们心灵上的需要同样也遭到忽视。

examples.english: The last sacrament represents the final step in Christ's spiritual journey.
examples.chinese: 最后一项圣事象征着基督精神之旅的最后一程。

examples.english: Do you feel you've gained anything spiritually from the experience?
examples.chinese: 通过这次经历，你是否觉得精神上有所收获？

examples.english: Eliot considered modern society to be both culturally and spiritually empty.
examples.chinese: 艾略特认为现代社会在文化上和精神上都很空虚。

examples.english: a choir specialising in sacred music
examples.chinese: 专唱圣歌的唱诗班

examples.english: the miraculous power of sacred relics
examples.chinese: 圣物的神奇力量

expressions.text: consider something sacred/regard something as sacred

examples.english: The Japanese regard Mount Fuji as a sacred mountain.
examples.chinese: 日本人将富士山看作是圣山。

examples.english: Certain animals were considered sacred by the Aztecs.
examples.chinese: 某些动物在阿兹特克人的眼里是神圣的。

examples.english: The olive tree was regarded as sacred to the goddess Athena.
examples.chinese: 雅典娜女神认为橄榄树是神圣的。

examples.english: He offered a brief prayer for divine guidance.
examples.chinese: 他作了简短的祷告以求神的指引。

examples.english: The death of a child is commonly seen by members of the tribe as divine punishment.
examples.chinese: 小孩死去通常被该部落的成员认为是神的惩罚。

examples.english: The vast majority of people in the UK are opposed to more faith-based schools, saying they would be socially divisive.
examples.chinese: 英国大多数人都反对建立更多的教会学校，说这样做会引起社会分裂。

examples.english: Community leaders and those involved in faith organizations met to discuss what could be done about the recent disturbances.
examples.chinese: 社区领导人与那些宗教团体人士会面，探讨最近发生的骚动的解决办法。

centers.english: having strong religious beliefs

examples.english: At one time, I was very religious and a regular church-goer.
examples.chinese: 我曾经是个笃信宗教、定期上教堂的人。

examples.english: He's always been a religious man, and I think that has helped him.
examples.chinese: 他始终笃信宗教，我认为这一点帮了他。

examples.english: Like many Victorians, Ruskin was deeply religious.
examples.chinese: 就像许多维多利亚时代的人一样，罗斯金极为虔诚。

examples.english: Hooker was born on a Mississippi farm, to a deeply religious mother who disapproved of almost all music.
examples.chinese: 胡克出生于密西西比州的一个农场，其母亲极为虔诚，几乎反对所有的音乐。

examples.english: Harri was the only practising Muslim in the class.
examples.chinese: 哈里是班上唯一一个虔诚的穆斯林。

examples.english: Over 500 of the prisoners are practising Christians.
examples.chinese: 犯人中有500多人是虔诚的基督徒。

examples.english: Bernard was the most devout of all her sons.
examples.chinese: 她的儿子中以伯纳德最为虔诚。

examples.english: Rachel's parents are devout Mormons.
examples.chinese: 雷切尔的父母是虔诚的摩门教教徒。

examples.english: The shema is still repeated daily by devout Jews the world over.
examples.chinese: 全世界虔诚的犹太教教徒仍每天以施玛篇作祷告。

examples.english: a devoutly religious family
examples.chinese: 一个笃信宗教的家庭

examples.english: She approached the altar with her head bowed devoutly and her eyes closed.
examples.chinese: 她虔诚地低着头，闭上双眼走向祭坛。

examples.english: She reminded Corbett of a sweet, pious young nun he once knew.
examples.chinese: 她使科比特想起以前认识的一位和蔼而又虔诚的年轻修女。

examples.english: Ethelred was not the most pious of kings, and his clashes with the church were stormy and frequent.
examples.chinese: 埃塞雷德不是个虔诚的国王，经常与教会发生激烈的冲突。

examples.english: There are 613 commandments required of a pious Jew.
examples.chinese: 虔诚的犹太教教徒要遵守613条戒律。

examples.english: Orthodox Christianity teaches that Jesus was raised to life three days after he was crucified.
examples.chinese: 正统基督教向人们传授耶稣被钉在十字架上处死三天之后复活。

examples.english: The Almoravids attempted to bring Africa back to orthodox Islamic practice.
examples.chinese: 穆拉比特人试图使非洲恢复信奉正统的伊斯兰教。

examples.english: This interpretation of Karma is rejected by orthodox Hindus.
examples.chinese: 对羯磨的这种解释被正统的印度教所摒弃。

examples.english: The president's announcement is bound to anger religious fundamentalists.
examples.chinese: 总统的声明肯定会激怒虔诚的原教旨主义者。

examples.english: When it comes to gay sex, fundamentalists and Catholics are more than willing to co-operate with each other.
examples.chinese: 在同性恋问题上，原教旨主义者和天主教徒很乐意相互合作。

examples.english: The protest was led by a small group of Christian fundamentalists.
examples.chinese: 这次抗议是一小撮基督教原教旨主义者发起的。

examples.english: He claimed to speak for traditional family values and found support from various fundamentalist groups.
examples.chinese: 他声称自己的发言是主张保持传统的家庭价值观，结果受到各原教旨主义团体的支持。

examples.english: He belongs to the fundamentalist wing of the Umma party.
examples.chinese: 他属于乌玛党的原教旨主义派。

centers.english: to do something because of your religious beliefs

examples.english: More than 90% of Jews said they observed the Day of Atonement.
examples.chinese: 90%以上的犹太人说他们都奉行赎罪日。

examples.english: Hakeem is currently observing the Muslim holy month of Ramadan, and fasts between sunrise and sunset.
examples.chinese: 哈基姆现在正遵守穆斯林的神圣斋月，日出和日落之间要禁食。

examples.english: Thursday is Ascension Day, when the church observes the bodily ascension of Christ into heaven.
examples.chinese: 周四是耶稣升天日，到时候教堂要举行耶稣圣体升天仪式。

examples.english: Father really felt he was called to preach by God.
examples.chinese: 父亲真切感到受到神启要他去布道。

examples.english: Paul and his helpers were called to be missionaries for Jesus Christ.
examples.chinese: 保罗和他的助手感觉受到神召要他们去为耶稣基督当传教士。

examples.english: Back then, people believed they were called to the ministry.
examples.chinese: 那时候人们都相信自己去担当神职是上帝的旨意。

centers.english: to start to follow a particular religion

examples.english: Saying the shahada is the first act through which you become a Muslim.
examples.chinese: 诵念清真言是成为穆斯林的第一步。

examples.english: Most surprising of all, she's become a Buddhist.
examples.chinese: 最使人吃惊的是她成了佛教徒。

examples.english: Alpha is a religious programme that aims to change your life, not just convert you.
examples.chinese: 阿尔法是一项宗教计划，目的是要帮助你改变生活，而不仅仅是要转变你的宗教信仰。

examples.english: My grandmother converted to Hinduism while living in India.
examples.chinese: 我祖母在印度生活期间皈依了印度教。

examples.english: Within five years, he had converted thousands of Calvinists back to Catholicism.
examples.chinese: 五年内他使数千名加尔文教徒皈依了天主教。

examples.english: Do you turn to Jesus Christ our Lord and accept him as your Saviour?
examples.chinese: 你愿意相信耶稣基督并接受他为你的救世主吗?

examples.english: Our message is a simple one -- if you turn to God, God will bless and receive you.
examples.chinese: 我们的要旨很简单：只要你信了上帝，上帝就会赐福于你并接纳你。

centers.english: a ghost

examples.english: ‘The ghost can be heard going up and down the stairs in the middle of the night,’ Ackley said.
examples.chinese: “半夜里都能听到鬼上下楼梯呢。”阿克利说道。

examples.english: Do you believe in ghosts?
examples.chinese: 你相信有鬼魂吗？

examples.english: Hindus believe that ghosts are scared of fire.
examples.chinese: 印度教的教徒相信鬼怕火。

examples.english: The church is haunted by the ghost of a young man who was killed there on his wedding day.
examples.chinese: 教堂里闹鬼，那是一个年轻人的鬼魂，他在婚礼那天被人杀了。

examples.english: Do you know any good ghost stories?
examples.chinese: 你知道有什么好的鬼故事吗？

examples.english: A ghostly figure hovered at the top of the stairs.
examples.chinese: 有个像鬼魂的人影在楼梯的上面徘徊。

examples.english: In the last scene of the play, a ghostly female figure shimmers into the room, her arms laden with books.
examples.chinese: 在戏的最后一场，一个女子的身影鬼一样地闪进房间，她的手里满满地捧着一摞书。

examples.english: She felt the touch of a ghostly hand on her shoulder.
examples.chinese: 她感到像是幽灵的一只手触摸着她的肩。

examples.english: In Japan people believe that the spirits of the dead return to visit the earth every summer during the Obon festival.
examples.chinese: 在日本，人们认为死者的灵魂会在每年夏天的盂兰盆节回来拜访人间。

examples.english: My grandparents used to wear charms to protect themselves against evil spirits.
examples.chinese: 我的祖父母以前都佩戴护身符驱邪护身。

examples.english: Clark says the poltergeist scatters pots and pans over the kitchen floor, opens locked doors and frightens the family dog.
examples.chinese: 克拉克说吵闹鬼会把锅碗瓢盆乱扔在厨房的地板上，会把上了锁的门打开，还会惊吓家里的狗。

examples.english: Suddenly a phantom appeared out of the mist, terrifying the hikers.
examples.chinese: 突然，薄雾中出现一个幽灵，吓坏了远足的人。

examples.english: The women said they saw an apparition in the church, next to the altar.
examples.chinese: 那些女人说她们在教堂里看到一个幽灵，就在祭坛旁边。

examples.english: The apparition ran silently across the lobby and disappeared through a window.
examples.chinese: 那幽灵悄无声息地跑过大厅，穿过一扇窗户就消失了。

examples.english: They say that the spectres of the murdered children walk through the grounds at night.
examples.chinese: 他们说夜里这些被害孩子的鬼魂就在地上行走。

examples.english: The spectre is reputed to be that of Frances Culpepper, daughter of Lord John Freschville.
examples.chinese: 那鬼魂据说是约翰·弗雷希维尔大人的女儿弗朗西丝·卡尔佩珀。

examples.english: Many of the people here continue to believe in the supernatural.
examples.chinese: 这里的许多人依然相信有超自然现象。

examples.english: stories about the supernatural
examples.chinese: 有关超自然现象的故事

examples.english: supernatural forces
examples.chinese: 超自然力量

examples.english: The villagers believed that she had supernatural powers.
examples.chinese: 村民们相信她有超自然能力。

expressions.text: things that go bump in the night

examples.english: She's always been a bit scared of things that go bump in the night.
examples.chinese: 她一向有点怕神怕鬼。

centers.english: when there are ghosts in a place

examples.english: The locals say the villas are haunted.
examples.chinese: 当地人说这些别墅里闹鬼。

examples.english: Both John and his wife Susy are convinced the house is haunted.
examples.chinese: 约翰和他妻子苏茜都确信房子里闹鬼。

examples.english: Billed as ‘America's most haunted house’, the Myrtles Plantation is supposedly inhabited by 14 ghosts.
examples.chinese: 默特尔庄园被称为“美国鬼最多的房子”，据说里面住了14只鬼。

examples.english: The ghost of the murdered prince still haunts the castle.
examples.chinese: 被害王子的幽灵还时常在城堡中出现。

examples.english: Legends say the building is haunted by ghosts.
examples.chinese: 传说中说这房子闹鬼。

examples.english: Let's get out of here, this place is really spooky!
examples.chinese: 我们离开这儿吧，这地方可真够吓人的！

examples.english: a spooky castle
examples.chinese: 一个阴森恐怖的城堡

examples.english: He lived in kind of a spooky place at the end of a long dirt road.
examples.chinese: 他住在一个阴森可怕的地方，在一条长长的土路的尽头。

centers.english: to say a prayer

examples.english: He got down on his knees and began to pray.
examples.chinese: 他跪下来开始祈祷。

examples.english: In her time of distress she prayed to Allah to help her.
examples.chinese: 在痛苦的时候，她祈求真主帮助她。

examples.english: We pray for the sick and for their families.
examples.chinese: 我们为病人及其家属祷告。

examples.english: As their crops wilted, the people prayed for rain.
examples.chinese: 庄稼枯萎，老百姓祈求降雨。

examples.english: Carly's parents are praying that the operation will succeed.
examples.chinese: 卡莉的双亲在祈祷手术顺利。

examples.english: The whole family worshipped together at the chapel.
examples.chinese: 全家人在小教堂做礼拜。

examples.english: the people worshipping in the mosque
examples.chinese: 在清真寺做礼拜的民众

examples.english: The Ancient Egyptians worshipped many gods.
examples.chinese: 古埃及人敬奉许多神。

examples.english: Our prayers for peace have been answered.
examples.chinese: 我们为和平祈祷有了回应。

examples.english: a prayer for the dead
examples.chinese: 为死者作的祷告

examples.english: She knelt to say a prayer of profound thankfulness.
examples.chinese: 她跪下来做祷告，表达深深的感激之情。

examples.english: We always used to say our prayers before going to bed.
examples.chinese: 以前我们临睡前一定要祷告。

examples.english: Before we eat, I'd just like to say grace.
examples.chinese: 进餐前，我想作感恩祷告。

examples.english: The saint appeared to him in a vision while he was at prayer.
examples.chinese: 他祷告的时候，那位圣人在异象中向他显现。

centers.english: the activity of praying

examples.english: The synagogue is used for prayer and study.
examples.chinese: 犹太教堂用于祷告和学经。

examples.english: The monks here believe strongly in the power of prayer and meditation.
examples.chinese: 此地的僧侣非常相信祷告和冥思的力量。

examples.english: Their heads were bowed in prayer.
examples.chinese: 他们在低头祷告。

examples.english: The villagers gather for worship in the little church every Sunday.
examples.chinese: 每个星期天，那些村民聚在小教堂里做礼拜。

examples.english: Christians, Muslims and Jews came together for an act of communal worship.
examples.chinese: 基督教徒、穆斯林和犹太教徒聚在一处，集体做礼拜。

examples.english: This church has been a place of worship for a thousand years.
examples.chinese: 一千年来，这座教堂一直是敬神的地方。

centers.english: an occasion when people pray together

examples.english: They were forbidden to talk during prayers.
examples.chinese: 祷告中他们禁止交谈。

examples.english: Immediately after supper Mrs Carey rang the bell for evening prayers.
examples.chinese: 吃过晚饭后，凯里太太马上拉响铃召集人们做晚间祈祷。

examples.english: We always go to the service on Sunday morning.
examples.chinese: 我们总是在星期天早晨去做礼拜。

examples.english: There were usually most people at the evening service.
examples.chinese: 晚上的礼拜一般人最多。

examples.english: The priest who performed the marriage service is a friend of the family.
examples.chinese: 主持婚礼的牧师是这家人的朋友。

centers.english: magic

examples.english: Do you believe in magic?
examples.chinese: 你相信魔法吗?

examples.english: We only have limited knowledge about the practice of magic in the Middle Ages.
examples.chinese: 我们对中世纪时施用魔法的情况所知有限。

examples.english: Angela clapped her hands and the cats disappeared as if by magic.
examples.chinese: 安杰拉拍了拍手，那些猫就像变魔术似的不见了。

examples.english: Medea said the magic words that would bring her lover back to her.
examples.chinese: 美狄亚说出了能把爱人带回到她身边的咒语。

examples.english: The branch grew into a tree that had magic powers.
examples.chinese: 那根树枝长成了一棵具有魔力的树。

examples.english: At that time, hundreds of women were burned at the stake for witchcraft.
examples.chinese: 那时候成百上千的妇女因施巫术在火刑柱上被烧死。

examples.english: People who were accused of practicing witchcraft were thrown into the lake.
examples.chinese: 那些被指控施巫术的人被扔进湖里。

examples.english: The papers were full of sensational reports on black magic, child killings, and drug raids by police.
examples.chinese: 报纸上满是耸人听闻的报道，什么巫术、杀小孩、警察突击搜寻毒品之类。

examples.english: Members of the group say they are not involved in devil worship or black magic.
examples.chinese: 该团体成员说他们未曾涉及魔鬼崇拜或巫术活动。

examples.english: The Lilac Fairy cast a spell that sent Aurora to sleep.
examples.chinese: 丁香仙子施了咒语使奥萝拉睡着了。

examples.english: When the old man was angry, he threatened to put a spell on the whole tribe.
examples.chinese: 那个老头发怒时威胁说他要对整个部落下诅咒。

examples.english: Carmelina knew that the bird was really the handsome prince under a spell from the wicked witch.
examples.chinese: 卡尔梅莉娜知道那只鸟其实是被那邪恶的女巫施了魔法的英俊王子。

examples.english: Throughout his life he maintained an interest in the occult.
examples.chinese: 他一辈子都对神秘学感兴趣。

examples.english: By the late 1880s , the spreading fascination with the occult sparked a new direction among several young artists.
examples.chinese: 19世纪80年代末期越来越多的人迷上了神秘学，由此激发出几位年轻艺术家的新流派。

examples.english: Jonnie said he was going to a voodoo ceremony that night.
examples.chinese: 乔尼说那天晚上他要去参加一场伏都教仪式。

examples.english: a voodoo priest
examples.chinese: 伏都教巫师

centers.english: someone with magic powers

examples.english: The old woman had only pretended to be so kind; she was in reality a wicked witch.
examples.chinese: 那老妇只是装出和善的样子，其实她是个恶毒的女巫。

examples.english: A beautiful fairy danced near him, and he reached out to catch her, but caught only her handkerchief.
examples.chinese: 一个美丽的仙子在他身旁跳舞，他伸出手去抓她，但是只抓到她的手绢。

examples.english: The wizard's ring had the power to make him invisible.
examples.chinese: 巫师的戒指有法力使他隐身。

examples.english: The magician knew that behind the door lay an enchanted garden.
examples.chinese: 巫师知道门背后是一座被施了魔法的花园。

examples.english: We watched in amazement as the magician made all the rings disappear.
examples.chinese: 我们惊奇地看着魔术师把所有的戒指都变走了。

examples.english: The conjuror's tricks delighted the children.
examples.chinese: 魔法师的各种戏法把孩子们逗得很开心。

centers.english: magic done as entertainment

examples.english: The club features juggling and magic acts in addition to stand-up comedy.
examples.chinese: 这家俱乐部除了有单人滑稽说笑表演外，还有杂耍和魔术表演。

examples.english: an evening of magic and comedy
examples.chinese: 魔术和喜剧表演晚会

examples.english: It's hard to do a trick like this in front of so many people.
examples.chinese: 在这么多人面前变这个戏法难度很大。

examples.english: Helen sat on the bed, clapping while her brother did magic tricks.
examples.chinese: 海伦的弟弟正在变戏法，她坐在床上鼓掌。

examples.english: John would sometimes perform card tricks for his buddies.
examples.chinese: 约翰有时候会为他的好朋友变纸牌戏法。
